authors_text: Michalis Piponidis,Panayiotis Aristodemou,Theocharis Theocharides
title: Towards a Fully Autonomous UAV Controller for Moving Platform Detection and Landing
title_zh: 用于移动平台检测和着陆的完全自主无人机控制器
comment: 2022 35th International Conference on VLSI Design and 2022 21st International Conference on Embedded Systems (VLSID)
comments: 2022 35th International Conference on VLSI Design and 2022 21st International Conference on Embedded Systems (VLSID)
abstract: While Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly deployed in several missions, their inability of reliable and consistent autonomous landing poses a major setback for deploying such systems truly autonomously. In this paper we present an autonomous UAV landing system for landing on a moving platform. In contrast to existing attempts, the proposed system relies only on the camera sensor, and has been designed as lightweight as possible. The proposed system can be deployed on a low power platform as part of the drone payload, whilst being indifferent to any external communication or any other sensors. The system relies on a Neural Network (NN) based controller, for which a target and environment agnostic simulator was created, used in training and testing of the proposed system, via Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Proximal Policy optimization (PPO) to optimally control and steer the drone towards landing on the target. Through real-world testing, the system was evaluated with an average deviation of 15cm from the center of the target, for 40 landing attempts.
summary: While Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly deployed in several missions, their inability of reliable and consistent autonomous landing poses a major setback for deploying such systems truly autonomously. In this paper we present an autonomous UAV landing system for landing on a moving platform. In contrast to existing attempts, the proposed system relies only on the camera sensor, and has been designed as lightweight as possible. The proposed system can be deployed on a low power platform as part of the drone payload, whilst being indifferent to any external communication or any other sensors. The system relies on a Neural Network (NN) based controller, for which a target and environment agnostic simulator was created, used in training and testing of the proposed system, via Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Proximal Policy optimization (PPO) to optimally control and steer the drone towards landing on the target. Through real-world testing, the system was evaluated with an average deviation of 15cm from the center of the target, for 40 landing attempts.
abstract_zh: 虽然无人机 (UAV) 越来越多地部署在多项任务中，但它们无法可靠且一致地自主着陆，这给真正自主部署此类系统带来了重大挫折。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于在移动平台上着陆的自主无人机着陆系统。与现有的尝试相比，所提出的系统仅依赖于相机传感器，并且设计得尽可能轻量。所提出的系统可以作为无人机有效载荷的一部分部署在低功率平台上，同时不受任何外部通信或任何其他传感器的影响。该系统依赖于基于神经网络（NN）的控制器，为此创建了一个与目标和环境无关的模拟器，用于训练和测试所提出的系统，通过强化学习（RL）和近端策略优化（PPO）来最佳地控制和引导无人机降落在目标上。通过实际测试，系统经过 40 次着陆尝试，与目标中心的平均偏差为 15 厘米。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于视觉的轻量级无人机自主着陆系统，用于移动平台检测与着陆。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机自主着陆系统存在可靠性不足、依赖多传感器和外部通信的问题，需更轻量化的自主解决方案。
AI.method: 采用神经网络控制器与强化学习（PPO算法），结合目标和环境无关的模拟器进行训练，并通过摄像头传感器实现自主控制。
AI.result: 实际测试中，系统在40次着陆尝试中平均偏离目标中心仅15厘米。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了基于视觉的轻量级无人机自主着陆可行性，为全自主无人机应用提供了有效方案。

authors_text: Juergen Luettin,Sebastian Monka,Cory Henson,Lavdim Halilaj
title: A Survey on Knowledge Graph-based Methods for Automated Driving
title_zh: 基于知识图谱的自动驾驶方法综述
comment: Preprint to appear in KGSWC Knowledge Graph and Semantic Web Conference 2022
comments: Preprint to appear in KGSWC Knowledge Graph and Semantic Web Conference 2022
abstract: Automated driving is one of the most active research areas in computer science. Deep learning methods have made remarkable breakthroughs in machine learning in general and in automated driving (AD)in particular. However, there are still unsolved problems to guarantee reliability and safety of automated systems, especially to effectively incorporate all available information and knowledge in the driving task. Knowledge graphs (KG) have recently gained significant attention from both industry and academia for applications that benefit by exploiting structured, dynamic, and relational data. The complexity of graph-structured data with complex relationships and inter-dependencies between objects has posed significant challenges to existing machine learning algorithms. However, recent progress in knowledge graph embeddings and graph neural networks allows to applying machine learning to graph-structured data. Therefore, we motivate and discuss the potential benefit of KGs applied to the main tasks of AD including 1) ontologies 2) perception, 3) scene understanding, 4) motion planning, and 5) validation. Then, we survey, analyze and categorize ontologies and KG-based approaches for AD. We discuss current research challenges and propose promising future research directions for KG-based solutions for AD.
summary: Automated driving is one of the most active research areas in computer science. Deep learning methods have made remarkable breakthroughs in machine learning in general and in automated driving (AD)in particular. However, there are still unsolved problems to guarantee reliability and safety of automated systems, especially to effectively incorporate all available information and knowledge in the driving task. Knowledge graphs (KG) have recently gained significant attention from both industry and academia for applications that benefit by exploiting structured, dynamic, and relational data. The complexity of graph-structured data with complex relationships and inter-dependencies between objects has posed significant challenges to existing machine learning algorithms. However, recent progress in knowledge graph embeddings and graph neural networks allows to applying machine learning to graph-structured data. Therefore, we motivate and discuss the potential benefit of KGs applied to the main tasks of AD including 1) ontologies 2) perception, 3) scene understanding, 4) motion planning, and 5) validation. Then, we survey, analyze and categorize ontologies and KG-based approaches for AD. We discuss current research challenges and propose promising future research directions for KG-based solutions for AD.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶是计算机科学中最活跃的研究领域之一。深度学习方法在机器学习，特别是自动驾驶（AD）领域取得了显着的突破。然而，在保证自动化系统的可靠性和安全性方面，仍然存在未解决的问题，特别是如何在驾驶任务中有效地整合所有可用的信息和知识。知识图谱（KG）最近受到工业界和学术界的极大关注，因为它的应用程序可以通过利用结构化、动态和关系数据而受益。图结构数据的复杂性以及对象之间复杂的关系和相互依赖关系对现有的机器学习算法提出了重大挑战。然而，知识图嵌入和图神经网络的最新进展允许将机器学习应用于图结构数据。因此，我们激励并讨论知识图谱应用于 AD 主要任务的潜在好处，包括 1) 本体、2) 感知、3) 场景理解、4) 运动规划和 5) 验证。然后，我们对本体论和基于知识图谱的 AD 方法进行调查、分析和分类。我们讨论了当前的研究挑战，并为基于 KG 的 AD 解决方案提出了有前景的未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了知识图谱（KG）在自动驾驶中的应用方法，分析其在本体构建、感知、场景理解、运动规划和验证等任务中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在自动驾驶中取得进展，但系统可靠性与安全性仍面临挑战，需有效整合多源异构信息，知识图谱的结构化特性为此提供了新思路。
AI.method: 通过文献调研与分类，系统梳理知识图谱在自动驾驶各核心任务中的应用方法，分析现有技术框架与研究空白。
AI.result: 总结了知识图谱嵌入与图神经网络在自动驾驶中的关键技术，指出现有方法在动态数据处理与跨模态融合方面的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱为自动驾驶提供了结构化知识建模的新范式，但需进一步解决实时性、可解释性及与深度学习的协同优化问题。

authors_text: Pei Lv,Xinming Pei,Xinyu Ren,Yuzhen Zhang,Chaochao Li,Mingliang Xu
title: TraInterSim: Adaptive and Planning-Aware Hybrid-Driven Traffic Intersection Simulation
title_zh: TraInterSim：自适应和规划感知的混合驱动交通路口仿真
abstract: Traffic intersections are important scenes that can be seen almost everywhere in the traffic system. Currently, most simulation methods perform well at highways and urban traffic networks. In intersection scenarios, the challenge lies in the lack of clearly defined lanes, where agents with various motion plannings converge in the central area from different directions. Traditional model-based methods are difficult to drive agents to move realistically at intersections without enough predefined lanes, while data-driven methods often require a large amount of high-quality input data. Simultaneously, tedious parameter tuning is inevitable involved to obtain the desired simulation results. In this paper, we present a novel adaptive and planning-aware hybrid-driven method (TraInterSim) to simulate traffic intersection scenarios. Our hybrid-driven method combines an optimization-based data-driven scheme with a velocity continuity model. It guides the agent's movements using real-world data and can generate those behaviors not present in the input data. Our optimization method fully considers velocity continuity, desired speed, direction guidance, and planning-aware collision avoidance. Agents can perceive others' motion planning and relative distance to avoid possible collisions. To preserve the individual flexibility of different agents, the parameters in our method are automatically adjusted during the simulation. TraInterSim can generate realistic behaviors of heterogeneous agents in different traffic intersection scenarios in interactive rates. Through extensive experiments as well as user studies, we validate the effectiveness and rationality of the proposed simulation method.
summary: Traffic intersections are important scenes that can be seen almost everywhere in the traffic system. Currently, most simulation methods perform well at highways and urban traffic networks. In intersection scenarios, the challenge lies in the lack of clearly defined lanes, where agents with various motion plannings converge in the central area from different directions. Traditional model-based methods are difficult to drive agents to move realistically at intersections without enough predefined lanes, while data-driven methods often require a large amount of high-quality input data. Simultaneously, tedious parameter tuning is inevitable involved to obtain the desired simulation results. In this paper, we present a novel adaptive and planning-aware hybrid-driven method (TraInterSim) to simulate traffic intersection scenarios. Our hybrid-driven method combines an optimization-based data-driven scheme with a velocity continuity model. It guides the agent's movements using real-world data and can generate those behaviors not present in the input data. Our optimization method fully considers velocity continuity, desired speed, direction guidance, and planning-aware collision avoidance. Agents can perceive others' motion planning and relative distance to avoid possible collisions. To preserve the individual flexibility of different agents, the parameters in our method are automatically adjusted during the simulation. TraInterSim can generate realistic behaviors of heterogeneous agents in different traffic intersection scenarios in interactive rates. Through extensive experiments as well as user studies, we validate the effectiveness and rationality of the proposed simulation method.
abstract_zh: 交通路口是交通系统中几乎随处可见的重要场景。目前，大多数模拟方法在高速公路和城市交通网络中表现良好。在十字路口场景中，挑战在于缺乏明确定义的车道，具有各种运动规划的智能体从不同方向汇聚到中心区域。传统的基于模型的方法很难在没有足够预定义车道的情况下驱动智能体在交叉口实际移动，而数据驱动的方法通常需要大量高质量的输入数据。同时，为了获得理想的仿真结果，不可避免地需要进行繁琐的参数调整。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应和规划感知混合驱动方法（TraInterSim）来模拟交通路口场景。我们的混合驱动方法将基于优化的数据驱动方案与速度连续性模型相结合。它使用真实世界的数据来指导代理的动作，并可以生成输入数据中不存在的行为。我们的优化方法充分考虑了速度连续性、期望速度、方向引导和规划感知碰撞避免。智能体可以感知其他人的运动规划和相对距离，以避免可能的碰撞。为了保持不同代理的个体灵活性，我们方法中的参数在模拟过程中自动调整。 TraInterSim 可以以交互速率生成不同交通路口场景中异构代理的真实行为。通过大量的实验和用户研究，我们验证了所提出的仿真方法的有效性和合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TraInterSim的新型自适应且具有规划意识的混合驱动交通交叉口模拟方法。
AI.motivation: 目前的交通模拟方法在高速公路和城市交通网络中表现良好，但在交通交叉口场景中面临挑战，因为缺乏明确的车道定义，导致不同方向的代理在中央区域汇聚，难以实现真实运动。
AI.method: 该方法结合了基于优化的数据驱动方案和速度连续性模型，利用真实世界数据引导代理运动，并能生成输入数据中未包含的行为。
AI.result: 通过大量实验和用户研究，验证了所提出的模拟方法的有效性和合理性，能够以交互速率生成不同交通交叉口场景中异构代理的真实行为。
AI.conclusion: TraInterSim方法在交通交叉口模拟中表现出色，能够自适应调整参数并实现真实且灵活的代理行为，为未来交通模拟研究提供了新的思路。

search_text: TraInterSim: Adaptive and Planning-Aware Hybrid-Driven Traffic Intersection Simulation TraInterSim：自适应和规划感知的混合驱动交通路口仿真 Traffic intersections are important scenes that can be seen almost everywhere in the traffic system. Currently, most simulation methods perform well at highways and urban traffic networks. In intersection scenarios, the challenge lies in the lack of clearly defined lanes, where agents with various motion plannings converge in the central area from different directions. Traditional model-based methods are difficult to drive agents to move realistically at intersections without enough predefined lanes, while data-driven methods often require a large amount of high-quality input data. Simultaneously, tedious parameter tuning is inevitable involved to obtain the desired simulation results. In this paper, we present a novel adaptive and planning-aware hybrid-driven method (TraInterSim) to simulate traffic intersection scenarios. Our hybrid-driven method combines an optimization-based data-driven scheme with a velocity continuity model. It guides the agent's movements using real-world data and can generate those behaviors not present in the input data. Our optimization method fully considers velocity continuity, desired speed, direction guidance, and planning-aware collision avoidance. Agents can perceive others' motion planning and relative distance to avoid possible collisions. To preserve the individual flexibility of different agents, the parameters in our method are automatically adjusted during the simulation. TraInterSim can generate realistic behaviors of heterogeneous agents in different traffic intersection scenarios in interactive rates. Through extensive experiments as well as user studies, we validate the effectiveness and rationality of the proposed simulation method. 交通路口是交通系统中几乎随处可见的重要场景。目前，大多数模拟方法在高速公路和城市交通网络中表现良好。在十字路口场景中，挑战在于缺乏明确定义的车道，具有各种运动规划的智能体从不同方向汇聚到中心区域。传统的基于模型的方法很难在没有足够预定义车道的情况下驱动智能体在交叉口实际移动，而数据驱动的方法通常需要大量高质量的输入数据。同时，为了获得理想的仿真结果，不可避免地需要进行繁琐的参数调整。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应和规划感知混合驱动方法（TraInterSim）来模拟交通路口场景。我们的混合驱动方法将基于优化的数据驱动方案与速度连续性模型相结合。它使用真实世界的数据来指导代理的动作，并可以生成输入数据中不存在的行为。我们的优化方法充分考虑了速度连续性、期望速度、方向引导和规划感知碰撞避免。智能体可以感知其他人的运动规划和相对距离，以避免可能的碰撞。为了保持不同代理的个体灵活性，我们方法中的参数在模拟过程中自动调整。 TraInterSim 可以以交互速率生成不同交通路口场景中异构代理的真实行为。通过大量的实验和用户研究，我们验证了所提出的仿真方法的有效性和合理性。 本文提出了一种名为TraInterSim的新型自适应且具有规划意识的混合驱动交通交叉口模拟方法。 Pei Lv,Xinming Pei,Xinyu Ren,Yuzhen Zhang,Chaochao Li,Mingliang Xu cs.RO,cs.GR

authors_text: M. R. Abdollahi,Seid H. Pourtakdoust,M. H. Yoosefian Nooshabadi,H. N. Pishkenari
title: An Improved Multi-State Constraint Kalman Filter for Visual-Inertial Odometry
title_zh: 一种改进的视觉惯性里程计多状态约束卡尔曼滤波器
abstract: Fast pose estimation (PE) is of vital importance for successful mission performance of agile autonomous robots. Global Positioning Systems such as GPS and GNSS have been typically used in fusion with Inertial Navigation Systems (INS) for PE. However, the low update rate and lack of proper signals make their utility impractical for indoor and urban applications. On the other hand, Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) is gaining popularity as a practical alternative for GNSS/INS systems in GPS-denied environments. Among the many VIO-based methods, the Multi-State Constraint Kalman Filter (MSCKF) has received a greater attention due to its robustness, speed and accuracy. To this end, the high computational cost associated with image processing for real-time implementation of MSCKF on resource-constrained vehicles is still a challenging ongoing research. In this paper, an enhanced version of the MSCKF is proposed. To this aim, different feature marginalization and state pruning strategies are suggested that result in a much faster algorithm. The proposed algorithm is tested both on an open-source dataset and in real-world experiments for validation. It is demonstrated that the proposed Fast-MSCKF (FMSCKF) is about six times faster and at least 20% more accurate in final position estimation than the standard MSCKF algorithm.
summary: Fast pose estimation (PE) is of vital importance for successful mission performance of agile autonomous robots. Global Positioning Systems such as GPS and GNSS have been typically used in fusion with Inertial Navigation Systems (INS) for PE. However, the low update rate and lack of proper signals make their utility impractical for indoor and urban applications. On the other hand, Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) is gaining popularity as a practical alternative for GNSS/INS systems in GPS-denied environments. Among the many VIO-based methods, the Multi-State Constraint Kalman Filter (MSCKF) has received a greater attention due to its robustness, speed and accuracy. To this end, the high computational cost associated with image processing for real-time implementation of MSCKF on resource-constrained vehicles is still a challenging ongoing research. In this paper, an enhanced version of the MSCKF is proposed. To this aim, different feature marginalization and state pruning strategies are suggested that result in a much faster algorithm. The proposed algorithm is tested both on an open-source dataset and in real-world experiments for validation. It is demonstrated that the proposed Fast-MSCKF (FMSCKF) is about six times faster and at least 20% more accurate in final position estimation than the standard MSCKF algorithm.
abstract_zh: 快速姿态估计（PE）对于敏捷自主机器人成功执行任务至关重要。 GPS 和 GNSS 等全球定位系统通常与 PE 惯性导航系统 (INS) 结合使用。然而，低更新率和缺乏适当的信号使得它们在室内和城市应用中不切实际。另一方面，视觉惯性里程计 (VIO) 作为 GPS 拒绝环境中 GNSS/INS 系统的实用替代方案越来越受欢迎。在众多基于 VIO 的方法中，多状态约束卡尔曼滤波器（MSCKF）由于其鲁棒性、速度和准确性而受到更多关注。为此，在资源有限的车辆上实时实施 MSCKF 的图像处理相关的高计算成本仍然是一项具有挑战性的正在进行的研究。本文提出了 MSCKF 的增强版本。为此，建议采用不同的特征边缘化和状态修剪策略，从而产生更快的算法。所提出的算法在开源数据集和现实实验中进行了测试以进行验证。结果表明，所提出的 Fast-MSCKF (FMSCKF) 的最终位置估计速度比标准 MSCKF 算法快约六倍，准确度至少提高 20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的多状态约束卡尔曼滤波器（FMSCKF），用于提高视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的实时性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统的GNSS/INS系统在室内和城市环境中不可靠，而视觉惯性里程计（VIO）作为替代方案存在计算成本高的问题，因此需要一种更高效的算法。
AI.method: 本文通过引入不同的特征边缘化和状态剪枝策略，优化了MSCKF算法，从而降低了计算成本并提高了算法速度。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进后的FMSCKF算法比标准MSCKF算法快约六倍，并且最终位置估计的准确性提高了至少20%。
AI.conclusion: FMSCKF算法在保持高精度的同时显著提升了计算效率，为资源受限的自主机器人提供了更实用的视觉惯性里程计解决方案。

authors_text: Md. Nayem Hasan Muntasir,Tariqul Islam Siam,Md. Kamruzzaman Sarker
title: A Low-cost Humanoid Prototype Intended to assist people with disability using Raspberry Pi
title_zh: 旨在使用 Raspberry Pi 帮助残疾人的低成本人形原型
comment: The number of total pages is 8, number of figures is 3, and number of tables is 2
comments: The number of total pages is 8, number of figures is 3, and number of tables is 2
abstract: This paper will try to delineate the making of a Humanoid prototype intended to assist people with disability (PWD). The assistance that this prototype will offer is rather rudimentary. However, our key focus is to make the prototype cost-friendly while pertaining to its humanoid-like functionalities. Considering growing needs of Robots, facilities for further installment of features have been made available in this project. The prototype will be of humanoid shape harnessing the power of Artificial Neural Network (ANN) to converse with the users. The prototype uses a raspberry pi and as the computational capability of a raspberry pi is minimal, we cut corners to squeeze the last drop of performance and make it as efficient as possible.
summary: This paper will try to delineate the making of a Humanoid prototype intended to assist people with disability (PWD). The assistance that this prototype will offer is rather rudimentary. However, our key focus is to make the prototype cost-friendly while pertaining to its humanoid-like functionalities. Considering growing needs of Robots, facilities for further installment of features have been made available in this project. The prototype will be of humanoid shape harnessing the power of Artificial Neural Network (ANN) to converse with the users. The prototype uses a raspberry pi and as the computational capability of a raspberry pi is minimal, we cut corners to squeeze the last drop of performance and make it as efficient as possible.
abstract_zh: 本文将尝试描述旨在帮助残疾人 (PWD) 的人形原型的制作。该原型将提供的帮助相当初级。然而，我们的重点是使原型成本低廉，同时具有类人功能。考虑到机器人日益增长的需求，该项目提供了进一步安装功能的设施。该原型将采用人形形状，利用人工神经网络（ANN）的力量与用户进行对话。该原型使用树莓派，由于树莓派的计算能力很小，我们偷工减料以榨取最后一点性能并使其尽可能高效。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一款基于树莓派的低成本人形机器人原型，旨在通过基础功能辅助残障人士，并保留未来扩展功能的接口。
AI.motivation: 现有助残机器人成本高昂，难以普及。本文旨在开发一种低成本方案，通过简化设计和优化性能，实现基础辅助功能并保留升级潜力。
AI.method: 采用树莓派作为核心计算单元，结合人工神经网络实现基础交互功能，通过性能优化和模块化设计降低硬件成本并支持功能扩展。
AI.result: 成功构建出具备人形外观和基础对话能力的原型机，验证了低成本实现人形机器人可行性的技术路线。
AI.conclusion: 该原型证明了通过硬件优化和功能简化可实现低成本助残机器人，但需进一步提升性能和功能完备性以满足实际需求。

search_text: A Low-cost Humanoid Prototype Intended to assist people with disability using Raspberry Pi 旨在使用 Raspberry Pi 帮助残疾人的低成本人形原型 This paper will try to delineate the making of a Humanoid prototype intended to assist people with disability (PWD). The assistance that this prototype will offer is rather rudimentary. However, our key focus is to make the prototype cost-friendly while pertaining to its humanoid-like functionalities. Considering growing needs of Robots, facilities for further installment of features have been made available in this project. The prototype will be of humanoid shape harnessing the power of Artificial Neural Network (ANN) to converse with the users. The prototype uses a raspberry pi and as the computational capability of a raspberry pi is minimal, we cut corners to squeeze the last drop of performance and make it as efficient as possible. 本文将尝试描述旨在帮助残疾人 (PWD) 的人形原型的制作。该原型将提供的帮助相当初级。然而，我们的重点是使原型成本低廉，同时具有类人功能。考虑到机器人日益增长的需求，该项目提供了进一步安装功能的设施。该原型将采用人形形状，利用人工神经网络（ANN）的力量与用户进行对话。该原型使用树莓派，由于树莓派的计算能力很小，我们偷工减料以榨取最后一点性能并使其尽可能高效。 本文设计了一款基于树莓派的低成本人形机器人原型，旨在通过基础功能辅助残障人士，并保留未来扩展功能的接口。 Md. Nayem Hasan Muntasir,Tariqul Islam Siam,Md. Kamruzzaman Sarker cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Samuel Yanes Luis,Daniel Gutiérrez Reina,Sergio Toral Marín
title: Censored Deep Reinforcement Patrolling with Information Criterion for Monitoring Large Water Resources using Autonomous Surface Vehicles
title_zh: 使用自主地面车辆监测大型水资源的信息标准的审查深度强化巡逻
comment: This article is currently under revision for the Applied Soft Computing Journal (Elsevier)
comments: This article is currently under revision for the Applied Soft Computing Journal (Elsevier)
abstract: Monitoring and patrolling large water resources is a major challenge for conservation. The problem of acquiring data of an underlying environment that usually changes within time involves a proper formulation of the information. The use of Autonomous Surface Vehicles equipped with water quality sensor modules can serve as an early-warning system agents for contamination peak-detection, algae blooms monitoring, or oil-spill scenarios. In addition to information gathering, the vehicle must plan routes that are free of obstacles on non-convex maps. This work proposes a framework to obtain a collision-free policy that addresses the patrolling task for static and dynamic scenarios. Using information gain as a measure of the uncertainty reduction over data, it is proposed a Deep Q-Learning algorithm improved by a Q-Censoring mechanism for model-based obstacle avoidance. The obtained results demonstrate the usefulness of the proposed algorithm for water resource monitoring for static and dynamic scenarios. Simulations showed the use of noise-networks are a good choice for enhanced exploration, with 3 times less redundancy in the paths. Previous coverage strategies are also outperformed both in the accuracy of the obtained contamination model by a 13% on average and by a 37% in the detection of dangerous contamination peaks. Finally, these results indicate the appropriateness of the proposed framework for monitoring scenarios with autonomous vehicles.

The obtained results demonstrate the usefulness of the proposed algorithm for water resource monitoring for static and dynamic scenarios. abstract_zh: 监测和巡逻大量水资源是保护的一项重大挑战。获取通常随时间变化的底层环境的数据的问题涉及信息的正确表述。使用配备水质传感器模块的自主水面车辆可以作为污染峰值检测、藻华监测或漏油情况的预警系统代理。除了信息收集之外，车辆还必须在非凸地图上规划无障碍的路线。这项工作提出了一个框架来获得无碰撞策略，解决静态和动态场景的巡逻任务。使用信息增益作为数据不确定性减少的衡量标准，提出了一种通过 Q 审查机制改进的深度 Q 学习算法，用于基于模型的避障。获得的结果证明了所提出的算法在静态和动态场景水资源监测中的有用性。模拟表明，使用噪声网络是增强探索的良好选择，路径中的冗余减少了 3 倍。之前的覆盖策略在获得的污染模型的准确度方面也优于以前的覆盖策略，平均准确度高出 13%，在危险污染峰值检测方面也优于以前的覆盖策略 37%。最后，这些结果表明所提出的框架对于自动驾驶车辆监控场景的适当性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习与信息准则的自主水面船舶巡逻框架，用于大范围水资源监测中的障碍物规避与动态环境适应。
AI.motivation: 大型水资源监测面临环境动态变化与障碍物规避的双重挑战，传统方法在数据采集效率与污染峰值检测精度上存在不足。
AI.method: 基于信息增益设计深度Q学习算法，引入Q-屏蔽机制实现模型驱动的障碍物规避，并通过噪声网络增强探索效率。
AI.result: 仿真显示路径冗余减少3倍，污染模型精度提升13%，危险峰值检测率提高37%，优于传统覆盖策略。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了动态复杂环境下的自主巡逻问题，为水资源污染监测提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Marcel Seelbach Benkner,Maximilian Krahn,Edith Tretschk,Zorah Lähner,Michael Moeller,Vladislav Golyanik
title: QuAnt: Quantum Annealing with Learnt Couplings
title_zh: QuAnt：使用学习耦合的量子退火
abstract: Modern quantum annealers can find high-quality solutions to combinatorial optimisation objectives given as quadratic unconstrained binary optimisation (QUBO) problems. Unfortunately, obtaining suitable QUBO forms in computer vision remains challenging and currently requires problem-specific analytical derivations. Moreover, such explicit formulations impose tangible constraints on solution encodings. In stark contrast to prior work, this paper proposes to learn QUBO forms from data through gradient backpropagation instead of deriving them. As a result, the solution encodings can be chosen flexibly and compactly. Furthermore, our methodology is general and virtually independent of the specifics of the target problem type. We demonstrate the advantages of learnt QUBOs on the diverse problem types of graph matching, 2D point cloud alignment and 3D rotation estimation. Our results are competitive with the previous quantum state of the art while requiring much fewer logical and physical qubits, enabling our method to scale to larger problems. The code and the new dataset will be open-sourced.
summary: Modern quantum annealers can find high-quality solutions to combinatorial optimisation objectives given as quadratic unconstrained binary optimisation (QUBO) problems. Unfortunately, obtaining suitable QUBO forms in computer vision remains challenging and currently requires problem-specific analytical derivations. Moreover, such explicit formulations impose tangible constraints on solution encodings. In stark contrast to prior work, this paper proposes to learn QUBO forms from data through gradient backpropagation instead of deriving them. As a result, the solution encodings can be chosen flexibly and compactly. Furthermore, our methodology is general and virtually independent of the specifics of the target problem type. We demonstrate the advantages of learnt QUBOs on the diverse problem types of graph matching, 2D point cloud alignment and 3D rotation estimation. Our results are competitive with the previous quantum state of the art while requiring much fewer logical and physical qubits, enabling our method to scale to larger problems. The code and the new dataset will be open-sourced.
abstract_zh: 现代量子退火器可以找到以二次无约束二元优化 (QUBO) 问题形式给出的组合优化目标的高质量解决方案。不幸的是，在计算机视觉中获得合适的 QUBO 形式仍然具有挑战性，目前需要针对特定​​问题的分析推导。此外，这种明确的表述对解决方案编码施加了切实的限制。与之前的工作形成鲜明对比的是，本文提出通过梯度反向传播从数据中学习 QUBO 形式，而不是推导它们。因此，可以灵活、紧凑地选择解编码。此外，我们的方法是通用的，几乎独立于目标问题类型的具体情况。我们展示了学习的 QUBO 在图形匹配、2D 点云对齐和 3D 旋转估计等不同问题类型上的优势。我们的结果与之前的量子技术相比具有竞争力，同时需要更少的逻辑和物理量子位，使我们的方法能够扩展到更大的问题。代码和新数据集将开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过梯度反向传播学习QUBO形式的方法，用于量子退火在计算机视觉中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统QUBO形式的构建依赖问题特定的分析推导，过程复杂且限制了解码方式，难以适应多样化问题。
AI.method: 采用梯度反向传播从数据中学习QUBO耦合参数，无需显式推导，实现灵活紧凑的解码编码。
AI.result: 在图匹配、点云对齐和3D旋转估计任务中，性能与量子计算前沿方法相当，但所需逻辑和物理量子比特更少。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有通用性，可扩展至更大规模问题，代码和数据集将开源促进后续研究。

Our results are competitive with the previous quantum state of the art while requiring much fewer logical and physical qubits, enabling our method to scale to larger problems. The code and the new dataset will be open-sourced. 现代量子退火器可以找到以二次无约束二元优化 (QUBO) 问题形式给出的组合优化目标的高质量解决方案。不幸的是，在计算机视觉中获得合适的 QUBO 形式仍然具有挑战性，目前需要针对特定​​问题的分析推导。此外，这种明确的表述对解决方案编码施加了切实的限制。与之前的工作形成鲜明对比的是，本文提出通过梯度反向传播从数据中学习 QUBO 形式，而不是推导它们。因此，可以灵活、紧凑地选择解编码。此外，我们的方法是通用的，几乎独立于目标问题类型的具体情况。我们展示了学习的 QUBO 在图形匹配、2D 点云对齐和 3D 旋转估计等不同问题类型上的优势。我们的结果与之前的量子技术相比具有竞争力，同时需要更少的逻辑和物理量子位，使我们的方法能够扩展到更大的问题。代码和新数据集将开源。 本文提出一种通过梯度反向传播学习QUBO形式的方法，用于量子退火在计算机视觉中的应用。 Marcel Seelbach Benkner,Maximilian Krahn,Edith Tretschk,Zorah Lähner,Michael Moeller,Vladislav Golyanik quant-ph,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Alex Zihao Zhu,Vincent Casser,Reza Mahjourian,Henrik Kretzschmar,Sören Pirk
title: Instance Segmentation with Cross-Modal Consistency
title_zh: 具有跨模态一致性的实例分割
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables. Presented at IROS 2022
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables. Presented at IROS 2022
abstract: Segmenting object instances is a key task in machine perception, with safety-critical applications in robotics and autonomous driving. We introduce a novel approach to instance segmentation that jointly leverages measurements from multiple sensor modalities, such as cameras and LiDAR. Our method learns to predict embeddings for each pixel or point that give rise to a dense segmentation of the scene. Specifically, our technique applies contrastive learning to points in the scene both across sensor modalities and the temporal domain. We demonstrate that this formulation encourages the models to learn embeddings that are invariant to viewpoint variations and consistent across sensor modalities. We further demonstrate that the embeddings are stable over time as objects move around the scene. This not only provides stable instance masks, but can also provide valuable signals to downstream tasks, such as object tracking. We evaluate our method on the Cityscapes and KITTI-360 datasets. We further conduct a number of ablation studies, demonstrating benefits when applying additional inputs for the contrastive loss.
summary: Segmenting object instances is a key task in machine perception, with safety-critical applications in robotics and autonomous driving. We introduce a novel approach to instance segmentation that jointly leverages measurements from multiple sensor modalities, such as cameras and LiDAR. Our method learns to predict embeddings for each pixel or point that give rise to a dense segmentation of the scene. Specifically, our technique applies contrastive learning to points in the scene both across sensor modalities and the temporal domain. We demonstrate that this formulation encourages the models to learn embeddings that are invariant to viewpoint variations and consistent across sensor modalities. We further demonstrate that the embeddings are stable over time as objects move around the scene. This not only provides stable instance masks, but can also provide valuable signals to downstream tasks, such as object tracking. We evaluate our method on the Cityscapes and KITTI-360 datasets. We further conduct a number of ablation studies, demonstrating benefits when applying additional inputs for the contrastive loss.
abstract_zh: 分割对象实例是机器感知中的一项关键任务，在机器人和自动驾驶中具有安全关键的应用。我们引入了一种新颖的实例分割方法，该方法联合利用来自多种传感器模式（例如相机和激光雷达）的测量结果。我们的方法学习预测每个像素或点的嵌入，从而产生场景的密集分割。具体来说，我们的技术将对比学习应用于跨传感器模式和时域的场景中的点。我们证明，这种公式鼓励模型学习对视点变化不变且跨传感器模式一致的嵌入。我们进一步证明，当对象在场景中移动时，嵌入随着时间的推移是稳定的。这不仅提供稳定的实例掩码，还可以为下游任务（例如对象跟踪）提供有价值的信号。我们在 Cityscapes 和 KITTI-360 数据集上评估我们的方法。我们进一步进行了一些消融研究，证明了对对比损失应用额外输入时的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用多传感器模态（如摄像头和LiDAR）进行实例分割的新方法，通过跨模态对比学习生成稳定的场景分割嵌入。
AI.motivation: 实例分割在机器人和自动驾驶等安全关键领域至关重要，但现有方法在多模态数据和动态场景下的鲁棒性不足，需提升跨传感器和时序的一致性。
AI.method: 通过对比学习对场景中的点进行跨传感器模态和时序域的嵌入学习，生成像素或点的密集分割结果，并验证嵌入对视角变化和传感器模态的不变性及时序稳定性。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和KITTI-360数据集上验证了方法有效性，证明嵌入在跨模态和时序上的一致性，并通过消融实验展示了对比损失中额外输入的益处。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过跨模态一致性学习实现了稳定实例分割，为下游任务（如目标跟踪）提供了可靠信号，验证了多模态对比学习在复杂场景中的潜力。

authors_text: Yu-Ming Chen,Gabriel Nelson,Robert Griffin,Michael Posa,Jerry Pratt
title: Integrable Whole-body Orientation Coordinates for Legged Robots
title_zh: 腿式机器人的可集成全身方向坐标
abstract: Complex multibody legged robots can have complex rotational control challenges. In this paper, we propose a concise way to understand and formulate a \emph{whole-body orientation} that (i) depends on system configuration only and not a history of motion, (ii) can be representative of the orientation of the entire system while not being attached to any specific link, and (iii) has a rate of change that approximates total system angular momentum. We relate this orientation coordinate to past work, and discuss and demonstrate, including on hardware, several different uses for it.
summary: Complex multibody legged robots can have complex rotational control challenges. In this paper, we propose a concise way to understand and formulate a \emph{whole-body orientation} that (i) depends on system configuration only and not a history of motion, (ii) can be representative of the orientation of the entire system while not being attached to any specific link, and (iii) has a rate of change that approximates total system angular momentum. We relate this orientation coordinate to past work, and discuss and demonstrate, including on hardware, several different uses for it.
abstract_zh: 复杂的多体腿机器人可能面临复杂的旋转控制挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种简洁的方法来理解和制定\emph{全身方向}，它（i）仅取决于系统配置而不是运动历史，（ii）可以代表整个系统的方向而不附加到任何特定链接，并且（iii）具有近似总系统角动量的变化率。我们将这个方向坐标与过去的工作联系起来，并讨论和演示它的几种不同用途，包括在硬件上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可积的全身方向坐标系统，用于解决腿足机器人复杂的旋转控制问题。
AI.motivation: 复杂多体腿足机器人在旋转控制中存在挑战，需一种不依赖运动历史且能表征整体方向的坐标系统。
AI.method: 提出基于系统构型的全身方向坐标，其变化率近似总角动量，并与既有研究关联，通过硬件实验验证。
AI.result: 在硬件平台上成功演示了该坐标系统在控制与运动规划中的多种应用效果。
AI.conclusion: 该坐标系统为腿足机器人的动态控制与规划提供了新的理论工具和实践方法。

authors_text: Shamak Dutta,Nils Wilde,Pratap Tokekar,Stephen L. Smith
title: Approximation Algorithms for Robot Tours in Random Fields with Guaranteed Estimation Accuracy
title_zh: 保证估计精度的随机场机器人巡游近似算法
abstract: We study the sample placement and shortest tour problem for robots tasked with mapping environmental phenomena modeled as stationary random fields. The objective is to minimize the resources used (samples or tour length) while guaranteeing estimation accuracy. We give approximation algorithms for both problems in convex environments. These improve previously known results, both in terms of theoretical guarantees and in simulations. In addition, we disprove an existing claim in the literature on a lower bound for a solution to the sample placement problem.
summary: We study the sample placement and shortest tour problem for robots tasked with mapping environmental phenomena modeled as stationary random fields. The objective is to minimize the resources used (samples or tour length) while guaranteeing estimation accuracy. We give approximation algorithms for both problems in convex environments. These improve previously known results, both in terms of theoretical guarantees and in simulations. In addition, we disprove an existing claim in the literature on a lower bound for a solution to the sample placement problem.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了机器人的样本放置和最短路径问题，该机器人的任务是绘制建模为平稳随机场的环境现象。目标是最大限度地减少所使用的资源（样本或游览长度），同时保证估计准确性。我们给出了凸环境中这两个问题的近似算法。这些在理论保证和模拟方面都改进了先前已知的结果。此外，我们反驳了文献中关于样本放置问题解决方案下限的现有主张。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在随机场中机器人路径规划问题，旨在通过优化采样点布置和最短路径算法，在保证估计精度的前提下最小化资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 环境监测等应用需要机器人高效采集数据，同时确保估计精度，但现有算法在资源消耗与精度保障之间存在矛盾，需改进理论保证与实际性能。
AI.method: 提出凸区域环境下的近似算法，结合采样点布置与路径优化，通过理论分析与仿真验证改进效果，并推翻了文献中关于采样问题下界的一个结论。
AI.result: 算法在理论保证和仿真测试中均优于现有方法，同时证明了先前关于采样问题下界结论的错误性。
AI.conclusion: 新算法有效平衡了资源消耗与估计精度，为随机场环境下的机器人路径规划提供了更优解决方案，并修正了领域内相关理论误区。

tldr: 本文研究了在随机场中机器人路径规划问题，旨在通过优化采样点布置和最短路径算法，在保证估计精度的前提下最小化资源消耗。
motivation: 环境监测等应用需要机器人高效采集数据，同时确保估计精度，但现有算法在资源消耗与精度保障之间存在矛盾，需改进理论保证与实际性能。
method: 提出凸区域环境下的近似算法，结合采样点布置与路径优化，通过理论分析与仿真验证改进效果，并推翻了文献中关于采样问题下界的一个结论。
result: 算法在理论保证和仿真测试中均优于现有方法，同时证明了先前关于采样问题下界结论的错误性。
conclusion: 新算法有效平衡了资源消耗与估计精度，为随机场环境下的机器人路径规划提供了更优解决方案，并修正了领域内相关理论误区。
search_text: Approximation Algorithms for Robot Tours in Random Fields with Guaranteed Estimation Accuracy 保证估计精度的随机场机器人巡游近似算法 We study the sample placement and shortest tour problem for robots tasked with mapping environmental phenomena modeled as stationary random fields. The objective is to minimize the resources used (samples or tour length) while guaranteeing estimation accuracy. We give approximation algorithms for both problems in convex environments. These improve previously known results, both in terms of theoretical guarantees and in simulations. In addition, we disprove an existing claim in the literature on a lower bound for a solution to the sample placement problem. 我们研究了机器人的样本放置和最短路径问题，该机器人的任务是绘制建模为平稳随机场的环境现象。目标是最大限度地减少所使用的资源（样本或游览长度），同时保证估计准确性。我们给出了凸环境中这两个问题的近似算法。这些在理论保证和模拟方面都改进了先前已知的结果。此外，我们反驳了文献中关于样本放置问题解决方案下限的现有主张。 本文研究了在随机场中机器人路径规划问题，旨在通过优化采样点布置和最短路径算法，在保证估计精度的前提下最小化资源消耗。 Shamak Dutta,Nils Wilde,Pratap Tokekar,Stephen L. Smith cs.RO

authors_text: Arsalan Motamedi,Pooya Ronagh
title: Gibbs Sampling of Continuous Potentials on a Quantum Computer
title_zh: 量子计算机上连续势的吉布斯采样
comment: 50 pages, version accepted in ICML 2024 / PMLR
comments: 50 pages, version accepted in ICML 2024 / PMLR
abstract: Gibbs sampling from continuous real-valued functions is a challenging problem of interest in machine learning. Here we leverage quantum Fourier transforms to build a quantum algorithm for this task when the function is periodic. We use the quantum algorithms for solving linear ordinary differential equations to solve the Fokker--Planck equation and prepare a quantum state encoding the Gibbs distribution. We show that the efficiency of interpolation and differentiation of these functions on a quantum computer depends on the rate of decay of the Fourier coefficients of the Fourier transform of the function. We view this property as a concentration of measure in the Fourier domain, and also provide functional analytic conditions for it. Our algorithm makes zeroeth order queries to a quantum oracle of the function. Despite suffering from an exponentially long mixing time, this algorithm allows for exponentially improved precision in sampling, and polynomial quantum speedups in mean estimation in the general case, and particularly under geometric conditions we identify for the critical points of the energy function.
summary: Gibbs sampling from continuous real-valued functions is a challenging problem of interest in machine learning. Here we leverage quantum Fourier transforms to build a quantum algorithm for this task when the function is periodic. We use the quantum algorithms for solving linear ordinary differential equations to solve the Fokker--Planck equation and prepare a quantum state encoding the Gibbs distribution. We show that the efficiency of interpolation and differentiation of these functions on a quantum computer depends on the rate of decay of the Fourier coefficients of the Fourier transform of the function. We view this property as a concentration of measure in the Fourier domain, and also provide functional analytic conditions for it. Our algorithm makes zeroeth order queries to a quantum oracle of the function. Despite suffering from an exponentially long mixing time, this algorithm allows for exponentially improved precision in sampling, and polynomial quantum speedups in mean estimation in the general case, and particularly under geometric conditions we identify for the critical points of the energy function.
abstract_zh: 从连续实值函数中进行吉布斯采样是机器学习中一个具有挑战性的问题。在这里，当函数是周期性的时，我们利用量子傅立叶变换来构建用于此任务的量子算法。我们使用求解线性常微分方程的量子算法来求解福克-普朗克方程并准备编码吉布斯分布的量子态。我们证明，量子计算机上这些函数的插值和微分效率取决于函数傅里叶变换的傅里叶系数的衰减率。我们将这一性质视为傅立叶域中测度的集中，并为其提供了泛函分析条件。我们的算法对函数的量子预言进行零阶查询。尽管混合时间呈指数级增长，但该算法允许指数级提高采样精度，并在一般情况下实现均值估计的多项式量子加速，特别是在我们确定能量函数临界点的几何条件下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量子傅里叶变换和线性微分方程求解算法的量子方法，用于对周期性连续函数进行Gibbs采样。
AI.motivation: 传统Gibbs采样在处理连续函数时面临效率瓶颈，而量子计算可能提供指数级加速，尤其在函数具有周期性特征时。
AI.method: 利用量子傅里叶变换处理周期性函数，结合求解线性常微分方程的量子算法求解Fokker-Planck方程，通过零阶量子预言机实现分布制备。
AI.result: 算法在采样精度上实现指数级提升，均值估计获得多项式加速，且在能量函数临界点满足特定几何条件时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在特定条件下显著优于经典算法，但需进一步解决指数级混合时间带来的实际限制。

authors_text: Swapna Thorve,Young Yun Baek,Samarth Swarup,Henning Mortveit,Achla Marathe,Anil Vullikanti,Madhav Marathe
title: High-resolution synthetic residential energy use profiles for the United States
title_zh: 美国高分辨率综合住宅能源使用概况
comment: The paper has been accepted for publication in Nature Scientific Data
comments: The paper has been accepted for publication in Nature Scientific Data
abstract: Efficient energy consumption is crucial for achieving sustainable energy goals in the era of climate change and grid modernization. Thus, it is vital to understand how energy is consumed at finer resolutions such as household in order to plan demand-response events or analyze the impacts of weather, electricity prices, electric vehicles, solar, and occupancy schedules on energy consumption. However, availability and access to detailed energy-use data, which would enable detailed studies, has been rare. In this paper, we release a unique, large-scale, synthetic, residential energy-use dataset for the residential sector across the contiguous United States covering millions of households. The data comprise of hourly energy use profiles for synthetic households, disaggregated into Thermostatically Controlled Loads (TCL) and appliance use. The underlying framework is constructed using a bottom-up approach. Diverse open-source surveys and first principles models are used for end-use modeling. Extensive validation of the synthetic dataset has been conducted through comparisons with reported energy-use data. We present a detailed, open, high-resolution, residential energy-use dataset for the United States.
summary: Efficient energy consumption is crucial for achieving sustainable energy goals in the era of climate change and grid modernization. Thus, it is vital to understand how energy is consumed at finer resolutions such as household in order to plan demand-response events or analyze the impacts of weather, electricity prices, electric vehicles, solar, and occupancy schedules on energy consumption. However, availability and access to detailed energy-use data, which would enable detailed studies, has been rare. In this paper, we release a unique, large-scale, synthetic, residential energy-use dataset for the residential sector across the contiguous United States covering millions of households. The data comprise of hourly energy use profiles for synthetic households, disaggregated into Thermostatically Controlled Loads (TCL) and appliance use. The underlying framework is constructed using a bottom-up approach. Diverse open-source surveys and first principles models are used for end-use modeling. Extensive validation of the synthetic dataset has been conducted through comparisons with reported energy-use data. We present a detailed, open, high-resolution, residential energy-use dataset for the United States.
abstract_zh: 在气候变化和电网现代化时代，高效能源消耗对于实现可持续能源目标至关重要。因此，了解更精细的分辨率（例如家庭）如何消耗能源至关重要，以便规划需求响应事件或分析天气、电价、电动汽车、太阳能和占用时间表对能源消耗的影响。 However, availability and access to detailed energy-use data, which would enable detailed studies, has been rare.在本文中，我们发布了一个独特的、大规模的、综合的住宅能源使用数据集，适用于美国本土的住宅部门，涵盖数百万家庭。这些数据包括综合家庭每小时的能源使用情况，分为恒温控制负载 (TCL) 和电器使用。底层框架是使用自下而上的方法构建的。各种开源调查和第一原理模型用于最终用途建模。通过与报告的能源使用数据进行比较，对合成数据集进行了广泛的验证。 We present a detailed, open, high-resolution, residential energy-use dataset for the United States.

AI.tldr: 本文旨在创建一个覆盖美国本土数百万户家庭的高分辨率合成住宅能源使用数据集，包含每小时能源使用概况及细分负荷类型。
AI.motivation: 为实现可持续能源目标，需在家庭层面分析能源消耗影响因素（如天气、电价等），但实际细粒度数据获取困难，亟需合成数据支持研究。
AI.method: 采用自下而上方法，整合开源调查数据与第一性原理模型构建终端负荷模型，并通过对比实际能源数据验证合成数据集可靠性。
AI.result: 生成包含数百万户家庭每小时能源使用数据的开放数据集，涵盖恒温器控制负荷与电器使用细分，经验证符合实际能源使用特征。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为能源需求响应策略制定、天气电价影响分析等研究提供关键基础，推动美国住宅能源消耗的精细化研究与可持续发展实践。

authors_text: Alex Szorkovszky,Frank Veenstra,Kyrre Glette
title: Central pattern generators evolved for real-time adaptation to rhythmic stimuli
title_zh: 中枢模式发生器的进化可以实时适应节奏刺激
abstract: For a robot to be both autonomous and collaborative requires the ability to adapt its movement to a variety of external stimuli, whether these come from humans or other robots. Typically, legged robots have oscillation periods explicitly defined as a control parameter, limiting the adaptability of walking gaits. Here we demonstrate a virtual quadruped robot employing a bio-inspired central pattern generator (CPG) that can spontaneously synchronize its movement to a range of rhythmic stimuli. Multi-objective evolutionary algorithms were used to optimize the variation of movement speed and direction as a function of the brain stem drive and the center of mass control respectively. This was followed by optimization of an additional layer of neurons that filters fluctuating inputs. As a result, a range of CPGs were able to adjust their gait pattern and/or frequency to match the input period. We show how this can be used to facilitate coordinated movement despite differences in morphology, as well as to learn new movement patterns.
summary: For a robot to be both autonomous and collaborative requires the ability to adapt its movement to a variety of external stimuli, whether these come from humans or other robots. Typically, legged robots have oscillation periods explicitly defined as a control parameter, limiting the adaptability of walking gaits. Here we demonstrate a virtual quadruped robot employing a bio-inspired central pattern generator (CPG) that can spontaneously synchronize its movement to a range of rhythmic stimuli. Multi-objective evolutionary algorithms were used to optimize the variation of movement speed and direction as a function of the brain stem drive and the center of mass control respectively. This was followed by optimization of an additional layer of neurons that filters fluctuating inputs. As a result, a range of CPGs were able to adjust their gait pattern and/or frequency to match the input period. We show how this can be used to facilitate coordinated movement despite differences in morphology, as well as to learn new movement patterns.
abstract_zh: 对于机器人来说，要具有自主性和协作性，就需要能够使其运动适应各种外部刺激，无论这些刺激来自人类还是其他机器人。通常，腿式机器人的振荡周期被明确定义为控制参数，限制了行走步态的适应性。在这里，我们演示了一个虚拟四足机器人，它采用仿生中央模式发生器（CPG），可以自发地将其运动与一系列有节奏的刺激同步。使用多目标进化算法来优化运动速度和方向的变化，分别作为脑干驱动和质量控制中心的函数。接下来是过滤波动输入的附加神经元层的优化。因此，一系列 CPG 能够调整其步态模式和/或频率以匹配输入周期。我们展示了如何利用它来促进协调运​​动，尽管形态存在差异，以及学习新的运动模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生物启发的中央模式发生器（CPG），使四足机器人能够实时适应各种节奏刺激，提升运动灵活性。
AI.motivation: 传统腿式机器人步态适应性差，需显式定义振荡周期，难以应对动态协作需求。
AI.method: 采用多目标进化算法优化CPG参数，结合神经网络过滤输入波动，实现步态频率与模式的自适应调整。
AI.result: CPG可匹配不同节奏输入，支持形态差异下的协调运动，并具备学习新运动模式的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人自主协作提供了新型控制框架，增强了复杂环境下的适应性与灵活性。

search_text: Central pattern generators evolved for real-time adaptation to rhythmic stimuli 中枢模式发生器的进化可以实时适应节奏刺激 For a robot to be both autonomous and collaborative requires the ability to adapt its movement to a variety of external stimuli, whether these come from humans or other robots. Typically, legged robots have oscillation periods explicitly defined as a control parameter, limiting the adaptability of walking gaits. Here we demonstrate a virtual quadruped robot employing a bio-inspired central pattern generator (CPG) that can spontaneously synchronize its movement to a range of rhythmic stimuli. Multi-objective evolutionary algorithms were used to optimize the variation of movement speed and direction as a function of the brain stem drive and the center of mass control respectively. This was followed by optimization of an additional layer of neurons that filters fluctuating inputs. As a result, a range of CPGs were able to adjust their gait pattern and/or frequency to match the input period. We show how this can be used to facilitate coordinated movement despite differences in morphology, as well as to learn new movement patterns. 对于机器人来说，要具有自主性和协作性，就需要能够使其运动适应各种外部刺激，无论这些刺激来自人类还是其他机器人。通常，腿式机器人的振荡周期被明确定义为控制参数，限制了行走步态的适应性。在这里，我们演示了一个虚拟四足机器人，它采用仿生中央模式发生器（CPG），可以自发地将其运动与一系列有节奏的刺激同步。使用多目标进化算法来优化运动速度和方向的变化，分别作为脑干驱动和质量控制中心的函数。接下来是过滤波动输入的附加神经元层的优化。因此，一系列 CPG 能够调整其步态模式和/或频率以匹配输入周期。我们展示了如何利用它来促进协调运​​动，尽管形态存在差异，以及学习新的运动模式。 本文提出一种基于生物启发的中央模式发生器（CPG），使四足机器人能够实时适应各种节奏刺激，提升运动灵活性。 Alex Szorkovszky,Frank Veenstra,Kyrre Glette cs.RO,nlin.AO

authors_text: Samuel Felipe dos Santos,Rodrigo Berriel,Thiago Oliveira-Santos,Nicu Sebe,Jurandy Almeida
title: Budget-Aware Pruning for Multi-Domain Learning
title_zh: 多领域学习的预算感知修剪
comment: ef:22nd International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP'23), 2023, pp. 477-489
comments: ef:22nd International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP'23), 2023, pp. 477-489
abstract: Deep learning has achieved state-of-the-art performance on several computer vision tasks and domains. Nevertheless, it still has a high computational cost and demands a significant amount of parameters. Such requirements hinder the use in resource-limited environments and demand both software and hardware optimization. Another limitation is that deep models are usually specialized into a single domain or task, requiring them to learn and store new parameters for each new one. Multi-Domain Learning (MDL) attempts to solve this problem by learning a single model that is capable of performing well in multiple domains. Nevertheless, the models are usually larger than the baseline for a single domain. This work tackles both of these problems: our objective is to prune models capable of handling multiple domains according to a user defined budget, making them more computationally affordable while keeping a similar classification performance. We achieve this by encouraging all domains to use a similar subset of filters from the baseline model, up to the amount defined by the user's budget. Then, filters that are not used by any domain are pruned from the network. The proposed approach innovates by better adapting to resource-limited devices while, to our knowledge, being the only work that is capable of handling multiple domains at test time with fewer parameters and lower computational complexity than the baseline model for a single domain.
summary: Deep learning has achieved state-of-the-art performance on several computer vision tasks and domains. Nevertheless, it still has a high computational cost and demands a significant amount of parameters. Such requirements hinder the use in resource-limited environments and demand both software and hardware optimization. Another limitation is that deep models are usually specialized into a single domain or task, requiring them to learn and store new parameters for each new one. Multi-Domain Learning (MDL) attempts to solve this problem by learning a single model that is capable of performing well in multiple domains. Nevertheless, the models are usually larger than the baseline for a single domain. This work tackles both of these problems: our objective is to prune models capable of handling multiple domains according to a user defined budget, making them more computationally affordable while keeping a similar classification performance. We achieve this by encouraging all domains to use a similar subset of filters from the baseline model, up to the amount defined by the user's budget. Then, filters that are not used by any domain are pruned from the network. The proposed approach innovates by better adapting to resource-limited devices while, to our knowledge, being the only work that is capable of handling multiple domains at test time with fewer parameters and lower computational complexity than the baseline model for a single domain.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在多个计算机视觉任务和领域取得了最先进的性能。尽管如此，它仍然具有较高的计算成本并且需要大量的参数。这些要求阻碍了在资源有限的环境中的使用，并且需要软件和硬件的优化。另一个限制是深度模型通常专门针对单个领域或任务，要求它们为每个新领域或任务学习和存储新参数。多领域学习（MDL）试图通过学习能够在多个领域表现良好的单一模型来解决这个问题。然而，这些模型通常大于单个域的基线。这项工作解决了这两个问题：我们的目标是根据用户定义的预算修剪能够处理多个域的模型，使它们在计算上更加经济实惠，同时保持类似的分类性能。我们通过鼓励所有领域使用基线模型中类似的过滤器子集来实现这一目标，最高可达用户预算定义的数量。然后，不被任何域使用的过滤器将从网络中删除。所提出的方法通过更好地适应资源有限的设备而进行创新，同时据我们所知，它是唯一能够在测试时处理多个域的工作，并且比单个域的基线模型具有更少的参数和更低的计算复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种预算感知的剪枝方法，用于多领域学习，以减少计算成本同时保持分类性能。
AI.motivation: 深度模型计算成本高且参数多，难以部署在资源受限设备；同时现有模型通常针对单一领域，多领域模型虽能跨领域但参数规模更大，需解决资源与性能的矛盾。
AI.method: 通过鼓励各领域共享基线模型的滤波器子集，根据用户预算修剪未被任何领域使用的滤波器，从而降低参数量和计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在保持分类性能的前提下，模型参数量和计算复杂度低于单一领域基线模型，且能同时处理多个领域任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了资源限制与多领域适应性，是首个在测试阶段实现多领域低参数、低复杂度的剪枝方案。

search_text: Budget-Aware Pruning for Multi-Domain Learning 多领域学习的预算感知修剪 Deep learning has achieved state-of-the-art performance on several computer vision tasks and domains. Nevertheless, it still has a high computational cost and demands a significant amount of parameters. Such requirements hinder the use in resource-limited environments and demand both software and hardware optimization. Another limitation is that deep models are usually specialized into a single domain or task, requiring them to learn and store new parameters for each new one. Multi-Domain Learning (MDL) attempts to solve this problem by learning a single model that is capable of performing well in multiple domains. Nevertheless, the models are usually larger than the baseline for a single domain. This work tackles both of these problems: our objective is to prune models capable of handling multiple domains according to a user defined budget, making them more computationally affordable while keeping a similar classification performance. We achieve this by encouraging all domains to use a similar subset of filters from the baseline model, up to the amount defined by the user's budget. Then, filters that are not used by any domain are pruned from the network. The proposed approach innovates by better adapting to resource-limited devices while, to our knowledge, being the only work that is capable of handling multiple domains at test time with fewer parameters and lower computational complexity than the baseline model for a single domain. 深度学习在多个计算机视觉任务和领域取得了最先进的性能。尽管如此，它仍然具有较高的计算成本并且需要大量的参数。这些要求阻碍了在资源有限的环境中的使用，并且需要软件和硬件的优化。另一个限制是深度模型通常专门针对单个领域或任务，要求它们为每个新领域或任务学习和存储新参数。多领域学习（MDL）试图通过学习能够在多个领域表现良好的单一模型来解决这个问题。然而，这些模型通常大于单个域的基线。这项工作解决了这两个问题：我们的目标是根据用户定义的预算修剪能够处理多个域的模型，使它们在计算上更加经济实惠，同时保持类似的分类性能。我们通过鼓励所有领域使用基线模型中类似的过滤器子集来实现这一目标，最高可达用户预算定义的数量。然后，不被任何域使用的过滤器将从网络中删除。所提出的方法通过更好地适应资源有限的设备而进行创新，同时据我们所知，它是唯一能够在测试时处理多个域的工作，并且比单个域的基线模型具有更少的参数和更低的计算复杂性。 本文提出一种预算感知的剪枝方法，用于多领域学习，以减少计算成本同时保持分类性能。 Samuel Felipe dos Santos,Rodrigo Berriel,Thiago Oliveira-Santos,Nicu Sebe,Jurandy Almeida cs.CV

authors_text: Guanqun Yang,Mirazul Haque,Qiaochu Song,Wei Yang,Xueqing Liu
title: TestAug: A Framework for Augmenting Capability-based NLP Tests
title_zh: TestAug：增强基于能力的 NLP 测试的框架
comment: Accepted by COLING 2022; Presentation Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X0p8J57qxeg; Website: https://guanqun-yang.github.io/testaug/; GitHub: https://github.com/guanqun-yang/testaug
comments: Accepted by COLING 2022; Presentation Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X0p8J57qxeg; Website: https://guanqun-yang.github.io/testaug/; GitHub: https://github.com/guanqun-yang/testaug
abstract: The recently proposed capability-based NLP testing allows model developers to test the functional capabilities of NLP models, revealing functional failures that cannot be detected by the traditional heldout mechanism. However, existing work on capability-based testing requires extensive manual efforts and domain expertise in creating the test cases. In this paper, we investigate a low-cost approach for the test case generation by leveraging the GPT-3 engine. We further propose to use a classifier to remove the invalid outputs from GPT-3 and expand the outputs into templates to generate more test cases. Our experiments show that TestAug has three advantages over the existing work on behavioral testing: (1) TestAug can find more bugs than existing work; (2) The test cases in TestAug are more diverse; and (3) TestAug largely saves the manual efforts in creating the test suites. The code and data for TestAug can be found at our project website (https://guanqun-yang.github.io/testaug/) and GitHub (https://github.com/guanqun-yang/testaug).
summary: The recently proposed capability-based NLP testing allows model developers to test the functional capabilities of NLP models, revealing functional failures that cannot be detected by the traditional heldout mechanism. However, existing work on capability-based testing requires extensive manual efforts and domain expertise in creating the test cases. In this paper, we investigate a low-cost approach for the test case generation by leveraging the GPT-3 engine. We further propose to use a classifier to remove the invalid outputs from GPT-3 and expand the outputs into templates to generate more test cases. Our experiments show that TestAug has three advantages over the existing work on behavioral testing: (1) TestAug can find more bugs than existing work; (2) The test cases in TestAug are more diverse; and (3) TestAug largely saves the manual efforts in creating the test suites. The code and data for TestAug can be found at our project website (https://guanqun-yang.github.io/testaug/) and GitHub (https://github.com/guanqun-yang/testaug).
abstract_zh: 最近提出的基于能力的 NLP 测试允许模型开发人员测试 NLP 模型的功能能力，揭示传统保留机制无法检测到的功能故障。 However, existing work on capability-based testing requires extensive manual efforts and domain expertise in creating the test cases. In this paper, we investigate a low-cost approach for the test case generation by leveraging the GPT-3 engine.我们进一步建议使用分类器从 GPT-3 中删除无效输出，并将输出扩展到模板中以生成更多测试用例。我们的实验表明，与现有的行为测试工作相比，TestAug 具有三个优势：（1）TestAug 可以比现有工作发现更多的 bug； (2) The test cases in TestAug are more diverse; and (3) TestAug largely saves the manual efforts in creating the test suites. TestAug的代码和数据可以在我们的项目网站（https://guanqun-yang.github.io/testaug/）和GitHub（https://github.com/guanqun-yang/testaug）找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TestAug框架，利用GPT-3引擎和分类器自动生成能力导向的NLP测试用例，减少人工成本并提升测试效果。
AI.motivation: 现有能力导向的NLP测试方法依赖大量人工创建测试用例，耗时且需领域专业知识，限制了测试效率和覆盖范围。
AI.method: 通过GPT-3生成初始测试用例，结合分类器过滤无效输出，并将有效结果扩展为模板以生成更多测试用例。
AI.result: TestAug相比现有方法能发现更多漏洞，测试用例多样性更高，且显著降低人工创建测试套件的工作量。
AI.conclusion: TestAug为能力导向的NLP测试提供了低成本、高效的自动化解决方案，代码和数据已开源供研究使用。

tldr: 本文提出TestAug框架，利用GPT-3引擎和分类器自动生成能力导向的NLP测试用例，减少人工成本并提升测试效果。
motivation: 现有能力导向的NLP测试方法依赖大量人工创建测试用例，耗时且需领域专业知识，限制了测试效率和覆盖范围。
method: 通过GPT-3生成初始测试用例，结合分类器过滤无效输出，并将有效结果扩展为模板以生成更多测试用例。
result: TestAug相比现有方法能发现更多漏洞，测试用例多样性更高，且显著降低人工创建测试套件的工作量。
conclusion: TestAug为能力导向的NLP测试提供了低成本、高效的自动化解决方案，代码和数据已开源供研究使用。
search_text: TestAug: A Framework for Augmenting Capability-based NLP Tests TestAug：增强基于能力的 NLP 测试的框架 The recently proposed capability-based NLP testing allows model developers to test the functional capabilities of NLP models, revealing functional failures that cannot be detected by the traditional heldout mechanism. However, existing work on capability-based testing requires extensive manual efforts and domain expertise in creating the test cases. In this paper, we investigate a low-cost approach for the test case generation by leveraging the GPT-3 engine. We further propose to use a classifier to remove the invalid outputs from GPT-3 and expand the outputs into templates to generate more test cases. Our experiments show that TestAug has three advantages over the existing work on behavioral testing: (1) TestAug can find more bugs than existing work; (2) The test cases in TestAug are more diverse; and (3) TestAug largely saves the manual efforts in creating the test suites. The code and data for TestAug can be found at our project website (https://guanqun-yang.github.io/testaug/) and GitHub (https://github.com/guanqun-yang/testaug). 最近提出的基于能力的 NLP 测试允许模型开发人员测试 NLP 模型的功能能力，揭示传统保留机制无法检测到的功能故障。 However, existing work on capability-based testing requires extensive manual efforts and domain expertise in creating the test cases. In this paper, we investigate a low-cost approach for the test case generation by leveraging the GPT-3 engine.我们进一步建议使用分类器从 GPT-3 中删除无效输出，并将输出扩展到模板中以生成更多测试用例。我们的实验表明，与现有的行为测试工作相比，TestAug 具有三个优势：（1）TestAug 可以比现有工作发现更多的 bug； (2) The test cases in TestAug are more diverse; and (3) TestAug largely saves the manual efforts in creating the test suites. TestAug的代码和数据可以在我们的项目网站（https://guanqun-yang.github.io/testaug/）和GitHub（https://github.com/guanqun-yang/testaug）找到。 本文提出TestAug框架，利用GPT-3引擎和分类器自动生成能力导向的NLP测试用例，减少人工成本并提升测试效果。 Guanqun Yang,Mirazul Haque,Qiaochu Song,Wei Yang,Xueqing Liu cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Luning Sun,Daniel Zhengyu Huang,Hao Sun,Jian-Xun Wang
title: Bayesian Spline Learning for Equation Discovery of Nonlinear Dynamics with Quantified Uncertainty
title_zh: 用于具有量化不确定性的非线性动力学方程发现的贝叶斯样条学习
abstract: Nonlinear dynamics are ubiquitous in science and engineering applications, but the physics of most complex systems is far from being fully understood. Discovering interpretable governing equations from measurement data can help us understand and predict the behavior of complex dynamic systems. Although extensive work has recently been done in this field, robustly distilling explicit model forms from very sparse data with considerable noise remains intractable. Moreover, quantifying and propagating the uncertainty of the identified system from noisy data is challenging, and relevant literature is still limited. To bridge this gap, we develop a novel Bayesian spline learning framework to identify parsimonious governing equations of nonlinear (spatio)temporal dynamics from sparse, noisy data with quantified uncertainty. The proposed method utilizes spline basis to handle the data scarcity and measurement noise, upon which a group of derivatives can be accurately computed to form a library of candidate model terms. The equation residuals are used to inform the spline learning in a Bayesian manner, where approximate Bayesian uncertainty calibration techniques are employed to approximate posterior distributions of the trainable parameters. To promote the sparsity, an iterative sequential-threshold Bayesian learning approach is developed, using the alternative direction optimization strategy to systematically approximate L0 sparsity constraints. The proposed algorithm is evaluated on multiple nonlinear dynamical systems governed by canonical ordinary and partial differential equations, and the merit/superiority of the proposed method is demonstrated by comparison with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Nonlinear dynamics are ubiquitous in science and engineering applications, but the physics of most complex systems is far from being fully understood. Discovering interpretable governing equations from measurement data can help us understand and predict the behavior of complex dynamic systems. Although extensive work has recently been done in this field, robustly distilling explicit model forms from very sparse data with considerable noise remains intractable. Moreover, quantifying and propagating the uncertainty of the identified system from noisy data is challenging, and relevant literature is still limited. To bridge this gap, we develop a novel Bayesian spline learning framework to identify parsimonious governing equations of nonlinear (spatio)temporal dynamics from sparse, noisy data with quantified uncertainty. The proposed method utilizes spline basis to handle the data scarcity and measurement noise, upon which a group of derivatives can be accurately computed to form a library of candidate model terms. The equation residuals are used to inform the spline learning in a Bayesian manner, where approximate Bayesian uncertainty calibration techniques are employed to approximate posterior distributions of the trainable parameters. To promote the sparsity, an iterative sequential-threshold Bayesian learning approach is developed, using the alternative direction optimization strategy to systematically approximate L0 sparsity constraints. The proposed algorithm is evaluated on multiple nonlinear dynamical systems governed by canonical ordinary and partial differential equations, and the merit/superiority of the proposed method is demonstrated by comparison with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 非线性动力学在科学和工程应用中无处不在，但大多数复杂系统的物理学还远未被完全理解。从测量数据中发现可解释的控制方程可以帮助我们理解和预测复杂动态系统的行为。尽管最近在该领域进行了大量工作，但从具有相当大噪声的非常稀疏的数据中稳健地提取显式模型形式仍然很棘手。此外，从噪声数据中量化和传播已识别系统的不确定性具有挑战性，相关文献仍然有限。为了弥补这一差距，我们开发了一种新颖的贝叶斯样条学习框架，以从具有量化不确定性的稀疏、噪声数据中识别非线性（空间）时间动力学的简约控制方程。该方法利用样条基础来处理数据稀缺和测量噪声，在此基础上可以准确计算一组导数以形成候选模型项库。方程残差用于以贝叶斯方式告知样条学习，其中采用近似贝叶斯不确定性校准技术来近似可训练参数的后验分布。为了促进稀疏性，开发了一种迭代顺序阈值贝叶斯学习方法，使用替代方向优化策略来系统地近似 L0 稀疏性约束。该算法在由规范常微分方程和偏微分方程控制的多个非线性动力系统上进行了评估，并通过与最先进的方法进行比较证明了该方法的优点/优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯样条学习框架，用于从稀疏噪声数据中发现非线性动态系统的可解释控制方程，并量化不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从稀疏噪声数据中稳健提取显式模型形式，且缺乏对识别系统不确定性的量化与传播方法。
AI.method: 利用样条基函数处理数据稀缺性与噪声，通过计算导数构建候选项库；结合贝叶斯学习框架和近似贝叶斯不确定性校准技术，采用迭代阈值方法促进稀疏性。
AI.result: 在多个非线性动力系统上验证了方法有效性，相比现有方法表现出优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功解决了稀疏噪声数据下非线性动力学方程发现与不确定性量化难题。

authors_text: Adam Polevoy,Marin Kobilarov,Joseph Moore
title: Probably Approximately Correct Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (PAC-NMPC)
title_zh: 可能近似正确的非线性模型预测控制 (PAC-NMPC)
comment: 2023 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
comments: 2023 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
abstract: Approaches for stochastic nonlinear model predictive control (SNMPC) typically make restrictive assumptions about the system dynamics and rely on approximations to characterize the evolution of the underlying uncertainty distributions. For this reason, they are often unable to capture more complex distributions (e.g., non-Gaussian or multi-modal) and cannot provide accurate guarantees of performance. In this paper, we present a sampling-based SNMPC approach that leverages recently derived sample complexity bounds to certify the performance of a feedback policy without making assumptions about the system dynamics or underlying uncertainty distributions. By parallelizing our approach, we are able to demonstrate real-time receding-horizon SNMPC with statistical safety guarantees in simulation and on hardware using a 1/10th scale rally car and a 24-inch wingspan fixed-wing unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV).
summary: Approaches for stochastic nonlinear model predictive control (SNMPC) typically make restrictive assumptions about the system dynamics and rely on approximations to characterize the evolution of the underlying uncertainty distributions. For this reason, they are often unable to capture more complex distributions (e.g., non-Gaussian or multi-modal) and cannot provide accurate guarantees of performance. In this paper, we present a sampling-based SNMPC approach that leverages recently derived sample complexity bounds to certify the performance of a feedback policy without making assumptions about the system dynamics or underlying uncertainty distributions. By parallelizing our approach, we are able to demonstrate real-time receding-horizon SNMPC with statistical safety guarantees in simulation and on hardware using a 1/10th scale rally car and a 24-inch wingspan fixed-wing unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV).
abstract_zh: 随机非线性模型预测控制（SNMPC）方法通常对系统动力学做出限制性假设，并依靠近似来表征潜在不确定性分布的演化。因此，它们通常无法捕获更复杂的分布（例如非高斯或多模态），并且无法提供准确的性能保证。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于采样的 SNMPC 方法，该方法利用最近导出的样本复杂性界限来验证反馈策略的性能，而无需对系统动态或潜在的不确定性分布做出假设。通过并行化我们的方法，我们能够使用 1/10 比例拉力赛车和 24 英寸翼展固定翼无人机 (UAV) 在模拟和硬件上展示具有统计安全保证的实时后退 SNMPC。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于采样的随机非线性模型预测控制（SNMPC）方法，以在不依赖系统动态和不确定性分布假设的情况下，实现性能保证。
AI.motivation: 传统SNMPC方法因依赖系统动态假设和近似而无法处理复杂不确定性分布，难以提供准确性能保证，需更灵活可靠的方法。
AI.method: 采用基于采样的SNMPC方法，结合样本复杂度界限认证反馈策略性能，无需系统动态和不确定性分布假设，并通过并行化实现实时控制。
AI.result: 在模拟及硬件（1/10拉力赛车和24英寸固定翼无人机）上实现具有统计安全保证的实时滚动地平线SNMPC。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需先验假设即可提供性能保证，有效处理复杂不确定性，验证了其在实际系统中的可行性。

authors_text: John Nguyen,Jianyu Wang,Kshitiz Malik,Maziar Sanjabi,Michael Rabbat
title: Where to Begin? On the Impact of Pre-Training and Initialization in Federated Learning
title_zh: 从哪里开始？联邦学习中预训练和初始化的影响
comment: v2. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.15387
comments: v2. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.15387
abstract: An oft-cited challenge of federated learning is the presence of heterogeneity. \emph{Data heterogeneity} refers to the fact that data from different clients may follow very different distributions. \emph{System heterogeneity} refers to the fact that client devices have different system capabilities. A considerable number of federated optimization methods address this challenge. In the literature, empirical evaluations usually start federated training from random initialization. However, in many practical applications of federated learning, the server has access to proxy data for the training task that can be used to pre-train a model before starting federated training. We empirically study the impact of starting from a pre-trained model in federated learning using four standard federated learning benchmark datasets. Unsurprisingly, starting from a pre-trained model reduces the training time required to reach a target error rate and enables the training of more accurate models (up to 40\%) than is possible when starting from random initialization. Surprisingly, we also find that starting federated learning from a pre-trained initialization reduces the effect of both data and system heterogeneity. We recommend that future work proposing and evaluating federated optimization methods evaluate the performance when starting from random and pre-trained initializations. We also believe this study raises several questions for further work on understanding the role of heterogeneity in federated optimization.

A considerable number of federated optimization methods address this challenge. In the literature, empirical evaluations usually start federated training from random initialization. However, in many practical applications of federated learning, the server has access to proxy data for the training task that can be used to pre-train a model before starting federated training. We empirically study the impact of starting from a pre-trained model in federated learning using four standard federated learning benchmark datasets. Unsurprisingly, starting from a pre-trained model reduces the training time required to reach a target error rate and enables the training of more accurate models (up to 40\%) than is possible when starting from random initialization. Surprisingly, we also find that starting federated learning from a pre-trained initialization reduces the effect of both data and system heterogeneity. We recommend that future work proposing and evaluating federated optimization methods evaluate the performance when starting from random and pre-trained initializations. We also believe this study raises several questions for further work on understanding the role of heterogeneity in federated optimization.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习经常被提及的一个挑战是异构性的存在。 \emph{数据异质性}是指来自不同客户端的数据可能遵循非常不同的分布。 \emph{系统异构性}是指客户端设备具有不同的系统功能。相当多的联合优化方法解决了这一挑战。在文献中，经验评估通常从随机初始化开始联邦训练。然而，在联邦学习的许多实际应用中，服务器可以访问训练任务的代理数据，这些数据可用于在开始联邦训练之前预训练模型。我们使用四个标准联邦学习基准数据集实证研究从联邦学习中的预训练模型开始的影响。毫不奇怪，从预训练模型开始可以减少达到目标错误率所需的训练时间，并且可以训练比从随机初始化开始时更准确的模型（高达 40%）。令人惊讶的是，我们还发现从预训练的初始化开始联邦学习可以减少数据和系统异构性的影响。我们建议未来提出和评估联合优化方法的工作从随机和预训练的初始化开始时评估性能。我们还认为，这项研究提出了一些问题，需要进一步了解异构性在联邦优化中的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了联邦学习中预训练模型与随机初始化对训练效果的影响，通过实验证明预训练能显著提升模型性能并缓解异质性问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习面临数据与系统异质性挑战，现有研究多从随机初始化开始训练，但实际场景中服务器可能拥有预训练模型。作者旨在探讨预训练对联邦学习的影响。
AI.method: 在四个标准联邦学习数据集上，对比从预训练模型和随机初始化启动联邦训练的效果，分析训练时间、模型精度及异质性影响。
AI.result: 预训练模型使训练时间缩短，模型精度最高提升40%，并显著降低数据与系统异质性的负面影响。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来联邦优化方法研究需同时评估随机与预训练初始化效果，并进一步探索异质性在联邦学习中的作用机制。

authors_text: Md. Shakib Khan,Kazi Nabiul Alam,Abdur Rab Dhruba,Hasib Zunair,Nabeel Mohammed
title: Knowledge Distillation approach towards Melanoma Detection
title_zh: 黑色素瘤检测的知识蒸馏方法
comment: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine, Volume 146, July 2022, 105581
comments: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine, Volume 146, July 2022, 105581
abstract: Melanoma is regarded as the most threatening among all skin cancers. There is a pressing need to build systems which can aid in the early detection of melanoma and enable timely treatment to patients. Recent methods are geared towards machine learning based systems where the task is posed as image recognition, tag dermoscopic images of skin lesions as melanoma or non-melanoma. Even though these methods show promising results in terms of accuracy, they are computationally quite expensive to train, that questions the ability of these models to be deployable in a clinical setting or memory constraint devices. To address this issue, we focus on building simple and performant models having few layers, less than ten compared to hundreds. As well as with fewer learnable parameters, 0.26 million (M) compared to 42.5M using knowledge distillation with the goal to detect melanoma from dermoscopic images. First, we train a teacher model using a ResNet-50 to detect melanoma. Using the teacher model, we train the student model known as Distilled Student Network (DSNet) which has around 0.26M parameters using knowledge distillation achieving an accuracy of 91.7%. We compare against ImageNet pre-trained models such MobileNet, VGG-16, Inception-V3, EfficientNet-B0, ResNet-50 and ResNet-101. We find that our approach works well in terms of inference runtime compared to other pre-trained models, 2.57 seconds compared to 14.55 seconds. We find that DSNet (0.26M parameters), which is 15 times smaller, consistently performs better than EfficientNet-B0 (4M parameters) in both melanoma and non-melanoma detection across Precision, Recall and F1 scores

To address this issue, we focus on building simple and performant models having few layers, less than ten compared to hundreds. We compare against ImageNet pre-trained models such MobileNet, VGG-16, Inception-V3, EfficientNet-B0, ResNet-50 and ResNet-101. We find that our approach works well in terms of inference runtime compared to other pre-trained models, 2.57 seconds compared to 14.55 seconds. We find that DSNet (0.26M parameters), which is 15 times smaller, consistently performs better than EfficientNet-B0 (4M parameters) in both melanoma and non-melanoma detection across Precision, Recall and F1 scores
abstract_zh: 黑色素瘤被认为是所有皮肤癌中最具威胁性的。迫切需要建立有助于早期发现黑色素瘤并为患者提供及时治疗的系统。最近的方法面向基于机器学习的系统，其中任务被视为图像识别，将皮肤病变的皮肤镜图像标记为黑色素瘤或非黑色素瘤。尽管这些方法在准确性方面显示出有希望的结果，但训练它们的计算成本相当昂贵，这对这些模型在临床环境或内存约束设备中部署的能力提出了质疑。为了解决这个问题，我们专注于构建简单且高性能的模型，其层数很少，层数从十层到数百层不等。由于可学习参数较少，从皮肤镜图像中检测黑色素瘤的知识蒸馏中，可学习参数为 26 万 (M)，而使用知识蒸馏则为 4250 万。首先，我们使用 ResNet-50 训练教师模型来检测黑色素瘤。使用教师模型，我们训练了称为蒸馏学生网络 (DSNet) 的学生模型，该模型具有约 0.26M 参数，使用知识蒸馏实现了 91.7% 的准确率。我们与 ImageNet 预训练模型（例如 MobileNet、VGG-16、Inception-V3、EfficientNet-B0、ResNet-50 和 ResNet-101）进行比较。我们发现，与其他预训练模型相比，我们的方法在推理运行时间方面效果良好，分别为 2.57 秒和 14.55 秒。我们发现 DSNet（0.26M 参数）比 EfficientNet-B0（4M 参数）小 15 倍，在黑色素瘤和非黑色素瘤检测中的精确度、召回率和 F1 分数方面表现始终优于 EfficientNet-B0（4M 参数）

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识蒸馏的轻量级模型DSNet，用于皮肤癌黑色素瘤的检测，以解决现有深度学习模型计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的黑色素瘤检测模型参数量大、计算成本高，难以部署在临床或资源受限设备中，需开发更高效且准确的模型。
AI.method: 使用ResNet-50作为教师模型训练学生模型DSNet（参数量0.26M），通过知识蒸馏技术压缩模型规模，并与多个预训练模型进行性能对比。
AI.result: DSNet在测试集上达到91.7%的准确率，推理时间仅2.57秒（较ResNet-50快5.6倍），在精确率、召回率和F1分数上均优于4M参数的EfficientNet-B0。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏方法成功构建出轻量高效的黑色素瘤检测模型，为临床部署提供了可行方案，在精度与效率间取得良好平衡。

We compare against ImageNet pre-trained models such MobileNet, VGG-16, Inception-V3, EfficientNet-B0, ResNet-50 and ResNet-101. We find that our approach works well in terms of inference runtime compared to other pre-trained models, 2.57 seconds compared to 14.55 seconds. We find that DSNet (0.26M parameters), which is 15 times smaller, consistently performs better than EfficientNet-B0 (4M parameters) in both melanoma and non-melanoma detection across Precision, Recall and F1 scores 黑色素瘤被认为是所有皮肤癌中最具威胁性的。迫切需要建立有助于早期发现黑色素瘤并为患者提供及时治疗的系统。最近的方法面向基于机器学习的系统，其中任务被视为图像识别，将皮肤病变的皮肤镜图像标记为黑色素瘤或非黑色素瘤。尽管这些方法在准确性方面显示出有希望的结果，但训练它们的计算成本相当昂贵，这对这些模型在临床环境或内存约束设备中部署的能力提出了质疑。为了解决这个问题，我们专注于构建简单且高性能的模型，其层数很少，层数从十层到数百层不等。由于可学习参数较少，从皮肤镜图像中检测黑色素瘤的知识蒸馏中，可学习参数为 26 万 (M)，而使用知识蒸馏则为 4250 万。首先，我们使用 ResNet-50 训练教师模型来检测黑色素瘤。使用教师模型，我们训练了称为蒸馏学生网络 (DSNet) 的学生模型，该模型具有约 0.26M 参数，使用知识蒸馏实现了 91.7% 的准确率。我们与 ImageNet 预训练模型（例如 MobileNet、VGG-16、Inception-V3、EfficientNet-B0、ResNet-50 和 ResNet-101）进行比较。我们发现，与其他预训练模型相比，我们的方法在推理运行时间方面效果良好，分别为 2.57 秒和 14.55 秒。我们发现 DSNet（0.26M 参数）比 EfficientNet-B0（4M 参数）小 15 倍，在黑色素瘤和非黑色素瘤检测中的精确度、召回率和 F1 分数方面表现始终优于 EfficientNet-B0（4M 参数） 本文提出一种基于知识蒸馏的轻量级模型DSNet，用于皮肤癌黑色素瘤的检测，以解决现有深度学习模型计算成本高的问题。 Md. Shakib Khan,Kazi Nabiul Alam,Abdur Rab Dhruba,Hasib Zunair,Nabeel Mohammed cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nathan J. Wispinski,Andrew Butcher,Kory W. Mathewson,Craig S. Chapman,Matthew M. Botvinick,Patrick M. Pilarski
title: Adaptive patch foraging in deep reinforcement learning agents
title_zh: 深度强化学习代理中的自适应补丁觅食
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR). See: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=a0T3nOP9sB
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR). See: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=a0T3nOP9sB
abstract: Patch foraging is one of the most heavily studied behavioral optimization challenges in biology. However, despite its importance to biological intelligence, this behavioral optimization problem is understudied in artificial intelligence research. Patch foraging is especially amenable to study given that it has a known optimal solution, which may be difficult to discover given current techniques in deep reinforcement learning. Here, we investigate deep reinforcement learning agents in an ecological patch foraging task. For the first time, we show that machine learning agents can learn to patch forage adaptively in patterns similar to biological foragers, and approach optimal patch foraging behavior when accounting for temporal discounting. Finally, we show emergent internal dynamics in these agents that resemble single-cell recordings from foraging non-human primates, which complements experimental and theoretical work on the neural mechanisms of biological foraging. This work suggests that agents interacting in complex environments with ecologically valid pressures arrive at common solutions, suggesting the emergence of foundational computations behind adaptive, intelligent behavior in both biological and artificial agents.
summary: Patch foraging is one of the most heavily studied behavioral optimization challenges in biology. However, despite its importance to biological intelligence, this behavioral optimization problem is understudied in artificial intelligence research. Here, we investigate deep reinforcement learning agents in an ecological patch foraging task. For the first time, we show that machine learning agents can learn to patch forage adaptively in patterns similar to biological foragers, and approach optimal patch foraging behavior when accounting for temporal discounting. Finally, we show emergent internal dynamics in these agents that resemble single-cell recordings from foraging non-human primates, which complements experimental and theoretical work on the neural mechanisms of biological foraging. This work suggests that agents interacting in complex environments with ecologically valid pressures arrive at common solutions, suggesting the emergence of foundational computations behind adaptive, intelligent behavior in both biological and artificial agents.
abstract_zh: 补丁觅食是生物学中研究最深入的行为优化挑战之一。然而，尽管它对生物智能很重要，但这种行为优化问题在人工智能研究中尚未得到充分研究。补丁觅食特别适合研究，因为它有一个已知的最佳解决方案，但考虑到当前的深度强化学习技术，可能很难发现该解决方案。在这里，我们研究了生态斑块觅食任务中的深度强化学习代理。我们首次证明，机器学习代理可以学习以类似于生物觅食者的模式自适应地修补觅食，并在考虑时间贴现时接近最佳的修补觅食行为。最后，我们展示了这些代理中出现的内部动态，类似于觅食的非人类灵长类动物的单细胞记录，这补充了生物觅食神经机制的实验和理论工作。这项工作表明，在复杂环境中与生态有效压力相互作用的智能体会得出共同的解决方案，这表明生物和人工智能智能体的自适应智能行为背后的基础计算的出现。

AI.tldr: 研究深度强化学习代理在生态斑块觅食任务中的自适应行为，探索其与生物觅食行为的相似性及基础计算机制。
AI.motivation: 斑块觅食作为生物学中经典行为优化问题，在AI领域研究不足，且现有深度强化学习技术难以发现其最优解，需验证AI代理是否能模拟生物觅食策略并揭示潜在机制。
AI.method: 设计生态斑块觅食任务环境，训练深度强化学习代理并分析其行为模式与内部动态，对比生物实验数据（如非人灵长类单细胞记录）。
AI.result: 代理学会类似生物的适应性觅食策略，接近理论最优行为；其内部动态与生物神经活动模式存在相似性。
AI.conclusion: 生物与人工代理在复杂环境中可能共享基础计算机制，为理解智能行为提供跨学科视角。
