authors_text: Maged Iskandar,Christiaan van Ommeren,Xuwei Wu,Alin Albu-Schaffer,Alexander Dietrich
title: Model Predictive Control for Flexible Joint Robots
title_zh: 柔性关节机器人的模型预测控制
abstract: Modern Lightweight robots are constructed to be collaborative, which often results in a low structural stiffness compared to conventional rigid robots. Therefore, the controller must be able to handle the dynamic oscillatory effect mainly due to the intrinsic joint elasticity. Singular perturbation theory makes it possible to decompose the flexible joint dynamics into fast and slow subsystems. This model separation provides additional features to incorporate future knowledge of the jointlevel dynamical behavior within the controller design using the Model Predictive Control (MPC) technique. In this study, different architectures are considered that combine the method of Singular Perturbation and MPC. For Singular Perturbation, the parameters that influence the validity of using this technique to control a flexible-joint robot are investigated. Furthermore, limits on the input constraints for the future trajectory are considered with MPC. The position control performance and robustness against external forces of each architecture are validated experimentally for a flexible joint robot.
summary: Modern Lightweight robots are constructed to be collaborative, which often results in a low structural stiffness compared to conventional rigid robots. Therefore, the controller must be able to handle the dynamic oscillatory effect mainly due to the intrinsic joint elasticity. Singular perturbation theory makes it possible to decompose the flexible joint dynamics into fast and slow subsystems. This model separation provides additional features to incorporate future knowledge of the jointlevel dynamical behavior within the controller design using the Model Predictive Control (MPC) technique. In this study, different architectures are considered that combine the method of Singular Perturbation and MPC. For Singular Perturbation, the parameters that influence the validity of using this technique to control a flexible-joint robot are investigated. Furthermore, limits on the input constraints for the future trajectory are considered with MPC. The position control performance and robustness against external forces of each architecture are validated experimentally for a flexible joint robot.
abstract_zh: 现代轻型机器人被构造为具有协作性，与传统的刚性机器人相比，这通常会导致结构刚度较低。因此，控制器必须能够处理主要由于固有的关节弹性而产生的动态振荡效应。奇异摄动理论使得将柔性关节动力学分解为快速和慢速子系统成为可能。这种模型分离提供了额外的功能，可以使用模型预测控制 (MPC) 技术将关节级动态行为的未来知识纳入控制器设计中。在本研究中，考虑了结合奇异扰动和 MPC 方法的不同架构。对于奇异扰动，研究了影响使用该技术控制柔性关节机器人的有效性的参数。此外，MPC 还考虑了对未来轨迹的输入约束的限制。每种架构的位置控制性能和抵抗外力的鲁棒性都通过柔性关节机器人的实验验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合奇异摄动理论与模型预测控制（MPC）的方法，以解决柔性关节机器人的动态振荡控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现代协作机器人因结构刚度低，需应对关节弹性引发的动态振荡，传统控制方法难以有效处理此类问题。
AI.method: 采用奇异摄动理论分解柔性关节动力学为快慢子系统，并结合MPC技术设计控制器，分析不同架构及输入约束对控制效果的影响。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在位置控制精度与抗外部扰动鲁棒性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为柔性关节机器人控制提供了新思路，通过分离动态特性与预测控制实现了更优性能。

authors_text: Sudarshan Devkota,Summanta Pattanaik
title: Reference Based Color Transfer for Medical Volume Rendering
title_zh: 用于医疗体积渲染的基于参考的颜色传输
abstract: The benefits of medical imaging are enormous. Medical images provide considerable amounts of anatomical information and this facilitates medical practitioners in performing effective disease diagnosis and deciding upon the best course of medical treatment. A transition from traditional monochromatic medical images like CT scans, X-Rays or MRI images to a colored 3D representation of the anatomical structure further enhances the capabilities of medical professionals in extracting valuable medical information. The proposed framework in our research starts with performing color transfer by finding deep semantic correspondence between two medical images: a colored reference image, and a monochromatic CT scan or an MRI image. We extend this idea of reference-based colorization technique to perform colored volume rendering from a stack of grayscale medical images. Furthermore, we also propose to use an effective reference image recommendation system to aid in the selection of good reference images. With our approach, we successfully perform colored medical volume visualization and essentially eliminate the painstaking process of user interaction with a transfer function to obtain color and opacity parameters for volume rendering.
summary: The benefits of medical imaging are enormous. Medical images provide considerable amounts of anatomical information and this facilitates medical practitioners in performing effective disease diagnosis and deciding upon the best course of medical treatment. A transition from traditional monochromatic medical images like CT scans, X-Rays or MRI images to a colored 3D representation of the anatomical structure further enhances the capabilities of medical professionals in extracting valuable medical information. The proposed framework in our research starts with performing color transfer by finding deep semantic correspondence between two medical images: a colored reference image, and a monochromatic CT scan or an MRI image. We extend this idea of reference-based colorization technique to perform colored volume rendering from a stack of grayscale medical images. Furthermore, we also propose to use an effective reference image recommendation system to aid in the selection of good reference images. With our approach, we successfully perform colored medical volume visualization and essentially eliminate the painstaking process of user interaction with a transfer function to obtain color and opacity parameters for volume rendering.
abstract_zh: 医学成像的好处是巨大的。医学图像提供了大量的解剖信息，这有助于医生进行有效的疾病诊断并决定最佳的治疗方案。从 CT 扫描、X 射线或 MRI 图像等传统单色医学图像到解剖结构的彩色 3D 表示的转变进一步增强了医疗专业人员提取有价值的医疗信息的能力。我们研究中提出的框架首先通过查找两个医学图像（彩色参考图像和单色 CT 扫描或 MRI 图像）之间的深层语义对应关系来执行颜色传输。我们扩展了基于参考的着色技术的想法，以从一堆灰度医学图像中执行彩色体积渲染。此外，我们还建议使用有效的参考图像推荐系统来帮助选择好的参考图像。通过我们的方法，我们成功地执行了彩色医疗体积可视化，并基本上消除了用户与传递函数交互以获得体积渲染的颜色和不透明度参数的艰苦过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于参考图像的医学影像颜色转移方法，实现灰度医学图像的彩色体积渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统医学影像为单色图像，难以直观呈现解剖结构；手动调整颜色参数耗时且依赖经验，需自动化解决方案提升诊断效率。
AI.method: 通过深度语义对应建立参考彩色图像与目标灰度图像的关联，扩展颜色转移技术至体积渲染，并设计参考图像推荐系统辅助选图。
AI.result: 实现无需人工交互的彩色医学体积可视化，显著减少参数调整工作量，提升信息呈现效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决医学影像颜色化难题，未来可优化推荐系统精准度及扩展多模态数据处理能力。

search_text: Reference Based Color Transfer for Medical Volume Rendering 用于医疗体积渲染的基于参考的颜色传输 The benefits of medical imaging are enormous. Medical images provide considerable amounts of anatomical information and this facilitates medical practitioners in performing effective disease diagnosis and deciding upon the best course of medical treatment. A transition from traditional monochromatic medical images like CT scans, X-Rays or MRI images to a colored 3D representation of the anatomical structure further enhances the capabilities of medical professionals in extracting valuable medical information. The proposed framework in our research starts with performing color transfer by finding deep semantic correspondence between two medical images: a colored reference image, and a monochromatic CT scan or an MRI image. We extend this idea of reference-based colorization technique to perform colored volume rendering from a stack of grayscale medical images. Furthermore, we also propose to use an effective reference image recommendation system to aid in the selection of good reference images. With our approach, we successfully perform colored medical volume visualization and essentially eliminate the painstaking process of user interaction with a transfer function to obtain color and opacity parameters for volume rendering. 医学成像的好处是巨大的。医学图像提供了大量的解剖信息，这有助于医生进行有效的疾病诊断并决定最佳的治疗方案。从 CT 扫描、X 射线或 MRI 图像等传统单色医学图像到解剖结构的彩色 3D 表示的转变进一步增强了医疗专业人员提取有价值的医疗信息的能力。我们研究中提出的框架首先通过查找两个医学图像（彩色参考图像和单色 CT 扫描或 MRI 图像）之间的深层语义对应关系来执行颜色传输。我们扩展了基于参考的着色技术的想法，以从一堆灰度医学图像中执行彩色体积渲染。此外，我们还建议使用有效的参考图像推荐系统来帮助选择好的参考图像。通过我们的方法，我们成功地执行了彩色医疗体积可视化，并基本上消除了用户与传递函数交互以获得体积渲染的颜色和不透明度参数的艰苦过程。 本文提出一种基于参考图像的医学影像颜色转移方法，实现灰度医学图像的彩色体积渲染。 Sudarshan Devkota,Summanta Pattanaik cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Sudarshan Devkota,Sumanta Pattanaik
title: Deep Learning based Super-Resolution for Medical Volume Visualization with Direct Volume Rendering
title_zh: 基于深度学习的超分辨率医疗体可视化与直接体渲染
abstract: Modern-day display systems demand high-quality rendering. However, rendering at higher resolution requires a large number of data samples and is computationally expensive. Recent advances in deep learning-based image and video super-resolution techniques motivate us to investigate such networks for high-fidelity upscaling of frames rendered at a lower resolution to a higher resolution. While our work focuses on super-resolution of medical volume visualization performed with direct volume rendering, it is also applicable for volume visualization with other rendering techniques. We propose a learning-based technique where our proposed system uses color information along with other supplementary features gathered from our volume renderer to learn efficient upscaling of a low-resolution rendering to a higher-resolution space. Furthermore, to improve temporal stability, we also implement the temporal reprojection technique for accumulating history samples in volumetric rendering.
summary: Modern-day display systems demand high-quality rendering. However, rendering at higher resolution requires a large number of data samples and is computationally expensive. Recent advances in deep learning-based image and video super-resolution techniques motivate us to investigate such networks for high-fidelity upscaling of frames rendered at a lower resolution to a higher resolution. While our work focuses on super-resolution of medical volume visualization performed with direct volume rendering, it is also applicable for volume visualization with other rendering techniques. We propose a learning-based technique where our proposed system uses color information along with other supplementary features gathered from our volume renderer to learn efficient upscaling of a low-resolution rendering to a higher-resolution space. Furthermore, to improve temporal stability, we also implement the temporal reprojection technique for accumulating history samples in volumetric rendering.
abstract_zh: 现代显示系统需要高质量的渲染。然而，以更高分辨率进行渲染需要大量数据样本，并且计算成本较高。基于深度学习的图像和视频超分辨率技术的最新进展促使我们研究此类网络，以将较低分辨率渲染的帧高保真升级到较高分辨率。虽然我们的工作重点是通过直接体积渲染执行的医疗体积可视化的超分辨率，但它也适用于使用其他渲染技术的体积可视化。我们提出了一种基于学习的技术，我们提出的系统使用颜色信息以及从体渲染器收集的其他补充特征来学习将低分辨率渲染有效升级到更高分辨率的空间。此外，为了提高时间稳定性，我们还实现了时间重投影技术来累积体积渲染中的历史样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的超分辨率方法，用于提升医学体积可视化中直接体积渲染的图像质量。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率渲染计算成本高且数据需求大，而深度学习超分辨率技术能有效提升低分辨率图像质量，从而降低计算负担。
AI.method: 结合颜色信息与体积渲染器提取的补充特征，设计学习型超分辨率网络，并引入时间重投影技术增强时序稳定性。
AI.result: 实现了低分辨率渲染帧到高分辨率空间的高效超分辨率，同时通过历史样本积累提升了体积渲染的时序稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在医学体积可视化领域有效，且适用于其他渲染技术，为高保真可视化提供了计算效率与视觉质量的平衡方案。

authors_text: Kanishk Gandhi,Siddharth Karamcheti,Madeline Liao,Dorsa Sadigh
title: Eliciting Compatible Demonstrations for Multi-Human Imitation Learning
title_zh: 引出多人模仿学习的兼容演示
comment: To appear at the 6th Annual Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022
comments: To appear at the 6th Annual Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022
abstract: Imitation learning from human-provided demonstrations is a strong approach for learning policies for robot manipulation. While the ideal dataset for imitation learning is homogenous and low-variance -- reflecting a single, optimal method for performing a task -- natural human behavior has a great deal of heterogeneity, with several optimal ways to demonstrate a task. This multimodality is inconsequential to human users, with task variations manifesting as subconscious choices; for example, reaching down, then across to grasp an object, versus reaching across, then down. Yet, this mismatch presents a problem for interactive imitation learning, where sequences of users improve on a policy by iteratively collecting new, possibly conflicting demonstrations. To combat this problem of demonstrator incompatibility, this work designs an approach for 1) measuring the compatibility of a new demonstration given a base policy, and 2) actively eliciting more compatible demonstrations from new users. Across two simulation tasks requiring long-horizon, dexterous manipulation and a real-world "food plating" task with a Franka Emika Panda arm, we show that we can both identify incompatible demonstrations via post-hoc filtering, and apply our compatibility measure to actively elicit compatible demonstrations from new users, leading to improved task success rates across simulated and real environments.
summary: Imitation learning from human-provided demonstrations is a strong approach for learning policies for robot manipulation. While the ideal dataset for imitation learning is homogenous and low-variance -- reflecting a single, optimal method for performing a task -- natural human behavior has a great deal of heterogeneity, with several optimal ways to demonstrate a task. This multimodality is inconsequential to human users, with task variations manifesting as subconscious choices; for example, reaching down, then across to grasp an object, versus reaching across, then down. Yet, this mismatch presents a problem for interactive imitation learning, where sequences of users improve on a policy by iteratively collecting new, possibly conflicting demonstrations. To combat this problem of demonstrator incompatibility, this work designs an approach for 1) measuring the compatibility of a new demonstration given a base policy, and 2) actively eliciting more compatible demonstrations from new users. Across two simulation tasks requiring long-horizon, dexterous manipulation and a real-world "food plating" task with a Franka Emika Panda arm, we show that we can both identify incompatible demonstrations via post-hoc filtering, and apply our compatibility measure to actively elicit compatible demonstrations from new users, leading to improved task success rates across simulated and real environments.
abstract_zh: 从人类提供的演示中进行模仿学习是学习机器人操作策略的有效方法。虽然模仿学习的理想数据集是同质且低方差的（反映了执行任务的单一最佳方法），但人类的自然行为具有很大的异质性，有多种最佳方法来演示任务。这种多模态对于人类用户来说无关紧要，任务变化表现为潜意识的选择；例如，先向下伸手，然后横向抓握物体，而不是先伸手横向，然后向下。然而，这种不匹配给交互式模仿学习带来了一个问题，即用户序列通过迭代收集新的、可能相互冲突的演示来改进策略。为了解决演示器不兼容的问题，这项工作设计了一种方法：1）在给定基本策略的情况下测量新演示的兼容性，2）积极从新用户那里引出更多兼容的演示。在两个需要长视界、灵巧操作的模拟任务和使用 Franka Emika Panda 手臂执行的现实世界“食物摆盘”任务中，我们表明，我们既可以通过事后过滤识别不兼容的演示，又可以应用我们的兼容性措施来主动从新用户中引出兼容的演示，从而提高模拟和真实环境中的任务成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过测量和主动引导多用户示范的兼容性，提升多人类模仿学习的效果。
AI.motivation: 人类示范数据存在异质性，不同用户的操作方式可能冲突，导致交互式模仿学习策略难以优化。
AI.method: 设计兼容性度量方法评估新示范与基础策略的匹配度，并主动引导新用户生成更兼容的示范数据。
AI.result: 在模拟和现实任务中，通过后验过滤识别不兼容示范，并主动引导生成兼容示范，显著提升任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了多用户示范兼容性问题，为交互式模仿学习提供了可行的改进方向。

conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了多用户示范兼容性问题，为交互式模仿学习提供了可行的改进方向。
search_text: Eliciting Compatible Demonstrations for Multi-Human Imitation Learning 引出多人模仿学习的兼容演示 Imitation learning from human-provided demonstrations is a strong approach for learning policies for robot manipulation. While the ideal dataset for imitation learning is homogenous and low-variance -- reflecting a single, optimal method for performing a task -- natural human behavior has a great deal of heterogeneity, with several optimal ways to demonstrate a task. This multimodality is inconsequential to human users, with task variations manifesting as subconscious choices; for example, reaching down, then across to grasp an object, versus reaching across, then down. Yet, this mismatch presents a problem for interactive imitation learning, where sequences of users improve on a policy by iteratively collecting new, possibly conflicting demonstrations. To combat this problem of demonstrator incompatibility, this work designs an approach for 1) measuring the compatibility of a new demonstration given a base policy, and 2) actively eliciting more compatible demonstrations from new users. Across two simulation tasks requiring long-horizon, dexterous manipulation and a real-world "food plating" task with a Franka Emika Panda arm, we show that we can both identify incompatible demonstrations via post-hoc filtering, and apply our compatibility measure to actively elicit compatible demonstrations from new users, leading to improved task success rates across simulated and real environments. 从人类提供的演示中进行模仿学习是学习机器人操作策略的有效方法。虽然模仿学习的理想数据集是同质且低方差的（反映了执行任务的单一最佳方法），但人类的自然行为具有很大的异质性，有多种最佳方法来演示任务。这种多模态对于人类用户来说无关紧要，任务变化表现为潜意识的选择；例如，先向下伸手，然后横向抓握物体，而不是先伸手横向，然后向下。然而，这种不匹配给交互式模仿学习带来了一个问题，即用户序列通过迭代收集新的、可能相互冲突的演示来改进策略。为了解决演示器不兼容的问题，这项工作设计了一种方法：1）在给定基本策略的情况下测量新演示的兼容性，2）积极从新用户那里引出更多兼容的演示。在两个需要长视界、灵巧操作的模拟任务和使用 Franka Emika Panda 手臂执行的现实世界“食物摆盘”任务中，我们表明，我们既可以通过事后过滤识别不兼容的演示，又可以应用我们的兼容性措施来主动从新用户中引出兼容的演示，从而提高模拟和真实环境中的任务成功率。 本文研究如何通过测量和主动引导多用户示范的兼容性，提升多人类模仿学习的效果。 Kanishk Gandhi,Siddharth Karamcheti,Madeline Liao,Dorsa Sadigh cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Ludovic Sibille,Xinrui Zhan,Lei Xiang
title: Whole-body tumor segmentation of 18F -FDG PET/CT using a cascaded and ensembled convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 使用级联和集成卷积神经网络对 18F -FDG PET/CT 进行全身肿瘤分割
abstract: Background: A crucial initial processing step for quantitative PET/CT analysis is the segmentation of tumor lesions enabling accurate feature ex-traction, tumor characterization, oncologic staging, and image-based therapy response assessment. Manual lesion segmentation is however associated with enormous effort and cost and is thus infeasible in clinical routine. Goal: The goal of this study was to report the performance of a deep neural network designed to automatically segment regions suspected of cancer in whole-body 18F-FDG PET/CT images in the context of the AutoPET challenge. Method: A cascaded approach was developed where a stacked ensemble of 3D UNET CNN processed the PET/CT images at a fixed 6mm resolution. A refiner network composed of residual layers enhanced the 6mm segmentation mask to the original resolution. Results: 930 cases were used to train the model. 50% were histologically proven cancer patients and 50% were healthy controls. We obtained a dice=0.68 on 84 stratified test cases. Manual and automatic Metabolic Tumor Volume (MTV) were highly correlated (R2 = 0.969,Slope = 0.947). Inference time was 89.7 seconds on average. Conclusion: The proposed algorithm accurately segmented regions suspicious for cancer in whole-body 18F -FDG PET/CT images.
summary: Background: A crucial initial processing step for quantitative PET/CT analysis is the segmentation of tumor lesions enabling accurate feature ex-traction, tumor characterization, oncologic staging, and image-based therapy response assessment. Manual lesion segmentation is however associated with enormous effort and cost and is thus infeasible in clinical routine. Goal: The goal of this study was to report the performance of a deep neural network designed to automatically segment regions suspected of cancer in whole-body 18F-FDG PET/CT images in the context of the AutoPET challenge. Method: A cascaded approach was developed where a stacked ensemble of 3D UNET CNN processed the PET/CT images at a fixed 6mm resolution. A refiner network composed of residual layers enhanced the 6mm segmentation mask to the original resolution. Results: 930 cases were used to train the model. 50% were histologically proven cancer patients and 50% were healthy controls. We obtained a dice=0.68 on 84 stratified test cases. Manual and automatic Metabolic Tumor Volume (MTV) were highly correlated (R2 = 0.969,Slope = 0.947). Inference time was 89.7 seconds on average. Conclusion: The proposed algorithm accurately segmented regions suspicious for cancer in whole-body 18F -FDG PET/CT images.
abstract_zh: 背景：定量 PET/CT 分析的关键初始处理步骤是肿瘤病灶的分割，从而实现准确的特征提取、肿瘤表征、肿瘤分期和基于图像的治疗反应评估。然而，手动病灶分割需要巨大的努力和成本，因此在临床常规中不可行。目标：本研究的目的是报告深度神经网络的性能，该网络旨在在 AutoPET 挑战的背景下自动分割全身 18F-FDG PET/CT 图像中疑似癌症的区域。方法：开发了一种级联方法，其中 3D UNET CNN 的堆叠整体以固定的 6 毫米分辨率处理 PET/CT 图像。由残差层组成的细化网络将 6mm 分割掩模增强到原始分辨率。结果：使用了930个案例来训练模型。 50% 是经组织学证实的癌症患者，50% 是健康对照。我们在 84 个分层测试用例上获得了 dice=0.68。手动和自动代谢肿瘤体积 (MTV) 高度相关 (R2 = 0.969，斜率 = 0.947)。平均推理时间为 89.7 秒。结论：所提出的算法可以准确地分割全身 18F -FDG PET/CT 图像中可疑癌症的区域。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于级联和集成卷积神经网络（CNN）的全自动分割方法，用于全身18F-FDG PET/CT图像中的肿瘤区域分割。
AI.motivation: 手动分割PET/CT图像中的肿瘤病灶耗时且成本高，难以在临床常规中应用，因此需要开发自动化分割方法以提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 采用级联架构，首先使用3D UNET CNN集成模型在固定6mm分辨率下处理PET/CT图像，再通过包含残差层的细化网络将分割掩膜提升至原始分辨率。
AI.result: 模型在930例训练数据（含50%癌症患者和50%健康对照）上训练，测试集Dice系数达0.68，自动与手动代谢肿瘤体积（MTV）高度相关（R²=0.969），平均推理时间为89.7秒。
AI.conclusion: 该算法能有效分割全身18F-FDG PET/CT图像中疑似肿瘤区域，为临床提供可靠的自动化分析工具。

Manual lesion segmentation is however associated with enormous effort and cost and is thus infeasible in clinical routine. Goal: The goal of this study was to report the performance of a deep neural network designed to automatically segment regions suspected of cancer in whole-body 18F-FDG PET/CT images in the context of the AutoPET challenge. Manual and automatic Metabolic Tumor Volume (MTV) were highly correlated (R2 = 0.969,Slope = 0.947). Inference time was 89.7 seconds on average. authors_text: Qianying Liu,Chaitanya Kaul,Jun Wang,Christos Anagnostopoulos,Roderick Murray-Smith,Fani Deligianni
title: Optimizing Vision Transformers for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 优化医学图像分割的视觉转换器
abstract: For medical image semantic segmentation (MISS), Vision Transformers have emerged as strong alternatives to convolutional neural networks thanks to their inherent ability to capture long-range correlations. However, existing research uses off-the-shelf vision Transformer blocks based on linear projections and feature processing which lack spatial and local context to refine organ boundaries. Furthermore, Transformers do not generalize well on small medical imaging datasets and rely on large-scale pre-training due to limited inductive biases. To address these problems, we demonstrate the design of a compact and accurate Transformer network for MISS, CS-Unet, which introduces convolutions in a multi-stage design for hierarchically enhancing spatial and local modeling ability of Transformers. This is mainly achieved by our well-designed Convolutional Swin Transformer (CST) block which merges convolutions with Multi-Head Self-Attention and Feed-Forward Networks for providing inherent localized spatial context and inductive biases. Experiments demonstrate CS-Unet without pre-training outperforms other counterparts by large margins on multi-organ and cardiac datasets with fewer parameters and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at Github.
summary: For medical image semantic segmentation (MISS), Vision Transformers have emerged as strong alternatives to convolutional neural networks thanks to their inherent ability to capture long-range correlations. However, existing research uses off-the-shelf vision Transformer blocks based on linear projections and feature processing which lack spatial and local context to refine organ boundaries. Furthermore, Transformers do not generalize well on small medical imaging datasets and rely on large-scale pre-training due to limited inductive biases. To address these problems, we demonstrate the design of a compact and accurate Transformer network for MISS, CS-Unet, which introduces convolutions in a multi-stage design for hierarchically enhancing spatial and local modeling ability of Transformers. This is mainly achieved by our well-designed Convolutional Swin Transformer (CST) block which merges convolutions with Multi-Head Self-Attention and Feed-Forward Networks for providing inherent localized spatial context and inductive biases. Experiments demonstrate CS-Unet without pre-training outperforms other counterparts by large margins on multi-organ and cardiac datasets with fewer parameters and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at Github.
abstract_zh: 对于医学图像语义分割 (MISS)，视觉 Transformer 因其捕获远程相关性的固有能力而成为卷积神经网络的强大替代品。然而，现有研究使用基于线性投影和特征处理的现成视觉 Transformer 块，缺乏空间和局部上下文来细化器官边界。此外，Transformers 不能很好地泛化小型医学成像数据集，并且由于有限的归纳偏差而依赖于大规模预训练。为了解决这些问题，我们展示了用于 MISS、CS-Unet 的紧凑且精确的 Transformer 网络的设计，该网络在多阶段设计中引入了卷积，以分层增强 Transformer 的空间和局部建模能力。这主要是通过我们精心设计的卷积 Swin Transformer (CST) 块实现的，该块将卷积与多头自注意力和前馈网络合并，以提供固有的局部空间上下文和归纳偏差。实验表明，未经预训练的 CS-Unet 在参数较少的多器官和心脏数据集上大幅优于其他同行，并实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可以在 Github 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CS-Unet的紧凑且精确的Transformer网络，用于优化医学图像分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有Vision Transformer在医学图像分割中因缺乏空间和局部上下文建模能力，难以精确分割器官边界，且依赖大规模预训练，难以适应小数据集。
AI.method: 设计了融合卷积的多阶段Transformer架构（CS-Unet），通过引入Convolutional Swin Transformer（CST）模块，将卷积与多头自注意力机制结合，增强局部空间建模能力并减少对预训练的依赖。
AI.result: CS-Unet在无需预训练的情况下，在多器官和心脏数据集上以更少参数超越其他方法，达到最先进的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合卷积与Transformer的优势，CS-Unet有效解决了医学图像分割中的局部建模和小样本适应问题，为医学影像分析提供了高效解决方案。

This is mainly achieved by our well-designed Convolutional Swin Transformer (CST) block which merges convolutions with Multi-Head Self-Attention and Feed-Forward Networks for providing inherent localized spatial context and inductive biases. Experiments demonstrate CS-Unet without pre-training outperforms other counterparts by large margins on multi-organ and cardiac datasets with fewer parameters and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at Github. 对于医学图像语义分割 (MISS)，视觉 Transformer 因其捕获远程相关性的固有能力而成为卷积神经网络的强大替代品。然而，现有研究使用基于线性投影和特征处理的现成视觉 Transformer 块，缺乏空间和局部上下文来细化器官边界。此外，Transformers 不能很好地泛化小型医学成像数据集，并且由于有限的归纳偏差而依赖于大规模预训练。为了解决这些问题，我们展示了用于 MISS、CS-Unet 的紧凑且精确的 Transformer 网络的设计，该网络在多阶段设计中引入了卷积，以分层增强 Transformer 的空间和局部建模能力。这主要是通过我们精心设计的卷积 Swin Transformer (CST) 块实现的，该块将卷积与多头自注意力和前馈网络合并，以提供固有的局部空间上下文和归纳偏差。实验表明，未经预训练的 CS-Unet 在参数较少的多器官和心脏数据集上大幅优于其他同行，并实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可以在 Github 上找到。 本文提出了一种名为CS-Unet的紧凑且精确的Transformer网络，用于优化医学图像分割任务。 Qianying Liu,Chaitanya Kaul,Jun Wang,Christos Anagnostopoulos,Roderick Murray-Smith,Fani Deligianni cs.CV

authors_text: Lev Grossman,Brian Plancher
title: Just Round: Quantized Observation Spaces Enable Memory Efficient Learning of Dynamic Locomotion
title_zh: Just Round：量化观察空间实现动态运动的内存高效学习
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is one of the most powerful tools for synthesizing complex robotic behaviors. But training DRL models is incredibly compute and memory intensive, requiring large training datasets and replay buffers to achieve performant results. This poses a challenge for the next generation of field robots that will need to learn on the edge to adapt to their environment. In this paper, we begin to address this issue through observation space quantization. We evaluate our approach using four simulated robot locomotion tasks and two state-of-the-art DRL algorithms, the on-policy Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and off-policy Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) and find that observation space quantization reduces overall memory costs by as much as 4.2x without impacting learning performance.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is one of the most powerful tools for synthesizing complex robotic behaviors. But training DRL models is incredibly compute and memory intensive, requiring large training datasets and replay buffers to achieve performant results. This poses a challenge for the next generation of field robots that will need to learn on the edge to adapt to their environment. In this paper, we begin to address this issue through observation space quantization. We evaluate our approach using four simulated robot locomotion tasks and two state-of-the-art DRL algorithms, the on-policy Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and off-policy Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) and find that observation space quantization reduces overall memory costs by as much as 4.2x without impacting learning performance.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）是合成复杂机器人行为的最强大工具之一。但训练 DRL 模型需要大量计算和内存，需要大量训练数据集和重播缓冲区才能获得高性能结果。这对下一代现场机器人提出了挑战，它们需要在边缘学习以适应环境。在本文中，我们开始通过观测空间量化来解决这个问题。我们使用四个模拟机器人运动任务和两个最先进的 DRL 算法（在策略近端策略优化 (PPO) 和离策略 Soft Actor-Critic (SAC)）来评估我们的方法，发现观察空间量化可将总体内存成本降低多达 4.2 倍，而不会影响学习性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过量化观测空间来降低深度强化学习在动态移动任务中的内存消耗，同时保持学习性能。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习模型训练需要大量计算和内存资源，难以满足边缘设备实时适应环境的需求。
AI.method: 采用观测空间量化技术，结合PPO和SAC两种算法，在四个模拟机器人移动任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 内存成本最高降低4.2倍，且未影响学习性能和任务完成效果。
AI.conclusion: 观测空间量化为边缘设备实现高效动态移动学习提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Minghua Liu,Yin Zhou,Charles R. Qi,Boqing Gong,Hao Su,Dragomir Anguelov
title: LESS: Label-Efficient Semantic Segmentation for LiDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: LESS：激光雷达点云的标签高效语义分割
abstract: Semantic segmentation of LiDAR point clouds is an important task in autonomous driving. However, training deep models via conventional supervised methods requires large datasets which are costly to label. It is critical to have label-efficient segmentation approaches to scale up the model to new operational domains or to improve performance on rare cases. While most prior works focus on indoor scenes, we are one of the first to propose a label-efficient semantic segmentation pipeline for outdoor scenes with LiDAR point clouds. Our method co-designs an efficient labeling process with semi/weakly supervised learning and is applicable to nearly any 3D semantic segmentation backbones. Specifically, we leverage geometry patterns in outdoor scenes to have a heuristic pre-segmentation to reduce the manual labeling and jointly design the learning targets with the labeling process. In the learning step, we leverage prototype learning to get more descriptive point embeddings and use multi-scan distillation to exploit richer semantics from temporally aggregated point clouds to boost the performance of single-scan models. Evaluated on the SemanticKITTI and the nuScenes datasets, we show that our proposed method outperforms existing label-efficient methods. With extremely limited human annotations (e.g., 0.1% point labels), our proposed method is even highly competitive compared to the fully supervised counterpart with 100% labels.
summary: Semantic segmentation of LiDAR point clouds is an important task in autonomous driving. However, training deep models via conventional supervised methods requires large datasets which are costly to label. It is critical to have label-efficient segmentation approaches to scale up the model to new operational domains or to improve performance on rare cases. While most prior works focus on indoor scenes, we are one of the first to propose a label-efficient semantic segmentation pipeline for outdoor scenes with LiDAR point clouds. Our method co-designs an efficient labeling process with semi/weakly supervised learning and is applicable to nearly any 3D semantic segmentation backbones. Specifically, we leverage geometry patterns in outdoor scenes to have a heuristic pre-segmentation to reduce the manual labeling and jointly design the learning targets with the labeling process. In the learning step, we leverage prototype learning to get more descriptive point embeddings and use multi-scan distillation to exploit richer semantics from temporally aggregated point clouds to boost the performance of single-scan models. Evaluated on the SemanticKITTI and the nuScenes datasets, we show that our proposed method outperforms existing label-efficient methods. With extremely limited human annotations (e.g., 0.1% point labels), our proposed method is even highly competitive compared to the fully supervised counterpart with 100% labels.
abstract_zh: LiDAR点云的语义分割是自动驾驶中的一项重要任务。然而，通过传统的监督方法训练深度模型需要大量数据集，而标记成本很高。采用标签高效的分割方法将模型扩展到新的操作领域或提高罕见情况下的性能至关重要。虽然大多数先前的工作都集中在室内场景，但我们是第一个为具有 LiDAR 点云的室外场景提出标签高效语义分割管道的人之一。我们的方法通过半/弱监督学习共同设计了一个高效的标记过程，并且适用于几乎所有 3D 语义分割主干。具体来说，我们利用室外场景中的几何图案进行启发式预分割，以减少手动标记，并与标记过程联合设计学习目标。在学习步骤中，我们利用原型学习来获得更具描述性的点嵌入，并使用多扫描蒸馏从时间聚合的点云中利用更丰富的语义来提高单扫描模型的性能。在 SemanticKITTI 和 nuScenes 数据集上进行评估，我们表明我们提出的方法优于现有的标签高效方法。由于人工注释极其有限（例如 0.1% 点标签），我们提出的方法与具有 100% 标签的完全监督对应方法相比甚至具有很强的竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的LiDAR点云语义分割方法，通过减少人工标注需求解决自动驾驶中户外场景的数据标注成本问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法需要大量标注数据，而户外LiDAR点云标注成本高昂且现有研究多集中于室内场景，亟需开发适用于新领域且标注高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合几何先验进行启发式预分割减少标注量，联合设计学习目标与标注流程；采用原型学习优化点嵌入表示，并通过多扫描蒸馏技术增强单帧模型的语义表达能力。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes数据集上优于现有少样本方法，仅用0.1%点标签时性能接近全监督方法（100%标签）。
AI.conclusion: 提出的LESS框架为户外LiDAR分割提供了通用高效的标注节省方案，通过几何先验与多模态蒸馏技术有效提升了低标注场景下的模型性能。

authors_text: Mahyar Najibi,Jingwei Ji,Yin Zhou,Charles R. Qi,Xinchen Yan,Scott Ettinger,Dragomir Anguelov
title: Motion Inspired Unsupervised Perception and Prediction in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 运动启发自动驾驶中的无监督感知和预测
abstract: Learning-based perception and prediction modules in modern autonomous driving systems typically rely on expensive human annotation and are designed to perceive only a handful of predefined object categories. This closed-set paradigm is insufficient for the safety-critical autonomous driving task, where the autonomous vehicle needs to process arbitrarily many types of traffic participants and their motion behaviors in a highly dynamic world. To address this difficulty, this paper pioneers a novel and challenging direction, i.e., training perception and prediction models to understand open-set moving objects, with no human supervision. Our proposed framework uses self-learned flow to trigger an automated meta labeling pipeline to achieve automatic supervision. 3D detection experiments on the Waymo Open Dataset show that our method significantly outperforms classical unsupervised approaches and is even competitive to the counterpart with supervised scene flow. We further show that our approach generates highly promising results in open-set 3D detection and trajectory prediction, confirming its potential in closing the safety gap of fully supervised systems.
summary: Learning-based perception and prediction modules in modern autonomous driving systems typically rely on expensive human annotation and are designed to perceive only a handful of predefined object categories. This closed-set paradigm is insufficient for the safety-critical autonomous driving task, where the autonomous vehicle needs to process arbitrarily many types of traffic participants and their motion behaviors in a highly dynamic world. To address this difficulty, this paper pioneers a novel and challenging direction, i.e., training perception and prediction models to understand open-set moving objects, with no human supervision. Our proposed framework uses self-learned flow to trigger an automated meta labeling pipeline to achieve automatic supervision. 3D detection experiments on the Waymo Open Dataset show that our method significantly outperforms classical unsupervised approaches and is even competitive to the counterpart with supervised scene flow. We further show that our approach generates highly promising results in open-set 3D detection and trajectory prediction, confirming its potential in closing the safety gap of fully supervised systems.
abstract_zh: 现代自动驾驶系统中基于学习的感知和预测模块通常依赖于昂贵的人工注释，并且旨在仅感知少数预定义的对象类别。这种封闭集范例不足以满足安全关键的自动驾驶任务，其中自动驾驶车辆需要在高度动态的世界中处理任意多种类型的交通参与者及其运动行为。为了解决这个困难，本文开创了一个新颖且具有挑战性的方向，即在没有人类监督的情况下训练感知和预测模型来理解开放集移动物体。我们提出的框架使用自学习流程来触发自动元标记管道以实现自动监督。 Waymo 开放数据集上的 3D 检测实验表明，我们的方法显着优于经典的无监督方法，甚至与有监督场景流的方法相比具有竞争力。我们进一步表明，我们的方法在开放集 3D 检测和轨迹预测方面产生了非常有前景的结果，证实了其在缩小完全监督系统的安全差距方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的开放集运动目标感知与预测方法，用于自动驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统依赖昂贵的人工标注和预定义类别，难以应对动态环境中未知交通参与者的安全挑战。
AI.method: 通过自学习的光流触发自动化元标注流程，实现无监督的感知与预测模型训练。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上显著优于经典无监督方法，且性能接近有监督场景流方法，开放集检测与轨迹预测效果突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶系统在无标注条件下处理未知目标提供了安全有效的解决方案。

search_text: Motion Inspired Unsupervised Perception and Prediction in Autonomous Driving 运动启发自动驾驶中的无监督感知和预测 Learning-based perception and prediction modules in modern autonomous driving systems typically rely on expensive human annotation and are designed to perceive only a handful of predefined object categories. This closed-set paradigm is insufficient for the safety-critical autonomous driving task, where the autonomous vehicle needs to process arbitrarily many types of traffic participants and their motion behaviors in a highly dynamic world. To address this difficulty, this paper pioneers a novel and challenging direction, i.e., training perception and prediction models to understand open-set moving objects, with no human supervision. Our proposed framework uses self-learned flow to trigger an automated meta labeling pipeline to achieve automatic supervision. 3D detection experiments on the Waymo Open Dataset show that our method significantly outperforms classical unsupervised approaches and is even competitive to the counterpart with supervised scene flow. We further show that our approach generates highly promising results in open-set 3D detection and trajectory prediction, confirming its potential in closing the safety gap of fully supervised systems. 现代自动驾驶系统中基于学习的感知和预测模块通常依赖于昂贵的人工注释，并且旨在仅感知少数预定义的对象类别。这种封闭集范例不足以满足安全关键的自动驾驶任务，其中自动驾驶车辆需要在高度动态的世界中处理任意多种类型的交通参与者及其运动行为。为了解决这个困难，本文开创了一个新颖且具有挑战性的方向，即在没有人类监督的情况下训练感知和预测模型来理解开放集移动物体。我们提出的框架使用自学习流程来触发自动元标记管道以实现自动监督。 Waymo 开放数据集上的 3D 检测实验表明，我们的方法显着优于经典的无监督方法，甚至与有监督场景流的方法相比具有竞争力。我们进一步表明，我们的方法在开放集 3D 检测和轨迹预测方面产生了非常有前景的结果，证实了其在缩小完全监督系统的安全差距方面的潜力。 本文提出一种无需人工标注的开放集运动目标感知与预测方法，用于自动驾驶场景。 Mahyar Najibi,Jingwei Ji,Yin Zhou,Charles R. Qi,Xinchen Yan,Scott Ettinger,Dragomir Anguelov cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Mehrdad Tavassoli,Sunny Katyara,Maria Pozzi,Nikhil Deshpande,Darwin G. Caldwell,Domenico Prattichizzo
title: Learning Skills from Demonstrations: A Trend from Motion Primitives to Experience Abstraction
title_zh: 从演示中学习技能：从运动基元到体验抽象的趋势
comment: Under Review at IEEE TCDS for future Publication
comments: Under Review at IEEE TCDS for future Publication
abstract: The uses of robots are changing from static environments in factories to encompass novel concepts such as Human-Robot Collaboration in unstructured settings. Pre-programming all the functionalities for robots becomes impractical, and hence, robots need to learn how to react to new events autonomously, just like humans. However, humans, unlike machines, are naturally skilled in responding to unexpected circumstances based on either experiences or observations. Hence, embedding such anthropoid behaviours into robots entails the development of neuro-cognitive models that emulate motor skills under a robot learning paradigm. Effective encoding of these skills is bound to the proper choice of tools and techniques. This paper studies different motion and behaviour learning methods ranging from Movement Primitives (MP) to Experience Abstraction (EA), applied to different robotic tasks. These methods are scrutinized and then experimentally benchmarked by reconstructing a standard pick-n-place task. Apart from providing a standard guideline for the selection of strategies and algorithms, this paper aims to draw a perspectives on their possible extensions and improvements

abstract_zh: 机器人的使用正在从工厂的静态环境转变为包含非结构化环境中的人机协作等新概念。对机器人的所有功能进行预编程变得不切实际，因此，机器人需要学习如何像人类一样自主地对新事件做出反应。然而，与机器不同，人类天生能够根据经验或观察来应对意外情况。因此，将这种类人猿行为嵌入机器人需要开发神经认知模型，在机器人学习范式下模拟运动技能。这些技能的有效编码与工具和技术的正确选择息息相关。本文研究了从运动原语（MP）到经验抽象（EA）的不同运动和行为学习方法，应用于不同的机器人任务。这些方法经过仔细检查，然后通过重建标准的拾放任务进行实验基准测试。除了为策略和算法的选择提供标准指南外，本文还旨在对其可能的扩展和改进提出观点

AI.tldr: 研究从运动原语到经验抽象的不同机器人技能学习方法，并通过标准任务进行实验评估。
AI.motivation: 传统预编程方法难以应对复杂动态环境，机器人需模仿人类通过经验或观察学习新技能的能力。
AI.method: 对比分析运动原语（MP）与经验抽象（EA）等方法，通过重建标准抓取任务进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验比较了不同方法的性能，为策略选择提供标准指南，并指出其可能的改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法各有优劣，未来需结合具体任务优化模型，以提升机器人自主适应复杂环境的能力。

authors_text: Rebecca M. M. Hicke,Maanya Goenka,Eric Alexander
title: Word Clouds in the Wild
title_zh: 野外的词云
abstract: Word clouds are frequently used to analyze and communicate text data in many domains. In order to help guide research on improving the legibility of word clouds, we have conducted a survey of their usage in Digital Humanities academia and journalism. Using a modified grounded theory approach, we sought to identify the most common purposes for which word clouds were employed and the most common visual encodings they contained. Our findings indicate that font size, color, and word placement dominate as the primary data-encoding channels, as we hypothesized. Perhaps more surprisingly, we found that asking viewers to perform analytical tasks with word clouds was relatively common, especially in DH sources. This suggests that research into the interactions of these visual encoding channels (particularly in regards to legibility) is warranted.
summary: Word clouds are frequently used to analyze and communicate text data in many domains. In order to help guide research on improving the legibility of word clouds, we have conducted a survey of their usage in Digital Humanities academia and journalism. Using a modified grounded theory approach, we sought to identify the most common purposes for which word clouds were employed and the most common visual encodings they contained. Our findings indicate that font size, color, and word placement dominate as the primary data-encoding channels, as we hypothesized. Perhaps more surprisingly, we found that asking viewers to perform analytical tasks with word clouds was relatively common, especially in DH sources. This suggests that research into the interactions of these visual encoding channels (particularly in regards to legibility) is warranted.
abstract_zh: 词云经常用于分析和交流许多领域的文本数据。为了帮助指导提高词云易读性的研究，我们对其在数字人文学术界和新闻界的使用进行了调查。使用修改后的扎根理论方法，我们试图确定使用词云的最常见目的以及它们包含的最常见的视觉编码。我们的研究结果表明，正如我们假设的那样，字体大小、颜色和单词位置是主要的数据编码通道。也许更令人惊讶的是，我们发现要求观众使用词云执行分析任务相对常见，尤其是在 DH 来源中。这表明有必要研究这些视觉编码通道的相互作用（特别是在易读性方面）。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查数字人文领域和新闻业中词云的使用情况，旨在为提升词云可读性提供研究指导。
AI.motivation: 词云被广泛用于文本数据分析和沟通，但其可读性仍有待改进，需了解其使用场景和视觉编码方式。
AI.method: 采用改进的扎根理论方法，对数字人文领域和新闻业中的词云使用情况进行调查分析。
AI.result: 发现字体大小、颜色和词语布局是主要数据编码渠道，且要求观众执行分析任务的情况在数字人文领域较为普遍。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究这些视觉编码渠道的交互作用，特别是对可读性的影响。

authors_text: Ghazal Alinezhad Noghre,Vinit Katariya,Armin Danesh Pazho,Christopher Neff,Hamed Tabkhi
title: Pishgu: Universal Path Prediction Network Architecture for Real-time Cyber-physical Edge Systems
title_zh: Pishgu：实时网络物理边缘系统的通用路径预测网络架构
abstract: Path prediction is an essential task for many real-world Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) applications, from autonomous driving and traffic monitoring/management to pedestrian/worker safety. These real-world CPS applications need a robust, lightweight path prediction that can provide a universal network architecture for multiple subjects (e.g., pedestrians and vehicles) from different perspectives. However, most existing algorithms are tailor-made for a unique subject with a specific camera perspective and scenario. This article presents Pishgu, a universal lightweight network architecture, as a robust and holistic solution for path prediction. Pishgu's architecture can adapt to multiple path prediction domains with different subjects (vehicles, pedestrians), perspectives (bird's-eye, high-angle), and scenes (sidewalk, highway). Our proposed architecture captures the inter-dependencies within the subjects in each frame by taking advantage of Graph Isomorphism Networks and the attention module. We separately train and evaluate the efficacy of our architecture on three different CPS domains across multiple perspectives (vehicle bird's-eye view, pedestrian bird's-eye view, and human high-angle view). Pishgu outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in the vehicle bird's-eye view domain by 42% and 61% and pedestrian high-angle view domain by 23% and 22% in terms of ADE and FDE, respectively. Additionally, we analyze the domain-specific details for various datasets to understand their effect on path prediction and model interpretation. Finally, we report the latency and throughput for all three domains on multiple embedded platforms showcasing the robustness and adaptability of Pishgu for real-world integration into CPS applications.
summary: Path prediction is an essential task for many real-world Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) applications, from autonomous driving and traffic monitoring/management to pedestrian/worker safety. These real-world CPS applications need a robust, lightweight path prediction that can provide a universal network architecture for multiple subjects (e.g., pedestrians and vehicles) from different perspectives. However, most existing algorithms are tailor-made for a unique subject with a specific camera perspective and scenario. This article presents Pishgu, a universal lightweight network architecture, as a robust and holistic solution for path prediction. Pishgu's architecture can adapt to multiple path prediction domains with different subjects (vehicles, pedestrians), perspectives (bird's-eye, high-angle), and scenes (sidewalk, highway). Our proposed architecture captures the inter-dependencies within the subjects in each frame by taking advantage of Graph Isomorphism Networks and the attention module. We separately train and evaluate the efficacy of our architecture on three different CPS domains across multiple perspectives (vehicle bird's-eye view, pedestrian bird's-eye view, and human high-angle view). Pishgu outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in the vehicle bird's-eye view domain by 42% and 61% and pedestrian high-angle view domain by 23% and 22% in terms of ADE and FDE, respectively. Additionally, we analyze the domain-specific details for various datasets to understand their effect on path prediction and model interpretation. Finally, we report the latency and throughput for all three domains on multiple embedded platforms showcasing the robustness and adaptability of Pishgu for real-world integration into CPS applications.
abstract_zh: 路径预测是许多现实世界的网络物理系统 (CPS) 应用的一项基本任务，从自动驾驶和交通监控/管理到行人/工人安全。这些现实世界的 CPS 应用需要一个强大的、轻量级的路径预测，可以从不同的角度为多个主体（例如行人和车辆）提供通用的网络架构。然而，大多数现有算法都是针对具有特定相机视角和场景的独特主题量身定制的。本文介绍了 Pishgu，一种通用的轻量级网络架构，作为路径预测的强大且整体的解决方案。 Pishgu 的架构可以适应不同主体（车辆、行人）、视角（鸟瞰、高角度）和场景（人行道、高速公路）的多个路径预测域。我们提出的架构通过利用图同构网络和注意力模块来捕获每个框架中主题内的相互依赖关系。我们在多个视角（车辆鸟瞰图、行人鸟瞰图和人体高角度视图）的三个不同 CPS 域上分别训练和评估我们的架构的功效。就 ADE 和 FDE 而言，Pishgu 在车辆鸟瞰视野领域比最先进的解决方案分别高出 42% 和 61%，在行人高角度视野领域比最先进的解决方案高出 23% 和 22%。此外，我们分析各种数据集的特定领域细节，以了解它们对路径预测和模型解释的影响。最后，我们报告了多个嵌入式平台上所有三个域的延迟和吞吐量，展示了 Pishgu 在实际集成到 CPS 应用程序中的稳健性和适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Pishgu的通用轻量级网络架构，用于实时网络物理系统中的路径预测任务，能够适应不同主体、视角和场景。
AI.motivation: 现有路径预测算法通常针对特定主体和视角设计，缺乏通用性和适应性，难以满足多场景、多主体的实时需求。
AI.method: 结合图同构网络与注意力模块，捕捉帧内主体间的依赖关系，并在三个不同CPS领域（车辆鸟瞰、行人鸟瞰、人高角度视图）进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 在车辆鸟瞰领域ADE/FDE指标优于现有方法42%/61%，在行人高角度视图领域提升23%/22%，并在嵌入式平台展示低延迟与高吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: Pishgu通过通用架构设计与跨领域优化，验证了其在实时网络物理系统中的鲁棒性与适应性，为多场景路径预测提供有效解决方案。

search_text: Pishgu: Universal Path Prediction Network Architecture for Real-time Cyber-physical Edge Systems Pishgu：实时网络物理边缘系统的通用路径预测网络架构 Path prediction is an essential task for many real-world Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) applications, from autonomous driving and traffic monitoring/management to pedestrian/worker safety. These real-world CPS applications need a robust, lightweight path prediction that can provide a universal network architecture for multiple subjects (e.g., pedestrians and vehicles) from different perspectives. However, most existing algorithms are tailor-made for a unique subject with a specific camera perspective and scenario. This article presents Pishgu, a universal lightweight network architecture, as a robust and holistic solution for path prediction. Pishgu's architecture can adapt to multiple path prediction domains with different subjects (vehicles, pedestrians), perspectives (bird's-eye, high-angle), and scenes (sidewalk, highway). Our proposed architecture captures the inter-dependencies within the subjects in each frame by taking advantage of Graph Isomorphism Networks and the attention module. We separately train and evaluate the efficacy of our architecture on three different CPS domains across multiple perspectives (vehicle bird's-eye view, pedestrian bird's-eye view, and human high-angle view). Pishgu outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in the vehicle bird's-eye view domain by 42% and 61% and pedestrian high-angle view domain by 23% and 22% in terms of ADE and FDE, respectively. Additionally, we analyze the domain-specific details for various datasets to understand their effect on path prediction and model interpretation. Finally, we report the latency and throughput for all three domains on multiple embedded platforms showcasing the robustness and adaptability of Pishgu for real-world integration into CPS applications. 路径预测是许多现实世界的网络物理系统 (CPS) 应用的一项基本任务，从自动驾驶和交通监控/管理到行人/工人安全。这些现实世界的 CPS 应用需要一个强大的、轻量级的路径预测，可以从不同的角度为多个主体（例如行人和车辆）提供通用的网络架构。然而，大多数现有算法都是针对具有特定相机视角和场景的独特主题量身定制的。本文介绍了 Pishgu，一种通用的轻量级网络架构，作为路径预测的强大且整体的解决方案。 Pishgu 的架构可以适应不同主体（车辆、行人）、视角（鸟瞰、高角度）和场景（人行道、高速公路）的多个路径预测域。我们提出的架构通过利用图同构网络和注意力模块来捕获每个框架中主题内的相互依赖关系。我们在多个视角（车辆鸟瞰图、行人鸟瞰图和人体高角度视图）的三个不同 CPS 域上分别训练和评估我们的架构的功效。就 ADE 和 FDE 而言，Pishgu 在车辆鸟瞰视野领域比最先进的解决方案分别高出 42% 和 61%，在行人高角度视野领域比最先进的解决方案高出 23% 和 22%。此外，我们分析各种数据集的特定领域细节，以了解它们对路径预测和模型解释的影响。最后，我们报告了多个嵌入式平台上所有三个域的延迟和吞吐量，展示了 Pishgu 在实际集成到 CPS 应用程序中的稳健性和适应性。 本文提出了一种名为Pishgu的通用轻量级网络架构，用于实时网络物理系统中的路径预测任务，能够适应不同主体、视角和场景。 Ghazal Alinezhad Noghre,Vinit Katariya,Armin Danesh Pazho,Christopher Neff,Hamed Tabkhi cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Haomiao Ni,Yuan Xue,Liya Ma,Qian Zhang,Xiaoye Li,Xiaolei Huang
title: Semi-supervised Body Parsing and Pose Estimation for Enhancing Infant General Movement Assessment
title_zh: 用于增强婴儿一般运动评估的半监督身体解析和姿势估计
abstract: General movement assessment (GMA) of infant movement videos (IMVs) is an effective method for early detection of cerebral palsy (CP) in infants. We demonstrate in this paper that end-to-end trainable neural networks for image sequence recognition can be applied to achieve good results in GMA, and more importantly, augmenting raw video with infant body parsing and pose estimation information can significantly improve performance. To solve the problem of efficiently utilizing partially labeled IMVs for body parsing, we propose a semi-supervised model, termed SiamParseNet (SPN), which consists of two branches, one for intra-frame body parts segmentation and another for inter-frame label propagation. During training, the two branches are jointly trained by alternating between using input pairs of only labeled frames and input of both labeled and unlabeled frames. We also investigate training data augmentation by proposing a factorized video generative adversarial network (FVGAN) to synthesize novel labeled frames for training. When testing, we employ a multi-source inference mechanism, where the final result for a test frame is either obtained via the segmentation branch or via propagation from a nearby key frame. We conduct extensive experiments for body parsing using SPN on two infant movement video datasets, where SPN coupled with FVGAN achieves state-of-the-art performance. We further demonstrate that SPN can be easily adapted to the infant pose estimation task with superior performance. Last but not least, we explore the clinical application of our method for GMA. We collected a new clinical IMV dataset with GMA annotations, and our experiments show that SPN models for body parsing and pose estimation trained on the first two datasets generalize well to the new clinical dataset and their results can significantly boost the CRNN-based GMA prediction performance.
summary: General movement assessment (GMA) of infant movement videos (IMVs) is an effective method for early detection of cerebral palsy (CP) in infants. We demonstrate in this paper that end-to-end trainable neural networks for image sequence recognition can be applied to achieve good results in GMA, and more importantly, augmenting raw video with infant body parsing and pose estimation information can significantly improve performance. To solve the problem of efficiently utilizing partially labeled IMVs for body parsing, we propose a semi-supervised model, termed SiamParseNet (SPN), which consists of two branches, one for intra-frame body parts segmentation and another for inter-frame label propagation. During training, the two branches are jointly trained by alternating between using input pairs of only labeled frames and input of both labeled and unlabeled frames. We also investigate training data augmentation by proposing a factorized video generative adversarial network (FVGAN) to synthesize novel labeled frames for training. When testing, we employ a multi-source inference mechanism, where the final result for a test frame is either obtained via the segmentation branch or via propagation from a nearby key frame. We conduct extensive experiments for body parsing using SPN on two infant movement video datasets, where SPN coupled with FVGAN achieves state-of-the-art performance. We further demonstrate that SPN can be easily adapted to the infant pose estimation task with superior performance. Last but not least, we explore the clinical application of our method for GMA. We collected a new clinical IMV dataset with GMA annotations, and our experiments show that SPN models for body parsing and pose estimation trained on the first two datasets generalize well to the new clinical dataset and their results can significantly boost the CRNN-based GMA prediction performance.
abstract_zh: 婴儿运动视频（IMV）的一般运动评估（GMA）是早期发现婴儿脑瘫（CP）的有效方法。我们在本文中证明，用于图像序列识别的端到端可训练神经网络可以在 GMA 中取得良好的结果，更重要的是，使用婴儿身体解析和姿势估计信息增强原始视频可以显着提高性能。为了解决有效利用部分标记的 IMV 进行身体解析的问题，我们提出了一种半监督模型，称为 SiamParseNet (SPN)，它由两个分支组成，一个用于帧内身体部位分割，另一个用于帧间标签传播。在训练期间，通过交替使用仅标记帧的输入对和标记帧和未标记帧的输入来联合训练两个分支。我们还通过提出分解视频生成对抗网络（FVGAN）来合成新的标记帧进行训练来研究训练数据增强。在测试时，我们采用多源推理机制，其中测试帧的最终结果要么通过分割分支获得，要么通过从附近关键帧的传播获得。我们在两个婴儿运动视频数据集上使用 SPN 进行了广泛的身体解析实验，其中 SPN 与 FVGAN 结合实现了最先进的性能。我们进一步证明 SPN 可以轻松适应婴儿姿势估计任务，并具有卓越的性能。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们探索了我们的 GMA 方法的临床应用。我们收集了带有 GMA 注释的新临床 IMV 数据集，我们的实验表明，在前两个数据集上训练的用于身体解析和姿势估计的 SPN 模型可以很好地推广到新的临床数据集，其结果可以显着提高基于 CRNN 的 GMA 预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出半监督身体解析和姿态估计方法以提升婴儿运动评估（GMA）的准确性，从而更早检测脑瘫（CP）。
AI.motivation: 现有GMA方法依赖人工分析，效率低且易出错。利用深度学习结合身体解析与姿态信息可提升性能，但婴儿视频数据标注成本高且标签不完整。
AI.method: 设计半监督模型SiamParseNet（SPN），包含帧内分割分支与帧间标签传播分支，并结合FVGAN生成对抗网络扩充训练数据，测试时采用多源推理机制。
AI.result: SPN在两个婴儿运动视频数据集上实现身体解析和姿态估计的最先进性能，且在新临床数据集上显著提升基于CRNN的GMA预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习与数据增强策略有效提升GMA自动化水平，为临床脑瘫早期筛查提供可靠技术支撑。

We conduct extensive experiments for body parsing using SPN on two infant movement video datasets, where SPN coupled with FVGAN achieves state-of-the-art performance. We further demonstrate that SPN can be easily adapted to the infant pose estimation task with superior performance. Last but not least, we explore the clinical application of our method for GMA. We collected a new clinical IMV dataset with GMA annotations, and our experiments show that SPN models for body parsing and pose estimation trained on the first two datasets generalize well to the new clinical dataset and their results can significantly boost the CRNN-based GMA prediction performance. 婴儿运动视频（IMV）的一般运动评估（GMA）是早期发现婴儿脑瘫（CP）的有效方法。我们在本文中证明，用于图像序列识别的端到端可训练神经网络可以在 GMA 中取得良好的结果，更重要的是，使用婴儿身体解析和姿势估计信息增强原始视频可以显着提高性能。为了解决有效利用部分标记的 IMV 进行身体解析的问题，我们提出了一种半监督模型，称为 SiamParseNet (SPN)，它由两个分支组成，一个用于帧内身体部位分割，另一个用于帧间标签传播。在训练期间，通过交替使用仅标记帧的输入对和标记帧和未标记帧的输入来联合训练两个分支。我们还通过提出分解视频生成对抗网络（FVGAN）来合成新的标记帧进行训练来研究训练数据增强。在测试时，我们采用多源推理机制，其中测试帧的最终结果要么通过分割分支获得，要么通过从附近关键帧的传播获得。我们在两个婴儿运动视频数据集上使用 SPN 进行了广泛的身体解析实验，其中 SPN 与 FVGAN 结合实现了最先进的性能。我们进一步证明 SPN 可以轻松适应婴儿姿势估计任务，并具有卓越的性能。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们探索了我们的 GMA 方法的临床应用。我们收集了带有 GMA 注释的新临床 IMV 数据集，我们的实验表明，在前两个数据集上训练的用于身体解析和姿势估计的 SPN 模型可以很好地推广到新的临床数据集，其结果可以显着提高基于 CRNN 的 GMA 预测性能。 本文提出半监督身体解析和姿态估计方法以提升婴儿运动评估（GMA）的准确性，从而更早检测脑瘫（CP）。 Haomiao Ni,Yuan Xue,Liya Ma,Qian Zhang,Xiaoye Li,Xiaolei Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Jinmeng Rao,Song Gao,Michelle Miller,Alfonso Morales
title: Measuring Network Resilience via Geospatial Knowledge Graph: a Case Study of the US Multi-Commodity Flow Network
title_zh: 通过地理空间知识图测量网络弹性：美国多商品流网络案例研究
abstract: Quantifying the resilience in the food system is important for food security issues. In this work, we present a geospatial knowledge graph (GeoKG)-based method for measuring the resilience of a multi-commodity flow network. Specifically, we develop a CFS-GeoKG ontology to describe geospatial semantics of a multi-commodity flow network comprehensively, and design resilience metrics that measure the node-level and network-level dependence of single-sourcing, distant, or non-adjacent suppliers/customers in food supply chains. We conduct a case study of the US state-level agricultural multi-commodity flow network with hierarchical commodity types. The results indicate that, by leveraging GeoKG, our method supports measuring both node-level and network-level resilience across space and over time and also helps discover concentration patterns of agricultural resources in the spatial network at different geographic scales.
summary: Quantifying the resilience in the food system is important for food security issues. In this work, we present a geospatial knowledge graph (GeoKG)-based method for measuring the resilience of a multi-commodity flow network. Specifically, we develop a CFS-GeoKG ontology to describe geospatial semantics of a multi-commodity flow network comprehensively, and design resilience metrics that measure the node-level and network-level dependence of single-sourcing, distant, or non-adjacent suppliers/customers in food supply chains. We conduct a case study of the US state-level agricultural multi-commodity flow network with hierarchical commodity types. The results indicate that, by leveraging GeoKG, our method supports measuring both node-level and network-level resilience across space and over time and also helps discover concentration patterns of agricultural resources in the spatial network at different geographic scales.
abstract_zh: 量化粮食系统的弹性对于粮食安全问题非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于地理空间知识图（GeoKG）的方法，用于测量多商品流网络的弹性。具体来说，我们开发了 CFS-GeoKG 本体来全面描述多商品流动网络的地理空间语义，并设计弹性指标来衡量食品供应链中单一来源、遥远或不相邻的供应商/客户的节点级和网络级依赖性。我们对美国州级农产品多商品流动网络进行了案例研究，其中商品类型分层。结果表明，通过利用 GeoKG，我们的方法支持测量跨空间和时间的节点级和网络级弹性，还有助于发现不同地理尺度的空间网络中农业资源的集中模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于地理知识图谱（GeoKG）的方法，用于衡量美国多商品流网络的韧性，特别是在食品供应链中的节点级和网络级韧性。
AI.motivation: 量化食品系统的韧性对于保障粮食安全至关重要，现有方法难以全面评估多商品流网络的地理空间依赖性。
AI.method: 构建CFS-GeoKG本体描述多商品流网络的地理语义，设计节点级和网络级韧性指标，分析单一来源、远距离或非邻近供应商/客户的影响。
AI.result: 案例研究表明，该方法能有效测量美国州级农业网络在时空维度的韧性，并揭示不同地理尺度下农业资源的集中模式。
AI.conclusion: GeoKG方法为多商品流网络的韧性分析提供了新工具，有助于识别食品供应链中的脆弱性与资源分布特征。

authors_text: Yunlei Liang,Jiawei Zhu,Wen Ye,Song Gao
title: Region2Vec: Community Detection on Spatial Networks Using Graph Embedding with Node Attributes and Spatial Interactions
title_zh: Region2Vec：使用具有节点属性和空间交互的图嵌入进行空间网络的社区检测
abstract: Community Detection algorithms are used to detect densely connected components in complex networks and reveal underlying relationships among components. As a special type of networks, spatial networks are usually generated by the connections among geographic regions. Identifying the spatial network communities can help reveal the spatial interaction patterns, understand the hidden regional structures and support regional development decision-making. Given the recent development of Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) and its powerful performance in identifying multi-scale spatial interactions, we proposed an unsupervised GCN-based community detection method "region2vec" on spatial networks. Our method first generates node embeddings for regions that share common attributes and have intense spatial interactions, and then applies clustering algorithms to detect communities based on their embedding similarity and spatial adjacency. Experimental results show that while existing methods trade off either attribute similarities or spatial interactions for one another, "region2vec" maintains a great balance between both and performs the best when one wants to maximize both attribute similarities and spatial interactions within communities.
summary: Community Detection algorithms are used to detect densely connected components in complex networks and reveal underlying relationships among components. As a special type of networks, spatial networks are usually generated by the connections among geographic regions. Identifying the spatial network communities can help reveal the spatial interaction patterns, understand the hidden regional structures and support regional development decision-making. Given the recent development of Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) and its powerful performance in identifying multi-scale spatial interactions, we proposed an unsupervised GCN-based community detection method "region2vec" on spatial networks. Our method first generates node embeddings for regions that share common attributes and have intense spatial interactions, and then applies clustering algorithms to detect communities based on their embedding similarity and spatial adjacency. Experimental results show that while existing methods trade off either attribute similarities or spatial interactions for one another, "region2vec" maintains a great balance between both and performs the best when one wants to maximize both attribute similarities and spatial interactions within communities.
abstract_zh: 社区检测算法用于检测复杂网络中密集连接的组件并揭示组件之间的潜在关系。空间网络作为一种特殊类型的网络，通常是由地理区域之间的联系生成的。识别空间网络群落有助于揭示空间相互作用模式、了解隐藏的区域结构、支持区域发展决策。鉴于图卷积网络（GCN）的最新发展及其在识别多尺度空间交互方面的强大性能，我们提出了一种基于GCN的无监督空间网络社区检测方法“region2vec”。我们的方法首先为共享共同属性且具有强烈空间交互的区域生成节点嵌入，然后应用聚类算法根据嵌入相似性和空间邻接性来检测社区。实验结果表明，虽然现有方法在属性相似性或空间交互性之间进行权衡，但“region2vec”在两者之间保持了良好的平衡，并且当人们想要最大化社区内的属性相似性和空间交互性时表现最好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的无监督社区检测方法Region2Vec，用于在空间网络中同时考虑节点属性和空间交互关系。
AI.motivation: 现有空间网络社区检测方法难以同时有效平衡节点属性相似性与空间交互关系，导致社区划分效果受限。
AI.method: 通过生成融合节点属性和空间交互的嵌入表示，结合聚类算法实现社区检测，兼顾嵌入相似性与空间邻接性。
AI.result: 实验表明Region2Vec在保持属性相似性与空间交互平衡性方面优于现有方法，尤其在需最大化两者时表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: Region2Vec通过整合属性与空间信息，为复杂空间网络的社区检测提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Po-Sheng Liu,Fu-Jen Tsai,Yan-Tsung Peng,Chung-Chi Tsai,Chia-Wen Lin,Yen-Yu Lin
title: Meta Transferring for Deblurring
title_zh: 用于去模糊的元传输
abstract: Most previous deblurring methods were built with a generic model trained on blurred images and their sharp counterparts. However, these approaches might have sub-optimal deblurring results due to the domain gap between the training and test sets. This paper proposes a reblur-deblur meta-transferring scheme to realize test-time adaptation without using ground truth for dynamic scene deblurring. Since the ground truth is usually unavailable at inference time in a real-world scenario, we leverage the blurred input video to find and use relatively sharp patches as the pseudo ground truth. Furthermore, we propose a reblurring model to extract the homogenous blur from the blurred input and transfer it to the pseudo-sharps to obtain the corresponding pseudo-blurred patches for meta-learning and test-time adaptation with only a few gradient updates. Extensive experimental results show that our reblur-deblur meta-learning scheme can improve state-of-the-art deblurring models on the DVD, REDS, and RealBlur benchmark datasets.
summary: Most previous deblurring methods were built with a generic model trained on blurred images and their sharp counterparts. However, these approaches might have sub-optimal deblurring results due to the domain gap between the training and test sets. This paper proposes a reblur-deblur meta-transferring scheme to realize test-time adaptation without using ground truth for dynamic scene deblurring. Since the ground truth is usually unavailable at inference time in a real-world scenario, we leverage the blurred input video to find and use relatively sharp patches as the pseudo ground truth. Furthermore, we propose a reblurring model to extract the homogenous blur from the blurred input and transfer it to the pseudo-sharps to obtain the corresponding pseudo-blurred patches for meta-learning and test-time adaptation with only a few gradient updates. Extensive experimental results show that our reblur-deblur meta-learning scheme can improve state-of-the-art deblurring models on the DVD, REDS, and RealBlur benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 以前的大多数去模糊方法都是使用在模糊图像及其清晰对应图像上训练的通用模型构建的。然而，由于训练集和测试集之间的域差距，这些方法可能会产生次优的去模糊结果。本文提出了一种再模糊-去模糊元传输方案，以在不使用动态场景去模糊的地面实况的情况下实现测试时间自适应。由于在现实场景中的推理时，地面事实通常不可用，因此我们利用模糊的输入视频来查找并使用相对清晰的补丁作为伪地面事实。此外，我们提出了一种重新模糊模型，从模糊输入中提取同质模糊并将其转移到伪锐器，以获得相应的伪模糊补丁，用于元学习和测试时适应，只需少量梯度更新。大量的实验结果表明，我们的 reblur-deblur 元学习方案可以改进 DVD、REDS 和 RealBlur 基准数据集上最先进的去模糊模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需真实标签的元迁移方法，通过动态场景去模糊中的测试时自适应解决领域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 传统去模糊方法因训练与测试集的领域差距导致效果不佳，而实际场景中推理时通常缺乏真实标签。
AI.method: 利用模糊视频中的相对清晰块作为伪标签，并通过重新模糊模型生成伪模糊块，结合元学习实现测试时自适应。
AI.result: 在DVD、REDS和RealBlur数据集上显著提升了现有去模糊模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了领域差距问题，为实际动态场景的去模糊任务提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: Meta Transferring for Deblurring 用于去模糊的元传输 Most previous deblurring methods were built with a generic model trained on blurred images and their sharp counterparts. However, these approaches might have sub-optimal deblurring results due to the domain gap between the training and test sets. This paper proposes a reblur-deblur meta-transferring scheme to realize test-time adaptation without using ground truth for dynamic scene deblurring. Since the ground truth is usually unavailable at inference time in a real-world scenario, we leverage the blurred input video to find and use relatively sharp patches as the pseudo ground truth. Furthermore, we propose a reblurring model to extract the homogenous blur from the blurred input and transfer it to the pseudo-sharps to obtain the corresponding pseudo-blurred patches for meta-learning and test-time adaptation with only a few gradient updates. Extensive experimental results show that our reblur-deblur meta-learning scheme can improve state-of-the-art deblurring models on the DVD, REDS, and RealBlur benchmark datasets. 以前的大多数去模糊方法都是使用在模糊图像及其清晰对应图像上训练的通用模型构建的。然而，由于训练集和测试集之间的域差距，这些方法可能会产生次优的去模糊结果。本文提出了一种再模糊-去模糊元传输方案，以在不使用动态场景去模糊的地面实况的情况下实现测试时间自适应。由于在现实场景中的推理时，地面事实通常不可用，因此我们利用模糊的输入视频来查找并使用相对清晰的补丁作为伪地面事实。此外，我们提出了一种重新模糊模型，从模糊输入中提取同质模糊并将其转移到伪锐器，以获得相应的伪模糊补丁，用于元学习和测试时适应，只需少量梯度更新。大量的实验结果表明，我们的 reblur-deblur 元学习方案可以改进 DVD、REDS 和 RealBlur 基准数据集上最先进的去模糊模型。 本文提出一种无需真实标签的元迁移方法，通过动态场景去模糊中的测试时自适应解决领域差距问题。 Po-Sheng Liu,Fu-Jen Tsai,Yan-Tsung Peng,Chung-Chi Tsai,Chia-Wen Lin,Yen-Yu Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Nasim Rahaman,Martin Weiss,Francesco Locatello,Chris Pal,Yoshua Bengio,Bernhard Schölkopf,Li Erran Li,Nicolas Ballas
title: Neural Attentive Circuits
title_zh: 神经注意力回路
abstract: Recent work has seen the development of general purpose neural architectures that can be trained to perform tasks across diverse data modalities. General purpose models typically make few assumptions about the underlying data-structure and are known to perform well in the large-data regime. At the same time, there has been growing interest in modular neural architectures that represent the data using sparsely interacting modules. These models can be more robust out-of-distribution, computationally efficient, and capable of sample-efficient adaptation to new data. However, they tend to make domain-specific assumptions about the data, and present challenges in how module behavior (i.e., parameterization) and connectivity (i.e., their layout) can be jointly learned. In this work, we introduce a general purpose, yet modular neural architecture called Neural Attentive Circuits (NACs) that jointly learns the parameterization and a sparse connectivity of neural modules without using domain knowledge. NACs are best understood as the combination of two systems that are jointly trained end-to-end: one that determines the module configuration and the other that executes it on an input. We demonstrate qualitatively that NACs learn diverse and meaningful module configurations on the NLVR2 dataset without additional supervision. Quantitatively, we show that by incorporating modularity in this way, NACs improve upon a strong non-modular baseline in terms of low-shot adaptation on CIFAR and CUBs dataset by about 10%, and OOD robustness on Tiny ImageNet-R by about 2.5%. Further, we find that NACs can achieve an 8x speedup at inference time while losing less than 3% performance. Finally, we find NACs to yield competitive results on diverse data modalities spanning point-cloud classification, symbolic processing and text-classification from ASCII bytes, thereby confirming its general purpose nature.

General purpose models typically make few assumptions about the underlying data-structure and are known to perform well in the large-data regime. However, they tend to make domain-specific assumptions about the data, and present challenges in how module behavior (i.e., parameterization) and connectivity (i.e., their layout) can be jointly learned. In this work, we introduce a general purpose, yet modular neural architecture called Neural Attentive Circuits (NACs) that jointly learns the parameterization and a sparse connectivity of neural modules without using domain knowledge. NACs are best understood as the combination of two systems that are jointly trained end-to-end: one that determines the module configuration and the other that executes it on an input. We demonstrate qualitatively that NACs learn diverse and meaningful module configurations on the NLVR2 dataset without additional supervision. Quantitatively, we show that by incorporating modularity in this way, NACs improve upon a strong non-modular baseline in terms of low-shot adaptation on CIFAR and CUBs dataset by about 10%, and OOD robustness on Tiny ImageNet-R by about 2.5%. Finally, we find NACs to yield competitive results on diverse data modalities spanning point-cloud classification, symbolic processing and text-classification from ASCII bytes, thereby confirming its general purpose nature.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作已经看到了通用神经架构的发展，这些架构可以被训练来跨不同的数据模式执行任务。通用模型通常对底层数据结构做出很少的假设，并且已知在大数据环境中表现良好。与此同时，人们对使用稀疏交互模块表示数据的模块化神经架构越来越感兴趣。这些模型可以更加稳健的分布外、计算效率高，并且能够样本有效地适应新数据。然而，它们倾向于对数据做出特定领域的假设，并在如何共同学习模块行为（即参数化）和连接性（即它们的布局）方面提出了挑战。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种通用的模块化神经架构，称为神经注意电路（NAC），它可以在不使用领域知识的情况下共同学习神经模块的参数化和稀疏连接。 NAC 最好理解为两个端到端联合训练的系统的组合：一个确定模块配置，另一个在输入上执行该配置。我们定性地证明 NAC 在 NLVR2 数据集上学习多样化且有意义的模块配置，而无需额外的监督。定量地表明，通过以这种方式合并模块化，NAC 在 CIFAR 和 CUB 数据集上的低样本适应方面比强大的非模块化基线提高了约 10%，在 Tiny ImageNet-R 上的 OOD 鲁棒性提高了约 2.5%。此外，我们发现 NAC 可以在推理时间实现 8 倍的加速，同时性能损失不到 3%。最后，我们发现 NAC 在点云分类、符号处理和 ASCII 字节文本分类等多种数据模式上产生有竞争力的结果，从而证实了其通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为神经注意力电路（NACs）的新型神经网络架构，该架构结合了通用性和模块化特性，能够联合学习模块参数化和稀疏连接结构。
AI.motivation: 通用神经网络在大数据下表现良好但缺乏领域假设，而模块化架构虽具鲁棒性和效率却依赖领域知识且难以联合学习模块行为与连接方式。
AI.method: 设计端到端联合训练的双系统：一个确定模块配置，另一个执行输入处理，无需领域知识即可学习模块参数化与稀疏连接。
AI.result: 在NLVR2数据集上展示多样化模块配置，在CIFAR和CUBs数据集上低样本适应性提升约10%，在Tiny ImageNet-R上分布外鲁棒性提升2.5%，推理速度提升8倍且性能损失低于3%。
AI.conclusion: NACs验证了其作为通用架构的跨模态能力，在点云分类、符号处理和文本分类等任务中均表现优异。

authors_text: Nils Quetschlich,Lukas Burgholzer,Robert Wille
title: Predicting Good Quantum Circuit Compilation Options
title_zh: 预测良好的量子电路编译选项
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures, minor changes, to be published at IEEE International Conference on Quantum Software (QSW), 2023
comments: 11 pages, 6 figures, minor changes, to be published at IEEE International Conference on Quantum Software (QSW), 2023
abstract: Any potential application of quantum computing, once encoded as a quantum circuit, needs to be compiled in order to be executed on a quantum computer. Deciding which qubit technology, which device, which compiler, and which corresponding settings are best for the considered problem -- according to a measure of goodness -- requires expert knowledge and is overwhelming for end-users from different domains trying to use quantum computing to their advantage. In this work, we treat the problem as a statistical classification task and explore the utilization of supervised machine learning techniques to optimize the compilation of quantum circuits. Based on that, we propose a framework that, given a quantum circuit, predicts the best combination of these options and, therefore, automatically makes these decisions for end-users. Experimental evaluations show that, considering a prototypical setting with 3000 quantum circuits, the proposed framework yields promising results: for more than three quarters of all unseen test circuits, the best combination of compilation options is determined. Moreover, for more than 95% of the circuits, a combination of compilation options within the top-three is determined -- while the median compilation time is reduced by more than one order of magnitude. Furthermore, the resulting methodology not only provides end-users with a prediction of the best compilation options, but also provides means to extract explicit knowledge from the machine learning technique. This knowledge helps in two ways: it lays the foundation for further applications of machine learning in this domain and, also, allows one to quickly verify whether a machine learning algorithm is reasonably trained. The corresponding framework and the pre-trained classifier are publicly available on GitHub (https://github.com/cda-tum/MQTPredictor) as part of the Munich Quantum Toolkit (MQT).

Deciding which qubit technology, which device, which compiler, and which corresponding settings are best for the considered problem -- according to a measure of goodness -- requires expert knowledge and is overwhelming for end-users from different domains trying to use quantum computing to their advantage. In this work, we treat the problem as a statistical classification task and explore the utilization of supervised machine learning techniques to optimize the compilation of quantum circuits. Based on that, we propose a framework that, given a quantum circuit, predicts the best combination of these options and, therefore, automatically makes these decisions for end-users. Experimental evaluations show that, considering a prototypical setting with 3000 quantum circuits, the proposed framework yields promising results: for more than three quarters of all unseen test circuits, the best combination of compilation options is determined. Moreover, for more than 95% of the circuits, a combination of compilation options within the top-three is determined -- while the median compilation time is reduced by more than one order of magnitude. This knowledge helps in two ways: it lays the foundation for further applications of machine learning in this domain and, also, allows one to quickly verify whether a machine learning algorithm is reasonably trained. The corresponding framework and the pre-trained classifier are publicly available on GitHub (https://github.com/cda-tum/MQTPredictor) as part of the Munich Quantum Toolkit (MQT).
abstract_zh: 量子计算的任何潜在应用一旦被编码为量子电路，就需要进行编译才能在量子计算机上执行。根据优劣程度，决定哪种量子位技术、哪种设备、哪种编译器以及哪种相应设置最适合所考虑的问题，需要专业知识，这对于来自不同领域、试图利用量子计算发挥其优势的最终用户来说是难以承受的。在这项工作中，我们将问题视为统计分类任务，并探索利用监督机器学习技术来优化量子电路的编译。在此基础上，我们提出了一个框架，在给定量子电路的情况下，预测这些选项的最佳组合，从而自动为最终用户做出这些决策。实验评估表明，考虑到具有 3000 个量子电路的原型设置，所提出的框架产生了有希望的结果：对于所有未见过的测试电路的四分之三以上，确定了编译选项的最佳组合。此外，对于超过 95% 的电路，确定了前三个编译选项的组合，而中位编译时间则减少了一个数量级以上。此外，所得到的方法不仅为最终用户提供了最佳编译选项的预测，而且还提供了从机器学习技术中提取显式知识的方法。这些知识有两个作用：它为机器学习在该领域的进一步应用奠定了基础，并且还可以让人们快速验证机器学习算法是否经过合理训练。相应的框架和预训练的分类器作为慕尼黑量子工具包 (MQT) 的一部分在 GitHub (https://github.com/cda-tum/MQTPredictor) 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于机器学习的框架，用于自动预测量子电路编译的最佳选项组合。
AI.motivation: 量子电路编译需要专业知识，非专家用户难以选择最佳编译参数，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 将编译选项选择建模为统计分类任务，采用监督学习方法训练预测模型并构建决策框架。
AI.result: 在3000个量子电路测试中，框架能为75%以上电路预测最佳组合，95%电路预测结果在前三名，编译时间缩短超10倍。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效实现编译参数自动决策，同时支持知识提取验证，推动量子计算领域机器学习应用发展。
