search_text: Predicting Good Quantum Circuit Compilation Options 预测良好的量子电路编译选项 Any potential application of quantum computing, once encoded as a quantum circuit, needs to be compiled in order to be executed on a quantum computer. Deciding which qubit technology, which device, which compiler, and which corresponding settings are best for the considered problem -- according to a measure of goodness -- requires expert knowledge and is overwhelming for end-users from different domains trying to use quantum computing to their advantage. In this work, we treat the problem as a statistical classification task and explore the utilization of supervised machine learning techniques to optimize the compilation of quantum circuits. Based on that, we propose a framework that, given a quantum circuit, predicts the best combination of these options and, therefore, automatically makes these decisions for end-users. Experimental evaluations show that, considering a prototypical setting with 3000 quantum circuits, the proposed framework yields promising results: for more than three quarters of all unseen test circuits, the best combination of compilation options is determined. Moreover, for more than 95% of the circuits, a combination of compilation options within the top-three is determined -- while the median compilation time is reduced by more than one order of magnitude. Furthermore, the resulting methodology not only provides end-users with a prediction of the best compilation options, but also provides means to extract explicit knowledge from the machine learning technique. This knowledge helps in two ways: it lays the foundation for further applications of machine learning in this domain and, also, allows one to quickly verify whether a machine learning algorithm is reasonably trained. The corresponding framework and the pre-trained classifier are publicly available on GitHub (https://github.com/cda-tum/MQTPredictor) as part of the Munich Quantum Toolkit (MQT). 量子计算的任何潜在应用一旦被编码为量子电路，就需要进行编译才能在量子计算机上执行。根据优劣程度，决定哪种量子位技术、哪种设备、哪种编译器以及哪种相应设置最适合所考虑的问题，需要专业知识，这对于来自不同领域、试图利用量子计算发挥其优势的最终用户来说是难以承受的。在这项工作中，我们将问题视为统计分类任务，并探索利用监督机器学习技术来优化量子电路的编译。在此基础上，我们提出了一个框架，在给定量子电路的情况下，预测这些选项的最佳组合，从而自动为最终用户做出这些决策。实验评估表明，考虑到具有 3000 个量子电路的原型设置，所提出的框架产生了有希望的结果：对于所有未见过的测试电路的四分之三以上，确定了编译选项的最佳组合。此外，对于超过 95% 的电路，确定了前三个编译选项的组合，而中位编译时间则减少了一个数量级以上。此外，所得到的方法不仅为最终用户提供了最佳编译选项的预测，而且还提供了从机器学习技术中提取显式知识的方法。这些知识有两个作用：它为机器学习在该领域的进一步应用奠定了基础，并且还可以让人们快速验证机器学习算法是否经过合理训练。相应的框架和预训练的分类器作为慕尼黑量子工具包 (MQT) 的一部分在 GitHub (https://github.com/cda-tum/MQTPredictor) 上公开提供。 本文提出一个基于机器学习的框架，用于自动预测量子电路编译的最佳选项组合。 Nils Quetschlich,Lukas Burgholzer,Robert Wille quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Juan Heredia,Christian Schlette,Mikkel Baun Kjærgaard
title: AR Training App for Energy Optimal Programming of Cobots
title_zh: 用于协作机器人能量优化编程的 AR 培训应用程序
abstract: Worldwide most factories aim for low-cost and fast production ignoring resources and energy consumption. But, high revenues have been accompanied by environmental degradation. The United Nations reacted to the ecological problem and proposed the Sustainable Development Goals, and one of them is Sustainable Production (Goal 12). In addition, the participation of lightweight robots, such as collaborative robots, in modern industrial production is increasing. The energy consumption of a single collaborative robot is not significant, however, the consumption of more and more cobots worldwide is representative. Consequently, our research focuses on strategies to reduce the energy consumption of lightweight robots aiming for sustainable production. Firstly, the energy consumption of the lightweight robot UR10e is assessed by a set of experiments. We analyzed the results of the experiments to describe the relationship between the energy consumption and the evaluation parameters, thus paving the way to optimization strategies. Next, we propose four strategies to reduce energy consumption: 1) optimal standby position, 2) optimal robot instruction, 3) optimal motion time, and 4) reduction of dissipative energy. The results show that cobots potentially reduce from 3\% up to 37\% of their energy consumption, depending on the optimization technique. To disseminate the results of our research, we developed an AR game in which the users learn how to energy-efficiently program cobots.
summary: Worldwide most factories aim for low-cost and fast production ignoring resources and energy consumption. But, high revenues have been accompanied by environmental degradation. The United Nations reacted to the ecological problem and proposed the Sustainable Development Goals, and one of them is Sustainable Production (Goal 12). In addition, the participation of lightweight robots, such as collaborative robots, in modern industrial production is increasing. The energy consumption of a single collaborative robot is not significant, however, the consumption of more and more cobots worldwide is representative. Consequently, our research focuses on strategies to reduce the energy consumption of lightweight robots aiming for sustainable production. Firstly, the energy consumption of the lightweight robot UR10e is assessed by a set of experiments. We analyzed the results of the experiments to describe the relationship between the energy consumption and the evaluation parameters, thus paving the way to optimization strategies. Next, we propose four strategies to reduce energy consumption: 1) optimal standby position, 2) optimal robot instruction, 3) optimal motion time, and 4) reduction of dissipative energy. The results show that cobots potentially reduce from 3\% up to 37\% of their energy consumption, depending on the optimization technique. To disseminate the results of our research, we developed an AR game in which the users learn how to energy-efficiently program cobots.
abstract_zh: 全球大多数工厂的目标是低成本和快速生产，而忽视资源和能源消耗。但是，高收入也伴随着环境恶化。联合国针对生态问题提出了可持续发展目标，其中之一就是可持续生产（目标12）。此外，协作机器人等轻型机器人在现代工业生产中的参与度不断增加。单个协作机器人的能耗并不大，但全球范围内越来越多的协作机器人的能耗具有代表性。因此，我们的研究重点是减少轻型机器人能耗的策略，以实现可持续生产。首先，通过一组实验评估了轻型机器人 UR10e 的能耗。我们分析了实验结果，描述了能耗与评估参数之间的关系，从而为优化策略铺平了道路。接下来，我们提出了四种降低能耗的策略：1）最佳待机位置，2）最佳机器人指令，3）最佳运动时间，4）减少耗散能量。结果表明，协作机器人的能源消耗可能会减少 3% 到 37%，具体取决于优化技术。为了传播我们的研究成果，我们开发了一款 AR 游戏，用户可以在其中学习如何对协作机器人进行节能编程。

AI.tldr: 开发增强现实（AR）训练应用，通过优化协作机器人（Cobot）编程策略降低其能源消耗，以实现可持续生产。
AI.motivation: 全球工厂追求低成本高效率生产，忽视能源消耗导致环境问题。联合国可持续发展目标（SDG 12）要求减少资源浪费，而协作机器人数量增加使其总能耗不可忽视，需探索节能策略。
AI.method: 通过实验评估UR10e协作机器人能耗，分析能耗与参数关系，提出四类优化策略（待机位置、指令优化、运动时间控制、减少耗散能），并开发AR游戏传播节能编程知识。
AI.result: 实验表明，不同优化策略可使Cobot能耗降低3%-37%，AR应用有效传递节能编程方法。
AI.conclusion: 优化Cobot编程能显著降低能耗，AR训练工具为实现可持续生产提供了可行的技术方案和教育手段。

authors_text: Louis Annabi,Alexandre Pitti,Mathias Quoy
title: On the Relationship Between Variational Inference and Auto-Associative Memory
title_zh: 论变分推理与自联想记忆的关系
abstract: In this article, we propose a variational inference formulation of auto-associative memories, allowing us to combine perceptual inference and memory retrieval into the same mathematical framework. In this formulation, the prior probability distribution onto latent representations is made memory dependent, thus pulling the inference process towards previously stored representations. We then study how different neural network approaches to variational inference can be applied in this framework. We compare methods relying on amortized inference such as Variational Auto Encoders and methods relying on iterative inference such as Predictive Coding and suggest combining both approaches to design new auto-associative memory models. We evaluate the obtained algorithms on the CIFAR10 and CLEVR image datasets and compare them with other associative memory models such as Hopfield Networks, End-to-End Memory Networks and Neural Turing Machines.
summary: In this article, we propose a variational inference formulation of auto-associative memories, allowing us to combine perceptual inference and memory retrieval into the same mathematical framework. In this formulation, the prior probability distribution onto latent representations is made memory dependent, thus pulling the inference process towards previously stored representations. We then study how different neural network approaches to variational inference can be applied in this framework. We compare methods relying on amortized inference such as Variational Auto Encoders and methods relying on iterative inference such as Predictive Coding and suggest combining both approaches to design new auto-associative memory models. We evaluate the obtained algorithms on the CIFAR10 and CLEVR image datasets and compare them with other associative memory models such as Hopfield Networks, End-to-End Memory Networks and Neural Turing Machines.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了自联想记忆的变分推理公式，使我们能够将感知推理和记忆检索结合到同一数学框架中。在这个公式中，潜在表示的先验概率分布与内存相关，从而将推理过程拉向先前存储的表示。然后我们研究如何在这个框架中应用不同的神经网络变分推理方法。我们比较了依赖于分摊推理（例如变分自动编码器）的方法和依赖于迭代推理（例如预测编码）的方法，并建议结合这两种方法来设计新的自动关联记忆模型。我们在 CIFAR10 和 CLEVR 图像数据集上评估所获得的算法，并将其与其他联想记忆模型（例如 Hopfield 网络、端到端记忆网络和神经图灵机）进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种变分推断的自联想记忆框架，将感知推断与记忆检索结合，并比较了不同神经网络方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以统一处理感知推断与记忆检索，需建立数学框架以融合两者并提升记忆依赖的先验分布效果。
AI.method: 构建基于变分推断的自联想记忆模型，通过记忆依赖的先验分布引导推断过程，并对比 amortized 推断（如 VAE）与迭代推断（如 Predictive Coding）方法的结合方案。
AI.result: 在 CIFAR10 和 CLEVR 数据集上验证了算法有效性，实验结果优于 Hopfield 网络、端到端记忆网络等传统模型。
AI.conclusion: 结合 amortized 与迭代推断方法可设计更高效的自联想记忆模型，为未来研究提供新方向。

search_text: On the Relationship Between Variational Inference and Auto-Associative Memory 论变分推理与自联想记忆的关系 In this article, we propose a variational inference formulation of auto-associative memories, allowing us to combine perceptual inference and memory retrieval into the same mathematical framework. In this formulation, the prior probability distribution onto latent representations is made memory dependent, thus pulling the inference process towards previously stored representations. We then study how different neural network approaches to variational inference can be applied in this framework. We compare methods relying on amortized inference such as Variational Auto Encoders and methods relying on iterative inference such as Predictive Coding and suggest combining both approaches to design new auto-associative memory models. We evaluate the obtained algorithms on the CIFAR10 and CLEVR image datasets and compare them with other associative memory models such as Hopfield Networks, End-to-End Memory Networks and Neural Turing Machines. 在本文中，我们提出了自联想记忆的变分推理公式，使我们能够将感知推理和记忆检索结合到同一数学框架中。在这个公式中，潜在表示的先验概率分布与内存相关，从而将推理过程拉向先前存储的表示。然后我们研究如何在这个框架中应用不同的神经网络变分推理方法。我们比较了依赖于分摊推理（例如变分自动编码器）的方法和依赖于迭代推理（例如预测编码）的方法，并建议结合这两种方法来设计新的自动关联记忆模型。我们在 CIFAR10 和 CLEVR 图像数据集上评估所获得的算法，并将其与其他联想记忆模型（例如 Hopfield 网络、端到端记忆网络和神经图灵机）进行比较。 本文提出了一种变分推断的自联想记忆框架，将感知推断与记忆检索结合，并比较了不同神经网络方法的效果。 Louis Annabi,Alexandre Pitti,Mathias Quoy cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Stephanie Holly,Robin Heel,Denis Katic,Leopold Schoeffl,Andreas Stiftinger,Peter Holzner,Thomas Kaufmann,Bernhard Haslhofer,Daniel Schall,Clemens Heitzinger,Jana Kemnitz
title: Autoencoder based Anomaly Detection and Explained Fault Localization in Industrial Cooling Systems
title_zh: 工业冷却系统中基于自动编码器的异常检测和故障定位解释
abstract: Anomaly detection in large industrial cooling systems is very challenging due to the high data dimensionality, inconsistent sensor recordings, and lack of labels. The state of the art for automated anomaly detection in these systems typically relies on expert knowledge and thresholds. However, data is viewed isolated and complex, multivariate relationships are neglected. In this work, we present an autoencoder based end-to-end workflow for anomaly detection suitable for multivariate time series data in large industrial cooling systems, including explained fault localization and root cause analysis based on expert knowledge. We identify system failures using a threshold on the total reconstruction error (autoencoder reconstruction error including all sensor signals). For fault localization, we compute the individual reconstruction error (autoencoder reconstruction error for each sensor signal) allowing us to identify the signals that contribute most to the total reconstruction error. Expert knowledge is provided via look-up table enabling root-cause analysis and assignment to the affected subsystem. We demonstrated our findings in a cooling system unit including 34 sensors over a 8-months time period using 4-fold cross validation approaches and automatically created labels based on thresholds provided by domain experts. Using 4-fold cross validation, we reached a F1-score of 0.56, whereas the autoencoder results showed a higher consistency score (CS of 0.92) compared to the automatically created labels (CS of 0.62) -- indicating that the anomaly is recognized in a very stable manner. The main anomaly was found by the autoencoder and automatically created labels and was also recorded in the log files. Further, the explained fault localization highlighted the most affected component for the main anomaly in a very consistent manner.

We identify system failures using a threshold on the total reconstruction error (autoencoder reconstruction error including all sensor signals). For fault localization, we compute the individual reconstruction error (autoencoder reconstruction error for each sensor signal) allowing us to identify the signals that contribute most to the total reconstruction error. Expert knowledge is provided via look-up table enabling root-cause analysis and assignment to the affected subsystem. We demonstrated our findings in a cooling system unit including 34 sensors over a 8-months time period using 4-fold cross validation approaches and automatically created labels based on thresholds provided by domain experts. Using 4-fold cross validation, we reached a F1-score of 0.56, whereas the autoencoder results showed a higher consistency score (CS of 0.92) compared to the automatically created labels (CS of 0.62) -- indicating that the anomaly is recognized in a very stable manner. The main anomaly was found by the autoencoder and automatically created labels and was also recorded in the log files. Further, the explained fault localization highlighted the most affected component for the main anomaly in a very consistent manner.
abstract_zh: 由于数据维度高、传感器记录不一致以及缺乏标签，大型工业冷却系统中的异常检测非常具有挑战性。这些系统中自动异常检测的最新技术通常依赖于专家知识和阈值。然而，数据被视为孤立且复杂的，多元关系被忽视。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于自动编码器的端到端工作流程，用于异常检测，适用于大型工业冷却系统中的多元时间序列数据，包括基于专家知识的解释性故障定位和根本原因分析。我们使用总重建误差（包括所有传感器信号的自动编码器重建误差）的阈值来识别系统故障。对于故障定位，我们计算单个重建误差（每个传感器信号的自动编码器重建误差），使我们能够识别对总重建误差影响最大的信号。通过查找表提供专业知识，从而能够进行根本原因分析并将其分配给受影响的子系统。我们在 8 个月的时间内使用 4 倍交叉验证方法在包括 34 个传感器的冷却系统单元中展示了我们的发现，并根据领域专家提供的阈值自动创建标签。使用 4 倍交叉验证，我们达到了 0.56 的 F1 分数，而自动编码器结果显示与自动创建的标签（CS 为 0.62）相比具有更高的一致性分数（CS 为 0.62）——表明异常以非常稳定的方式被识别。主要异常是由自动编码器发现的，并自动创建标签，并记录在日志文件中。此外，所解释的故障定位以非常一致的方式突出显示了主要异常中受影响最大的组件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自编码器的端到端工作流，用于工业冷却系统中的异常检测和可解释的故障定位。
AI.motivation: 工业冷却系统的异常检测面临高维数据、传感器记录不一致和标签缺失等挑战，现有方法依赖专家知识且忽略多变量关系。
AI.method: 利用自编码器的重构误差进行异常检测，通过单个传感器信号的重构误差定位故障，并结合专家知识库进行根因分析。
AI.result: 在包含34个传感器的冷却系统上，通过4折交叉验证达到F1分数0.56，自编码器的重构误差一致性得分（0.92）显著高于自动标签（0.62）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能稳定识别异常并准确定位故障组件，验证了自编码器在工业场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Amr Abdelraouf,Mohamed Abdel-Aty,Zijin Wang,Ou Zheng
title: Trajectory Prediction for Vehicle Conflict Identification at Intersections Using Sequence-to-Sequence Recurrent Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用序列到序列递归神经网络进行交叉口车辆冲突识别的轨迹预测
abstract: Surrogate safety measures in the form of conflict indicators are indispensable components of the proactive traffic safety toolbox. Conflict indicators can be classified into past-trajectory-based conflicts and predicted-trajectory-based conflicts. While the calculation of the former class of conflicts is deterministic and unambiguous, the latter category is computed using predicted vehicle trajectories and is thus more stochastic. Consequently, the accuracy of prediction-based conflicts is contingent on the accuracy of the utilized trajectory prediction algorithm. Trajectory prediction can be a challenging task, particularly at intersections where vehicle maneuvers are diverse. Furthermore, due to limitations relating to the road user trajectory extraction pipelines, accurate geometric representation of vehicles during conflict analysis is a challenging task. Misrepresented geometries distort the real distances between vehicles under observation. In this research, a prediction-based conflict identification methodology was proposed. A sequence-to-sequence Recurrent Neural Network was developed to sequentially predict future vehicle trajectories for up to 3 seconds ahead. Furthermore, the proposed network was trained using the CitySim Dataset to forecast both future vehicle positions and headings to facilitate the prediction of future bounding boxes, thus maintaining accurate vehicle geometric representations. It was experimentally determined that the proposed method outperformed frequently used trajectory prediction models for conflict analysis at intersections. A comparison between Time-to-Collision (TTC) conflict identification using vehicle bounding boxes versus the commonly used vehicle center points for geometric representation was conducted. Compared to the bounding box method, the center point approach often failed to identify TTC conflicts or underestimated their severity.

Conflict indicators can be classified into past-trajectory-based conflicts and predicted-trajectory-based conflicts. While the calculation of the former class of conflicts is deterministic and unambiguous, the latter category is computed using predicted vehicle trajectories and is thus more stochastic. Consequently, the accuracy of prediction-based conflicts is contingent on the accuracy of the utilized trajectory prediction algorithm. Trajectory prediction can be a challenging task, particularly at intersections where vehicle maneuvers are diverse. Furthermore, due to limitations relating to the road user trajectory extraction pipelines, accurate geometric representation of vehicles during conflict analysis is a challenging task. Misrepresented geometries distort the real distances between vehicles under observation. In this research, a prediction-based conflict identification methodology was proposed. A sequence-to-sequence Recurrent Neural Network was developed to sequentially predict future vehicle trajectories for up to 3 seconds ahead. Furthermore, the proposed network was trained using the CitySim Dataset to forecast both future vehicle positions and headings to facilitate the prediction of future bounding boxes, thus maintaining accurate vehicle geometric representations. It was experimentally determined that the proposed method outperformed frequently used trajectory prediction models for conflict analysis at intersections. A comparison between Time-to-Collision (TTC) conflict identification using vehicle bounding boxes versus the commonly used vehicle center points for geometric representation was conducted. Compared to the bounding box method, the center point approach often failed to identify TTC conflicts or underestimated their severity.
abstract_zh: 冲突指标形式的替代安全措施是主动交通安全工具箱中不可或缺的组成部分。冲突指标可以分为基于过去轨迹的冲突和基于预测轨迹的冲突。虽然前一类冲突的计算是确定性且明确的，但后一类冲突是使用预测的车辆轨迹计算的，因此更具随机性。因此，基于预测的冲突的准确性取决于所使用的轨迹预测算法的准确性。轨迹预测可能是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是在车辆操纵多样化的十字路口。此外，由于与道路用户轨迹提取管道相关的限制，冲突分析期间车辆的准确几何表示是一项具有挑战性的任务。歪曲的几何形状会扭曲观察到的车辆之间的真实距离。在本研究中，提出了一种基于预测的冲突识别方法。开发了序列到序列循环神经网络，可以连续预测未来最多 3 秒的车辆轨迹。此外，使用 CitySim 数据集对所提出的网络进行训练，以预测未来车辆位置和航向，以方便预测未来边界框，从而保持准确的车辆几何表示。实验表明，该方法优于常用的交叉口冲突分析轨迹预测模型。对使用车辆边界框的碰撞时间 (TTC) 冲突识别与常用的车辆中心点进行几何表示进行了比较。与边界框方法相比，中心点方法常常无法识别 TTC 冲突或低估其严重性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于序列到序列循环神经网络（RNN）的车辆轨迹预测方法，用于提高交叉口车辆冲突识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于预测轨迹的冲突识别方法因轨迹预测精度不足和几何表示不准确而存在局限性，尤其在交叉口复杂行驶场景下问题更为突出。
AI.method: 开发了序列到序列RNN模型预测车辆未来3秒轨迹，结合CitySim数据集训练预测车辆位置和航向角，通过生成未来边界框实现精确几何建模。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在交叉口冲突预测任务中优于传统模型，且基于边界框的Time-to-Collision（TTC）计算显著优于传统中心点几何表示方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过改进轨迹预测与几何建模，有效提升了交叉口车辆冲突识别的准确性和可靠性。

search_text: Trajectory Prediction for Vehicle Conflict Identification at Intersections Using Sequence-to-Sequence Recurrent Neural Networks 使用序列到序列递归神经网络进行交叉口车辆冲突识别的轨迹预测 Surrogate safety measures in the form of conflict indicators are indispensable components of the proactive traffic safety toolbox. Conflict indicators can be classified into past-trajectory-based conflicts and predicted-trajectory-based conflicts. While the calculation of the former class of conflicts is deterministic and unambiguous, the latter category is computed using predicted vehicle trajectories and is thus more stochastic. Consequently, the accuracy of prediction-based conflicts is contingent on the accuracy of the utilized trajectory prediction algorithm. Trajectory prediction can be a challenging task, particularly at intersections where vehicle maneuvers are diverse. Furthermore, due to limitations relating to the road user trajectory extraction pipelines, accurate geometric representation of vehicles during conflict analysis is a challenging task. Misrepresented geometries distort the real distances between vehicles under observation. In this research, a prediction-based conflict identification methodology was proposed. A sequence-to-sequence Recurrent Neural Network was developed to sequentially predict future vehicle trajectories for up to 3 seconds ahead. Furthermore, the proposed network was trained using the CitySim Dataset to forecast both future vehicle positions and headings to facilitate the prediction of future bounding boxes, thus maintaining accurate vehicle geometric representations. It was experimentally determined that the proposed method outperformed frequently used trajectory prediction models for conflict analysis at intersections. A comparison between Time-to-Collision (TTC) conflict identification using vehicle bounding boxes versus the commonly used vehicle center points for geometric representation was conducted. Compared to the bounding box method, the center point approach often failed to identify TTC conflicts or underestimated their severity. 冲突指标形式的替代安全措施是主动交通安全工具箱中不可或缺的组成部分。冲突指标可以分为基于过去轨迹的冲突和基于预测轨迹的冲突。虽然前一类冲突的计算是确定性且明确的，但后一类冲突是使用预测的车辆轨迹计算的，因此更具随机性。因此，基于预测的冲突的准确性取决于所使用的轨迹预测算法的准确性。轨迹预测可能是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是在车辆操纵多样化的十字路口。此外，由于与道路用户轨迹提取管道相关的限制，冲突分析期间车辆的准确几何表示是一项具有挑战性的任务。歪曲的几何形状会扭曲观察到的车辆之间的真实距离。在本研究中，提出了一种基于预测的冲突识别方法。开发了序列到序列循环神经网络，可以连续预测未来最多 3 秒的车辆轨迹。此外，使用 CitySim 数据集对所提出的网络进行训练，以预测未来车辆位置和航向，以方便预测未来边界框，从而保持准确的车辆几何表示。实验表明，该方法优于常用的交叉口冲突分析轨迹预测模型。对使用车辆边界框的碰撞时间 (TTC) 冲突识别与常用的车辆中心点进行几何表示进行了比较。与边界框方法相比，中心点方法常常无法识别 TTC 冲突或低估其严重性。 本文提出了一种基于序列到序列循环神经网络（RNN）的车辆轨迹预测方法，用于提高交叉口车辆冲突识别的准确性。 Amr Abdelraouf,Mohamed Abdel-Aty,Zijin Wang,Ou Zheng cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Srikrishna Jaganathan,Maximilian Kukla,Jian Wang,Karthik Shetty,Andreas Maier
title: Self-Supervised 2D/3D Registration for X-Ray to CT Image Fusion
title_zh: X 射线到 CT 图像融合的自监督 2D/3D 配准
abstract: Deep Learning-based 2D/3D registration enables fast, robust, and accurate X-ray to CT image fusion when large annotated paired datasets are available for training. However, the need for paired CT volume and X-ray images with ground truth registration limits the applicability in interventional scenarios. An alternative is to use simulated X-ray projections from CT volumes, thus removing the need for paired annotated datasets. Deep Neural Networks trained exclusively on simulated X-ray projections can perform significantly worse on real X-ray images due to the domain gap. We propose a self-supervised 2D/3D registration framework combining simulated training with unsupervised feature and pixel space domain adaptation to overcome the domain gap and eliminate the need for paired annotated datasets. Our framework achieves a registration accuracy of 1.83$\pm$1.16 mm with a high success ratio of 90.1% on real X-ray images showing a 23.9% increase in success ratio compared to reference annotation-free algorithms.
summary: Deep Learning-based 2D/3D registration enables fast, robust, and accurate X-ray to CT image fusion when large annotated paired datasets are available for training. However, the need for paired CT volume and X-ray images with ground truth registration limits the applicability in interventional scenarios. An alternative is to use simulated X-ray projections from CT volumes, thus removing the need for paired annotated datasets. Deep Neural Networks trained exclusively on simulated X-ray projections can perform significantly worse on real X-ray images due to the domain gap. We propose a self-supervised 2D/3D registration framework combining simulated training with unsupervised feature and pixel space domain adaptation to overcome the domain gap and eliminate the need for paired annotated datasets. Our framework achieves a registration accuracy of 1.83$\pm$1.16 mm with a high success ratio of 90.1% on real X-ray images showing a 23.9% increase in success ratio compared to reference annotation-free algorithms.
abstract_zh: 当大型带注释的配对数据集可用于训练时，基于深度学习的 2D/3D 配准可实现快速、稳健且准确的 X 射线到 CT 图像融合。然而，对具有地面真实配准的配对 CT 体积和 X 射线图像的需求限制了介入场景中的适用性。另一种方法是使用 CT 体积的模拟 X 射线投影，从而无需配对注释数据集。由于域间隙，仅在模拟 X 射线投影上训练的深度神经网络在真实 X 射线图像上的表现可能会明显较差。我们提出了一种自监督 2D/3D 配准框架，将模拟训练与无监督特征和像素空间域适应相结合，以克服域间隙并消除对配对注释数据集的需要。我们的框架在真实 X 射线图像上实现了 1.83$\pm$1.16 mm 的配准精度，成功率高达 90.1%，与参考无注释算法相比，成功率提高了 23.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督的2D/3D配准框架，解决X光与CT图像融合中无需配对标注数据集的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量配对标注数据，限制介入场景应用，而模拟数据与真实数据的领域差异导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 结合模拟训练与无监督特征/像素空间领域适应，消除配对数据需求并缩小领域差距。
AI.result: 在真实X光图像上实现1.83±1.16mm配准精度，成功率90.1%，较基准算法提升23.9%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效克服领域差异，显著提升无配对数据下的X光-CT图像配准性能。

authors_text: Weiming Li,Lihui Xue,Xueqian Wang,Gang Li
title: MCTNet: A Multi-Scale CNN-Transformer Network for Change Detection in Optical Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: MCTNet：用于光学遥感图像变化检测的多尺度 CNN-Transformer 网络
abstract: For the task of change detection (CD) in remote sensing images, deep convolution neural networks (CNNs)-based methods have recently aggregated transformer modules to improve the capability of global feature extraction. However, they suffer degraded CD performance on small changed areas due to the simple single-scale integration of deep CNNs and transformer modules. To address this issue, we propose a hybrid network based on multi-scale CNN-transformer structure, termed MCTNet, where the multi-scale global and local information are exploited to enhance the robustness of the CD performance on changed areas with different sizes. Especially, we design the ConvTrans block to adaptively aggregate global features from transformer modules and local features from CNN layers, which provides abundant global-local features with different scales. Experimental results demonstrate that our MCTNet achieves better detection performance than existing state-of-the-art CD methods.
summary: For the task of change detection (CD) in remote sensing images, deep convolution neural networks (CNNs)-based methods have recently aggregated transformer modules to improve the capability of global feature extraction. However, they suffer degraded CD performance on small changed areas due to the simple single-scale integration of deep CNNs and transformer modules. To address this issue, we propose a hybrid network based on multi-scale CNN-transformer structure, termed MCTNet, where the multi-scale global and local information are exploited to enhance the robustness of the CD performance on changed areas with different sizes. Especially, we design the ConvTrans block to adaptively aggregate global features from transformer modules and local features from CNN layers, which provides abundant global-local features with different scales. Experimental results demonstrate that our MCTNet achieves better detection performance than existing state-of-the-art CD methods.
abstract_zh: 对于遥感图像中的变化检测（CD）任务，基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法最近聚合了变压器模块以提高全局特征提取的能力。然而，由于深度 CNN 和 Transformer 模块的简单单尺度集成，它们在小变化区域上的 CD 性能下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于多尺度 CNN-transformer 结构的混合网络，称为 MCTNet，其中利用多尺度全局和局部信息来增强 CD 性能在不同大小的变化区域上的鲁棒性。特别是，我们设计了 ConvTrans 块来自适应聚合来自 Transformer 模块的全局特征和来自 CNN 层的局部特征，从而提供丰富的不同尺度的全局局部特征。实验结果表明，我们的 MCTNet 比现有最先进的 CD 方法实现了更好的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MCTNet，一种结合多尺度CNN-Transformer结构的网络，用于提升遥感图像变化检测中对小范围变化区域的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN与Transformer的方法在处理小范围变化区域时因单尺度特征整合导致检测性能下降，需通过多尺度特征融合增强鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计多尺度CNN-Transformer混合网络MCTNet，引入ConvTrans模块自适应融合Transformer的全局特征与CNN的局部特征，提取多尺度特征以提升检测能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，MCTNet在变化检测任务中优于现有最先进的方法，尤其在小范围变化区域检测上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: MCTNet通过多尺度特征融合有效解决了小范围变化检测难题，验证了多尺度结构在提升遥感图像变化检测性能中的有效性。

To address this issue, we propose a hybrid network based on multi-scale CNN-transformer structure, termed MCTNet, where the multi-scale global and local information are exploited to enhance the robustness of the CD performance on changed areas with different sizes. Especially, we design the ConvTrans block to adaptively aggregate global features from transformer modules and local features from CNN layers, which provides abundant global-local features with different scales. Experimental results demonstrate that our MCTNet achieves better detection performance than existing state-of-the-art CD methods. 对于遥感图像中的变化检测（CD）任务，基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法最近聚合了变压器模块以提高全局特征提取的能力。然而，由于深度 CNN 和 Transformer 模块的简单单尺度集成，它们在小变化区域上的 CD 性能下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于多尺度 CNN-transformer 结构的混合网络，称为 MCTNet，其中利用多尺度全局和局部信息来增强 CD 性能在不同大小的变化区域上的鲁棒性。特别是，我们设计了 ConvTrans 块来自适应聚合来自 Transformer 模块的全局特征和来自 CNN 层的局部特征，从而提供丰富的不同尺度的全局局部特征。实验结果表明，我们的 MCTNet 比现有最先进的 CD 方法实现了更好的检测性能。 本文提出MCTNet，一种结合多尺度CNN-Transformer结构的网络，用于提升遥感图像变化检测中对小范围变化区域的检测性能。 Weiming Li,Lihui Xue,Xueqian Wang,Gang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Hanlin Wu,Ning Ni,Libao Zhang
title: Lightweight Stepless Super-Resolution of Remote Sensing Images via Saliency-Aware Dynamic Routing Strategy
title_zh: 通过显着性感知动态路由策略实现遥感图像的轻量级无级超分辨率
abstract: Deep learning-based algorithms have greatly improved the performance of remote sensing image (RSI) super-resolution (SR). However, increasing network depth and parameters cause a huge burden of computing and storage. Directly reducing the depth or width of existing models results in a large performance drop. We observe that the SR difficulty of different regions in an RSI varies greatly, and existing methods use the same deep network to process all regions in an image, resulting in a waste of computing resources. In addition, existing SR methods generally predefine integer scale factors and cannot perform stepless SR, i.e., a single model can deal with any potential scale factor. Retraining the model on each scale factor wastes considerable computing resources and model storage space. To address the above problems, we propose a saliency-aware dynamic routing network (SalDRN) for lightweight and stepless SR of RSIs. First, we introduce visual saliency as an indicator of region-level SR difficulty and integrate a lightweight saliency detector into the SalDRN to capture pixel-level visual characteristics. Then, we devise a saliency-aware dynamic routing strategy that employs path selection switches to adaptively select feature extraction paths of appropriate depth according to the SR difficulty of sub-image patches. Finally, we propose a novel lightweight stepless upsampling module whose core is an implicit feature function for realizing mapping from low-resolution feature space to high-resolution feature space. Comprehensive experiments verify that the SalDRN can achieve a good trade-off between performance and complexity. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/hanlinwu/SalDRN}.
summary: Deep learning-based algorithms have greatly improved the performance of remote sensing image (RSI) super-resolution (SR). However, increasing network depth and parameters cause a huge burden of computing and storage. Directly reducing the depth or width of existing models results in a large performance drop. We observe that the SR difficulty of different regions in an RSI varies greatly, and existing methods use the same deep network to process all regions in an image, resulting in a waste of computing resources. In addition, existing SR methods generally predefine integer scale factors and cannot perform stepless SR, i.e., a single model can deal with any potential scale factor. Retraining the model on each scale factor wastes considerable computing resources and model storage space. To address the above problems, we propose a saliency-aware dynamic routing network (SalDRN) for lightweight and stepless SR of RSIs. First, we introduce visual saliency as an indicator of region-level SR difficulty and integrate a lightweight saliency detector into the SalDRN to capture pixel-level visual characteristics. Then, we devise a saliency-aware dynamic routing strategy that employs path selection switches to adaptively select feature extraction paths of appropriate depth according to the SR difficulty of sub-image patches. Finally, we propose a novel lightweight stepless upsampling module whose core is an implicit feature function for realizing mapping from low-resolution feature space to high-resolution feature space. Comprehensive experiments verify that the SalDRN can achieve a good trade-off between performance and complexity. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/hanlinwu/SalDRN}.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的算法极大地提高了遥感图像（RSI）超分辨率（SR）的性能。然而，不断增加的网络深度和参数给计算和存储带来了巨大的负担。直接减少现有模型的深度或宽度会导致性能大幅下降。我们观察到RSI中不同区域的SR难度差异很大，并且现有方法使用相同的深度网络来处理图像中的所有区域，导致计算资源的浪费。此外，现有的SR方法通常预先定义整数比例因子，并且不能执行无级SR，即单个模型可以处理任何潜在的比例因子。在每个比例因子上重新训练模型会浪费大量的计算资源和模型存储空间。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种用于 RSI 的轻量级、无级 SR 的显着性感知动态路由网络（SalDRN）。首先，我们引入视觉显着性作为区域级 SR 难度的指标，并将轻量级显着性检测器集成到 SalDRN 中以捕获像素级视觉特征。然后，我们设计了一种显着性感知动态路由策略，该策略利用路径选择开关根据子图像块的 SR 难度自适应地选择适当深度的特征提取路径。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的轻量级无级上采样模块，其核心是隐式特征函数，用于实现从低分辨率特征空间到高分辨率特征空间的映射。综合实验验证SalDRN能够在性能和复杂度之间实现良好的权衡。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/hanlinwu/SalDRN} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级无级遥感图像超分辨率方法SalDRN，通过显著性感知动态路由策略实现高效超分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法网络深度大参数多导致计算存储负担重，且预定义整数倍缩放因子无法实现无级超分，模型重新训练浪费资源。
AI.method: 引入显著性检测器评估区域超分难度，设计动态路由策略自适应选择特征提取路径，并提出轻量级无级上采样模块实现低到高分辨率特征映射。
AI.result: 实验验证SalDRN在性能与复杂度间取得良好平衡，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SalDRN通过动态路由和轻量设计有效解决了遥感图像超分的计算效率与无级缩放难题。

authors_text: Xiaoyan Zhang,Gaoyang Tang,Yingying Zhu,Qi Tian
title: See Blue Sky: Deep Image Dehaze Using Paired and Unpaired Training Images
title_zh: 请参阅 Blue Sky：使用配对和不配对训练图像进行深度图像去雾
abstract: The issue of image haze removal has attracted wide attention in recent years. However, most existing haze removal methods cannot restore the scene with clear blue sky, since the color and texture information of the object in the original haze image is insufficient. To remedy this, we propose a cycle generative adversarial network to construct a novel end-to-end image dehaze model. We adopt outdoor image datasets to train our model, which includes a set of real-world unpaired image dataset and a set of paired image dataset to ensure that the generated images are close to the real scene. Based on the cycle structure, our model adds four different kinds of loss function to constrain the effect including adversarial loss, cycle consistency loss, photorealism loss and paired L1 loss. These four constraints can improve the overall quality of such degraded images for better visual appeal and ensure reconstruction of images to keep from distortion. The proposed model could remove the haze of images and also restore the sky of images to be clean and blue (like captured in a sunny weather).
summary: The issue of image haze removal has attracted wide attention in recent years. However, most existing haze removal methods cannot restore the scene with clear blue sky, since the color and texture information of the object in the original haze image is insufficient. To remedy this, we propose a cycle generative adversarial network to construct a novel end-to-end image dehaze model. We adopt outdoor image datasets to train our model, which includes a set of real-world unpaired image dataset and a set of paired image dataset to ensure that the generated images are close to the real scene. Based on the cycle structure, our model adds four different kinds of loss function to constrain the effect including adversarial loss, cycle consistency loss, photorealism loss and paired L1 loss. These four constraints can improve the overall quality of such degraded images for better visual appeal and ensure reconstruction of images to keep from distortion. The proposed model could remove the haze of images and also restore the sky of images to be clean and blue (like captured in a sunny weather).
abstract_zh: 近年来，图像去雾问题引起了广泛关注。然而，大多数现有的去雾方法无法恢复蓝天晴朗的场景，因为原始雾霾图像中物体的颜色和纹理信息不足。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种循环生成对抗网络来构建一种新颖的端到端图像去雾模型。我们采用室外图像数据集来训练我们的模型，其中包括一组真实世界的未配对图像数据集和一组配对图像数据集，以确保生成的图像接近真实场景。基于循环结构，我们的模型添加了四种不同的损失函数来约束效果，包括对抗性损失、循环一致性损失、真实感损失和配对 L1 损失。这四个约束可以提高此类降级图像的整体质量，以获得更好的视觉吸引力，并确保图像重建以避免失真。所提出的模型可以消除图像的雾霾，还可以将图像的天空恢复为干净和蓝色（就像在阳光明媚的天气下拍摄的一样）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于循环生成对抗网络的深度图像去雾方法，旨在恢复图像中的清晰蓝天。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾方法难以恢复图像中的清晰蓝天，因为原始有雾图像中缺乏足够的颜色和纹理信息。
AI.method: 本文采用户外图像数据集训练模型，包括真实世界未配对图像数据集和配对图像数据集，通过循环结构加入四种损失函数，包括对抗损失、循环一致性损失、逼真度损失和配对L1损失。
AI.result: 所提出的模型能够有效去除图像中的雾，并恢复出干净的蓝天。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过多种损失函数约束，提升了去雾图像的整体质量和视觉效果，能够有效还原蓝天部分。

authors_text: Daeun Song,Eunjung Lim,Jiyoon Park,Minjung Jung,Young J. Kim
title: TSP-Bot: Robotic TSP Pen Art using High-DoF Manipulators
title_zh: TSP-Bot：使用高自由度操纵器的机器人 TSP 钢笔艺术
abstract: TSP art is an art form for drawing an image using piecewise-continuous line segments. We present TSP-Bot, a robotic pen drawing system capable of creating complicated TSP pen art on a planar surface using multiple colors. The system begins by converting a colored raster image into a set of points that represent the image's tone, which can be controlled by adjusting the point density. Next, the system finds a piecewise-continuous linear path that visits each point exactly once, which is equivalent to solving a Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP). The path is simplified with fewer points using bounded approximation and smoothed and optimized using Bezier spline curves with bounded curvature. Our robotic drawing system consisting of single or dual manipulators with fingered grippers and a mobile platform performs the drawing task by following the resulting complex and sophisticated path composed of thousands of TSP sites. As a result, our system can draw complicated and visually pleasing TSP pen art.
summary: TSP art is an art form for drawing an image using piecewise-continuous line segments. We present TSP-Bot, a robotic pen drawing system capable of creating complicated TSP pen art on a planar surface using multiple colors. The system begins by converting a colored raster image into a set of points that represent the image's tone, which can be controlled by adjusting the point density. Next, the system finds a piecewise-continuous linear path that visits each point exactly once, which is equivalent to solving a Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP). The path is simplified with fewer points using bounded approximation and smoothed and optimized using Bezier spline curves with bounded curvature. Our robotic drawing system consisting of single or dual manipulators with fingered grippers and a mobile platform performs the drawing task by following the resulting complex and sophisticated path composed of thousands of TSP sites. As a result, our system can draw complicated and visually pleasing TSP pen art.
abstract_zh: TSP 艺术是一种使用分段连续线段绘制图像的艺术形式。我们推出了 TSP-Bot，这是一种机器人笔绘图系统，能够使用多种颜色在平面上创建复杂的 TSP 钢笔艺术。该系统首先将彩色光栅图像转换为一组代表图像色调的点，可以通过调整点密度来控制这些点。接下来，系统找到一条分段连续的线性路径，该路径只访问每个点一次，这相当于解决旅行商问题（TSP）。使用有界近似以更少的点简化路径，并使用具有有界曲率的贝塞尔样条曲线进行平滑和优化。我们的机器人绘图系统由带有指状夹具的单或双机械手和移动平台组成，通过遵循由数千个 TSP 站点组成的复杂而精密的路径来执行绘图任务。因此，我们的系统可以绘制复杂且视觉上令人愉悦的 TSP 钢笔艺术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TSP-Bot系统，利用高自由度机械臂将彩色图像转化为TSP路径并进行复杂笔触绘画。
AI.motivation: 传统TSP艺术仅能单色绘制简单路径，难以实现多色复杂图像的高精度机械绘制，需结合路径优化与机器人控制技术突破此限制。
AI.method: 将彩色图像转换为密度可控的点集，通过TSP算法生成遍历路径，采用贝塞尔曲线优化平滑后，由单/双机械臂抓取笔具在移动平台上完成多色绘画。
AI.result: 系统成功实现包含数千个路径点的复杂彩色TSP艺术作品，验证了高自由度机械臂与路径优化算法的协同有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了TSP算法与机器人控制的结合在艺术创作中的潜力，为机械臂复杂轨迹规划提供了新应用场景。

search_text: TSP-Bot: Robotic TSP Pen Art using High-DoF Manipulators TSP-Bot：使用高自由度操纵器的机器人 TSP 钢笔艺术 TSP art is an art form for drawing an image using piecewise-continuous line segments. We present TSP-Bot, a robotic pen drawing system capable of creating complicated TSP pen art on a planar surface using multiple colors. The system begins by converting a colored raster image into a set of points that represent the image's tone, which can be controlled by adjusting the point density. Next, the system finds a piecewise-continuous linear path that visits each point exactly once, which is equivalent to solving a Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP). The path is simplified with fewer points using bounded approximation and smoothed and optimized using Bezier spline curves with bounded curvature. Our robotic drawing system consisting of single or dual manipulators with fingered grippers and a mobile platform performs the drawing task by following the resulting complex and sophisticated path composed of thousands of TSP sites. As a result, our system can draw complicated and visually pleasing TSP pen art. Kim cs.RO,cs.GR

authors_text: Ivaylo Ilinkin,Daeun Song,Young J. Kim
title: Stroke-based Rendering and Planning for Robotic Performance of Artistic Drawing
title_zh: 基于笔划的艺术绘画机器人表演的渲染和规划
abstract: We present a new robotic drawing system based on stroke-based rendering (SBR). Our motivation is the artistic quality of the whole performance. Not only should the generated strokes in the final drawing resemble the input image, but the stroke sequence should also exhibit a human artist's planning process. Thus, when a robot executes the drawing task, both the drawing results and the way the robot executes would look artistic. Our SBR system is based on image segmentation and depth estimation. It generates the drawing strokes in an order that allows for the intended shape to be perceived quickly and for its detailed features to be filled in and emerge gradually when observed by the human. This ordering represents a stroke plan that the drawing robot should follow to create an artistic rendering of images. We experimentally demonstrate that our SBR-based drawing makes visually pleasing artistic images, and our robotic system can replicate the result with proper sequences of stroke drawing.
summary: We present a new robotic drawing system based on stroke-based rendering (SBR). Our motivation is the artistic quality of the whole performance. Not only should the generated strokes in the final drawing resemble the input image, but the stroke sequence should also exhibit a human artist's planning process. Thus, when a robot executes the drawing task, both the drawing results and the way the robot executes would look artistic. Our SBR system is based on image segmentation and depth estimation. It generates the drawing strokes in an order that allows for the intended shape to be perceived quickly and for its detailed features to be filled in and emerge gradually when observed by the human. This ordering represents a stroke plan that the drawing robot should follow to create an artistic rendering of images. We experimentally demonstrate that our SBR-based drawing makes visually pleasing artistic images, and our robotic system can replicate the result with proper sequences of stroke drawing.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于笔划渲染（SBR）的新机器人绘图系统。我们的动力是整个演出的艺术品质。最终绘图中生成的笔画不仅应该类似于输入图像，而且笔画序列还应该展示人类艺术家的规划过程。这样，当机器人执行绘图任务时，无论是绘图结果还是机器人执行的方式都看起来很艺术。我们的 SBR 系统基于图像分割和深度估计。它按照一定的顺序生成绘图笔划，以便快速感知预期形状，并在人类观察时逐渐填充和显现其详细特征。此顺序代表绘图机器人应遵循的笔划计划来创建图像的艺术渲染。我们通过实验证明，基于 SBR 的绘图可以产生视觉上令人愉悦的艺术图像，并且我们的机器人系统可以通过正确的笔划绘图顺序复制结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于笔触渲染（SBR）的机器人绘画系统，旨在通过模拟人类艺术家的规划过程，使机器人绘制的画作既符合输入图像又具有艺术性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人绘画仅关注最终图像的准确性，而忽视了绘画过程的艺术性。本文希望机器人不仅生成符合输入图像的笔触，还需通过合理的笔触顺序模拟人类艺术家的创作思维，使绘画过程本身也具有艺术美感。
AI.method: 系统结合图像分割与深度估计技术，生成按感知优先级排序的笔触序列。通过控制笔触绘制顺序，使观察者能快速感知整体形状，并逐步显现细节特征，从而模拟人类艺术家的绘画规划过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于SBR的绘画方法能生成视觉愉悦的艺术图像，机器人系统可准确复现该笔触序列，实现兼具视觉质量与艺术表现力的绘画过程。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过将笔触渲染与机器人执行相结合，成功实现了既符合图像内容又体现人类艺术创作特征的机器人绘画方案，为艺术化机器人创作提供了新思路。

It generates the drawing strokes in an order that allows for the intended shape to be perceived quickly and for its detailed features to be filled in and emerge gradually when observed by the human. This ordering represents a stroke plan that the drawing robot should follow to create an artistic rendering of images. We experimentally demonstrate that our SBR-based drawing makes visually pleasing artistic images, and our robotic system can replicate the result with proper sequences of stroke drawing. 我们提出了一种基于笔划渲染（SBR）的新机器人绘图系统。我们的动力是整个演出的艺术品质。最终绘图中生成的笔画不仅应该类似于输入图像，而且笔画序列还应该展示人类艺术家的规划过程。这样，当机器人执行绘图任务时，无论是绘图结果还是机器人执行的方式都看起来很艺术。我们的 SBR 系统基于图像分割和深度估计。它按照一定的顺序生成绘图笔划，以便快速感知预期形状，并在人类观察时逐渐填充和显现其详细特征。此顺序代表绘图机器人应遵循的笔划计划来创建图像的艺术渲染。我们通过实验证明，基于 SBR 的绘图可以产生视觉上令人愉悦的艺术图像，并且我们的机器人系统可以通过正确的笔划绘图顺序复制结果。 本文提出了一种基于笔触渲染（SBR）的机器人绘画系统，旨在通过模拟人类艺术家的规划过程，使机器人绘制的画作既符合输入图像又具有艺术性。 Ivaylo Ilinkin,Daeun Song,Young J. Kim cs.RO,cs.GR

authors_text: Yang Jiao,Kai Yang,Dongjin Song
title: Distributed Distributionally Robust Optimization with Non-Convex Objectives
title_zh: 具有非凸目标的分布式分布鲁棒优化
abstract: Distributionally Robust Optimization (DRO), which aims to find an optimal decision that minimizes the worst case cost over the ambiguity set of probability distribution, has been widely applied in diverse applications, e.g., network behavior analysis, risk management, etc. However, existing DRO techniques face three key challenges: 1) how to deal with the asynchronous updating in a distributed environment; 2) how to leverage the prior distribution effectively; 3) how to properly adjust the degree of robustness according to different scenarios. To this end, we propose an asynchronous distributed algorithm, named Asynchronous Single-looP alternatIve gRadient projEction (ASPIRE) algorithm with the itErative Active SEt method (EASE) to tackle the distributed distributionally robust optimization (DDRO) problem. Furthermore, a new uncertainty set, i.e., constrained D-norm uncertainty set, is developed to effectively leverage the prior distribution and flexibly control the degree of robustness. Finally, our theoretical analysis elucidates that the proposed algorithm is guaranteed to converge and the iteration complexity is also analyzed. Extensive empirical studies on real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can not only achieve fast convergence, and remain robust against data heterogeneity as well as malicious attacks, but also tradeoff robustness with performance.
summary: Distributionally Robust Optimization (DRO), which aims to find an optimal decision that minimizes the worst case cost over the ambiguity set of probability distribution, has been widely applied in diverse applications, e.g., network behavior analysis, risk management, etc. However, existing DRO techniques face three key challenges: 1) how to deal with the asynchronous updating in a distributed environment; 2) how to leverage the prior distribution effectively; 3) how to properly adjust the degree of robustness according to different scenarios. To this end, we propose an asynchronous distributed algorithm, named Asynchronous Single-looP alternatIve gRadient projEction (ASPIRE) algorithm with the itErative Active SEt method (EASE) to tackle the distributed distributionally robust optimization (DDRO) problem. Furthermore, a new uncertainty set, i.e., constrained D-norm uncertainty set, is developed to effectively leverage the prior distribution and flexibly control the degree of robustness. Finally, our theoretical analysis elucidates that the proposed algorithm is guaranteed to converge and the iteration complexity is also analyzed. Extensive empirical studies on real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can not only achieve fast convergence, and remain robust against data heterogeneity as well as malicious attacks, but also tradeoff robustness with performance.
abstract_zh: 分布式鲁棒优化（DRO）旨在找到一个最优决策，使概率分布模糊集上的最坏情况成本最小化，已广泛应用于各种应用，例如网络行为分析、风险管理等。然而，现有的DRO技术面临三个关键挑战：1）如何处理分布式环境中的异步更新； 2）如何有效利用先验分布； 3）如何根据不同场景适当调整鲁棒程度。为此，我们提出了一种异步分布式算法，称为异步单环交替梯度投影（ASPIRE）算法，采用迭代主动SEt方法（EASE）来解决分布式分布鲁棒优化（DDRO）问题。此外，还提出了一种新的不确定性集，即约束D范数不确定性集，以有效利用先验分布并灵活控制鲁棒性程度。最后，我们的理论分析阐明了所提出的算法保证收敛，并分析了迭代复杂度。对现实世界数据集的广泛实证研究表明，所提出的方法不仅可以实现快速收敛，并且对数据异构性和恶意攻击保持鲁棒性，而且可以在鲁棒性与性能之间进行权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分布式分布鲁棒优化算法，解决非凸目标下的异步更新、先验分布利用及鲁棒性调整问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分布鲁棒优化方法在分布式环境中存在异步更新困难、先验分布利用不足及鲁棒性调节不灵活的问题。
AI.method: 设计异步分布式算法ASPIRE结合EASE方法，并引入约束D-范数不确定集以灵活控制鲁棒性。

search_text: Distributed Distributionally Robust Optimization with Non-Convex Objectives 具有非凸目标的分布式分布鲁棒优化 Distributionally Robust Optimization (DRO), which aims to find an optimal decision that minimizes the worst case cost over the ambiguity set of probability distribution, has been widely applied in diverse applications, e.g., network behavior analysis, risk management, etc. However, existing DRO techniques face three key challenges: 1) how to deal with the asynchronous updating in a distributed environment; 2) how to leverage the prior distribution effectively; 3) how to properly adjust the degree of robustness according to different scenarios. To this end, we propose an asynchronous distributed algorithm, named Asynchronous Single-looP alternatIve gRadient projEction (ASPIRE) algorithm with the itErative Active SEt method (EASE) to tackle the distributed distributionally robust optimization (DDRO) problem. Furthermore, a new uncertainty set, i.e., constrained D-norm uncertainty set, is developed to effectively leverage the prior distribution and flexibly control the degree of robustness. Finally, our theoretical analysis elucidates that the proposed algorithm is guaranteed to converge and the iteration complexity is also analyzed. Extensive empirical studies on real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can not only achieve fast convergence, and remain robust against data heterogeneity as well as malicious attacks, but also tradeoff robustness with performance. 分布式鲁棒优化（DRO）旨在找到一个最优决策，使概率分布模糊集上的最坏情况成本最小化，已广泛应用于各种应用，例如网络行为分析、风险管理等。然而，现有的DRO技术面临三个关键挑战：1）如何处理分布式环境中的异步更新； 2）如何有效利用先验分布； 3）如何根据不同场景适当调整鲁棒程度。为此，我们提出了一种异步分布式算法，称为异步单环交替梯度投影（ASPIRE）算法，采用迭代主动SEt方法（EASE）来解决分布式分布鲁棒优化（DDRO）问题。此外，还提出了一种新的不确定性集，即约束D范数不确定性集，以有效利用先验分布并灵活控制鲁棒性程度。最后，我们的理论分析阐明了所提出的算法保证收敛，并分析了迭代复杂度。对现实世界数据集的广泛实证研究表明，所提出的方法不仅可以实现快速收敛，并且对数据异构性和恶意攻击保持鲁棒性，而且可以在鲁棒性与性能之间进行权衡。 本文提出一种分布式分布鲁棒优化算法，解决非凸目标下的异步更新、先验分布利用及鲁棒性调整问题。 Yang Jiao,Kai Yang,Dongjin Song cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jae Yong Lee,Chuhang Zou,Derek Hoiem
title: Deep PatchMatch MVS with Learned Patch Coplanarity, Geometric Consistency and Adaptive Pixel Sampling
title_zh: 具有学习补丁共面性、几何一致性和自适应像素采样的深度 PatchMatch MVS
abstract: Recent work in multi-view stereo (MVS) combines learnable photometric scores and regularization with PatchMatch-based optimization to achieve robust pixelwise estimates of depth, normals, and visibility. However, non-learning based methods still outperform for large scenes with sparse views, in part due to use of geometric consistency constraints and ability to optimize over many views at high resolution. In this paper, we build on learning-based approaches to improve photometric scores by learning patch coplanarity and encourage geometric consistency by learning a scaled photometric cost that can be combined with reprojection error. We also propose an adaptive pixel sampling strategy for candidate propagation that reduces memory to enable training on larger resolution with more views and a larger encoder. These modifications lead to 6-15% gains in accuracy and completeness on the challenging ETH3D benchmark, resulting in higher F1 performance than the widely used state-of-the-art non-learning approaches ACMM and ACMP.
summary: Recent work in multi-view stereo (MVS) combines learnable photometric scores and regularization with PatchMatch-based optimization to achieve robust pixelwise estimates of depth, normals, and visibility. However, non-learning based methods still outperform for large scenes with sparse views, in part due to use of geometric consistency constraints and ability to optimize over many views at high resolution. In this paper, we build on learning-based approaches to improve photometric scores by learning patch coplanarity and encourage geometric consistency by learning a scaled photometric cost that can be combined with reprojection error. We also propose an adaptive pixel sampling strategy for candidate propagation that reduces memory to enable training on larger resolution with more views and a larger encoder. These modifications lead to 6-15% gains in accuracy and completeness on the challenging ETH3D benchmark, resulting in higher F1 performance than the widely used state-of-the-art non-learning approaches ACMM and ACMP.
abstract_zh: 最近在多视图立体 (MVS) 方面的工作将可学习的光度分数和正则化与基于 PatchMatch 的优化相结合，以实现深度、法线和可见性的稳健像素估计。然而，基于非学习的方法仍然优于具有稀疏视图的大型场景，部分原因是使用几何一致性约束以及在高分辨率下优化多个视图的能力。在本文中，我们基于基于学习的方法，通过学习斑块共面性来提高光度分数，并通过学习可与重投影误差相结合的缩放光度成本来鼓励几何一致性。我们还提出了一种用于候选传播的自适应像素采样策略，该策略可以减少内存，从而能够使用更多视图和更大的编码器在更高分辨率上进行训练。这些修改使具有挑战性的 ETH3D 基准的准确性和完整性提高了 6-15%，从而比广泛使用的最先进的非学习方法 ACMM 和 ACMP 具有更高的 F1 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的深度学习多视角立体视觉（MVS）方法，通过学习补丁共面性、几何一致性及自适应像素采样策略，提升深度、法线和可见性估计的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的MVS方法在稀疏视角的大场景中表现不如传统非学习方法，主要因缺乏几何一致性约束及高分辨率多视角优化能力。
AI.method: 提出学习补丁共面性以优化光度分数，结合缩放光度代价与重投影误差实现几何一致性；设计自适应像素采样策略降低内存占用，支持更高分辨率与更多视角的训练。
AI.result: 在ETH3D基准测试中，精度与完整性提升6-15%，F1性能超越主流非学习方法ACMM和ACMP。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合几何约束与自适应采样，本文方法显著提升了基于学习的MVS在复杂场景下的性能，缩小了与传统方法的差距。

search_text: Deep PatchMatch MVS with Learned Patch Coplanarity, Geometric Consistency and Adaptive Pixel Sampling 具有学习补丁共面性、几何一致性和自适应像素采样的深度 PatchMatch MVS Recent work in multi-view stereo (MVS) combines learnable photometric scores and regularization with PatchMatch-based optimization to achieve robust pixelwise estimates of depth, normals, and visibility. However, non-learning based methods still outperform for large scenes with sparse views, in part due to use of geometric consistency constraints and ability to optimize over many views at high resolution. In this paper, we build on learning-based approaches to improve photometric scores by learning patch coplanarity and encourage geometric consistency by learning a scaled photometric cost that can be combined with reprojection error. We also propose an adaptive pixel sampling strategy for candidate propagation that reduces memory to enable training on larger resolution with more views and a larger encoder. These modifications lead to 6-15% gains in accuracy and completeness on the challenging ETH3D benchmark, resulting in higher F1 performance than the widely used state-of-the-art non-learning approaches ACMM and ACMP. 最近在多视图立体 (MVS) 方面的工作将可学习的光度分数和正则化与基于 PatchMatch 的优化相结合，以实现深度、法线和可见性的稳健像素估计。然而，基于非学习的方法仍然优于具有稀疏视图的大型场景，部分原因是使用几何一致性约束以及在高分辨率下优化多个视图的能力。在本文中，我们基于基于学习的方法，通过学习斑块共面性来提高光度分数，并通过学习可与重投影误差相结合的缩放光度成本来鼓励几何一致性。我们还提出了一种用于候选传播的自适应像素采样策略，该策略可以减少内存，从而能够使用更多视图和更大的编码器在更高分辨率上进行训练。这些修改使具有挑战性的 ETH3D 基准的准确性和完整性提高了 6-15%，从而比广泛使用的最先进的非学习方法 ACMM 和 ACMP 具有更高的 F1 性能。 本文提出一种改进的深度学习多视角立体视觉（MVS）方法，通过学习补丁共面性、几何一致性及自适应像素采样策略，提升深度、法线和可见性估计的精度。 Jae Yong Lee,Chuhang Zou,Derek Hoiem cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaogang Huang,Tiefeng Ma,Conan Liu,Shuangzhe Liu
title: GriT-DBSCAN: A Spatial Clustering Algorithm for Very Large Databases
title_zh: GriT-DBSCAN：超大型数据库的空间聚类算法
abstract: DBSCAN is a fundamental spatial clustering algorithm with numerous practical applications. However, a bottleneck of the algorithm is in the worst case, the run time complexity is $O(n^2)$. To address this limitation, we propose a new grid-based algorithm for exact DBSCAN in Euclidean space called GriT-DBSCAN, which is based on the following two techniques. First, we introduce a grid tree to organize the non-empty grids for the purpose of efficient non-empty neighboring grids queries. Second, by utilising the spatial relationships among points, we propose a technique that iteratively prunes unnecessary distance calculations when determining whether the minimum distance between two sets is less than or equal to a certain threshold. We theoretically prove that the complexity of GriT-DBSCAN is linear to the data set size. In addition, we obtain two variants of GriT-DBSCAN by incorporating heuristics, or by combining the second technique with an existing algorithm. Experiments are conducted on both synthetic and real-world data sets to evaluate the efficiency of GriT-DBSCAN and its variants. The results of our analyses show that our algorithms outperform existing algorithms.
summary: DBSCAN is a fundamental spatial clustering algorithm with numerous practical applications. However, a bottleneck of the algorithm is in the worst case, the run time complexity is $O(n^2)$. To address this limitation, we propose a new grid-based algorithm for exact DBSCAN in Euclidean space called GriT-DBSCAN, which is based on the following two techniques. First, we introduce a grid tree to organize the non-empty grids for the purpose of efficient non-empty neighboring grids queries. Second, by utilising the spatial relationships among points, we propose a technique that iteratively prunes unnecessary distance calculations when determining whether the minimum distance between two sets is less than or equal to a certain threshold. We theoretically prove that the complexity of GriT-DBSCAN is linear to the data set size. In addition, we obtain two variants of GriT-DBSCAN by incorporating heuristics, or by combining the second technique with an existing algorithm. Experiments are conducted on both synthetic and real-world data sets to evaluate the efficiency of GriT-DBSCAN and its variants. The results of our analyses show that our algorithms outperform existing algorithms.
abstract_zh: DBSCAN 是一种具有大量实际应用的基本空间聚类算法。然而，该算法的瓶颈是在最坏的情况下，运行时间复杂度为$O(n^2)$。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新的基于网格的欧几里得空间中精确 DBSCAN 算法，称为 GriT-DBSCAN，它基于以下两种技术。首先，我们引入网格树来组织非空网格，以实现高效的非空相邻网格查询。其次，通过利用点之间的空间关系，我们提出了一种技术，在确定两个集合之间的最小距离是否小于或等于某个阈值时，迭代地修剪不必要的距离计算。我们从理论上证明，GriT-DBSCAN 的复杂度与数据集大小呈线性关系。此外，我们通过结合启发式方法或将第二种技术与现有算法相结合，获得了 GriT-DBSCAN 的两个变体。在合成数据集和真实数据集上进行了实验，以评估 GriT-DBSCAN 及其变体的效率。我们的分析结果表明我们的算法优于现有算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GriT-DBSCAN的网格化空间聚类算法，旨在解决传统DBSCAN算法在大规模数据集上的效率瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: DBSCAN算法在最坏情况下时间复杂度为O(n²)，难以高效处理非常大的数据库，需改进其计算效率。
AI.method: 通过构建网格树优化非空网格查询效率，并利用空间关系迭代剪枝冗余距离计算，理论证明复杂度线性于数据集规模。同时衍生两种变体算法。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实数据集上的实验表明，GriT-DBSCAN及其变体在效率上优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: GriT-DBSCAN通过网格结构与剪枝策略有效降低了计算复杂度，为大规模空间聚类提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: GriT-DBSCAN: A Spatial Clustering Algorithm for Very Large Databases GriT-DBSCAN：超大型数据库的空间聚类算法 DBSCAN is a fundamental spatial clustering algorithm with numerous practical applications. However, a bottleneck of the algorithm is in the worst case, the run time complexity is $O(n^2)$. To address this limitation, we propose a new grid-based algorithm for exact DBSCAN in Euclidean space called GriT-DBSCAN, which is based on the following two techniques. First, we introduce a grid tree to organize the non-empty grids for the purpose of efficient non-empty neighboring grids queries. Second, by utilising the spatial relationships among points, we propose a technique that iteratively prunes unnecessary distance calculations when determining whether the minimum distance between two sets is less than or equal to a certain threshold. We theoretically prove that the complexity of GriT-DBSCAN is linear to the data set size. In addition, we obtain two variants of GriT-DBSCAN by incorporating heuristics, or by combining the second technique with an existing algorithm. Experiments are conducted on both synthetic and real-world data sets to evaluate the efficiency of GriT-DBSCAN and its variants. The results of our analyses show that our algorithms outperform existing algorithms. DBSCAN 是一种具有大量实际应用的基本空间聚类算法。然而，该算法的瓶颈是在最坏的情况下，运行时间复杂度为$O(n^2)$。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新的基于网格的欧几里得空间中精确 DBSCAN 算法，称为 GriT-DBSCAN，它基于以下两种技术。首先，我们引入网格树来组织非空网格，以实现高效的非空相邻网格查询。其次，通过利用点之间的空间关系，我们提出了一种技术，在确定两个集合之间的最小距离是否小于或等于某个阈值时，迭代地修剪不必要的距离计算。我们从理论上证明，GriT-DBSCAN 的复杂度与数据集大小呈线性关系。此外，我们通过结合启发式方法或将第二种技术与现有算法相结合，获得了 GriT-DBSCAN 的两个变体。在合成数据集和真实数据集上进行了实验，以评估 GriT-DBSCAN 及其变体的效率。我们的分析结果表明我们的算法优于现有算法。 本文提出一种名为GriT-DBSCAN的网格化空间聚类算法，旨在解决传统DBSCAN算法在大规模数据集上的效率瓶颈问题。 Xiaogang Huang,Tiefeng Ma,Conan Liu,Shuangzhe Liu cs.DB,cs.DS

authors_text: Andra Petrovai,Sergiu Nedevschi
title: MonoDVPS: A Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation Approach to Depth-aware Video Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: MonoDVPS：一种用于深度感知视频全景分割的自监督单目深度估计方法
abstract: Depth-aware video panoptic segmentation tackles the inverse projection problem of restoring panoptic 3D point clouds from video sequences, where the 3D points are augmented with semantic classes and temporally consistent instance identifiers. We propose a novel solution with a multi-task network that performs monocular depth estimation and video panoptic segmentation. Since acquiring ground truth labels for both depth and image segmentation has a relatively large cost, we leverage the power of unlabeled video sequences with self-supervised monocular depth estimation and semi-supervised learning from pseudo-labels for video panoptic segmentation. To further improve the depth prediction, we introduce panoptic-guided depth losses and a novel panoptic masking scheme for moving objects to avoid corrupting the training signal. Extensive experiments on the Cityscapes-DVPS and SemKITTI-DVPS datasets demonstrate that our model with the proposed improvements achieves competitive results and fast inference speed.
summary: Depth-aware video panoptic segmentation tackles the inverse projection problem of restoring panoptic 3D point clouds from video sequences, where the 3D points are augmented with semantic classes and temporally consistent instance identifiers. We propose a novel solution with a multi-task network that performs monocular depth estimation and video panoptic segmentation. Since acquiring ground truth labels for both depth and image segmentation has a relatively large cost, we leverage the power of unlabeled video sequences with self-supervised monocular depth estimation and semi-supervised learning from pseudo-labels for video panoptic segmentation. To further improve the depth prediction, we introduce panoptic-guided depth losses and a novel panoptic masking scheme for moving objects to avoid corrupting the training signal. Extensive experiments on the Cityscapes-DVPS and SemKITTI-DVPS datasets demonstrate that our model with the proposed improvements achieves competitive results and fast inference speed.
abstract_zh: 深度感知视频全景分割解决了从视频序列恢复全景 3D 点云的逆投影问题，其中 3D 点通过语义类和时间一致的实例标识符进行增强。我们提出了一种新颖的解决方案，具有执行单目深度估计和视频全景分割的多任务网络。由于获取深度和图像分割的地面实况标签的成本相对较高，因此我们利用未标记视频序列的强大功能，通过自监督单目深度估计和从伪标签进行半监督学习来进行视频全景分割。为了进一步改进深度预测，我们引入了全景引导深度损失和一种新颖的全景遮蔽方案，用于移动物体以避免破坏训练信号。对 Cityscapes-DVPS 和 SemKITTI-DVPS 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的模型经过所提出的改进，实现了有竞争力的结果和快速的推理速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目深度估计的自监督深度感知视频全景分割方法MonoDVPS，解决从视频序列中恢复带有语义信息的3D点云的逆投影问题。
AI.motivation: 深度感知视频全景分割需要同时获取深度信息和语义分割标签，但标注成本高昂。本文通过自监督学习和伪标签半监督方法降低对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 设计多任务网络联合执行单目深度估计与视频全景分割，利用自监督单目深度估计处理未标注视频，并通过伪标签进行半监督学习。引入全景引导深度损失和动态物体掩码机制优化深度预测。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes-DVPS和SemKITTI-DVPS数据集上实验表明，该方法在保持竞争力的同时实现了快速推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自监督框架有效降低了标注成本，结合全景引导损失和动态掩码机制显著提升了深度感知视频分割性能。

authors_text: Ruifei He,Shuyang Sun,Xin Yu,Chuhui Xue,Wenqing Zhang,Philip Torr,Song Bai,Xiaojuan Qi
title: Is synthetic data from generative models ready for image recognition?
title_zh: 来自生成模型的合成数据是否已准备好用于图像识别？
abstract: Recent text-to-image generation models have shown promising results in generating high-fidelity photo-realistic images. Though the results are astonishing to human eyes, how applicable these generated images are for recognition tasks remains under-explored. In this work, we extensively study whether and how synthetic images generated from state-of-the-art text-to-image generation models can be used for image recognition tasks, and focus on two perspectives: synthetic data for improving classification models in data-scarce settings (i.e. zero-shot and few-shot), and synthetic data for large-scale model pre-training for transfer learning. We showcase the powerfulness and shortcomings of synthetic data from existing generative models, and propose strategies for better applying synthetic data for recognition tasks. Code: https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/SyntheticData.
summary: Recent text-to-image generation models have shown promising results in generating high-fidelity photo-realistic images. Though the results are astonishing to human eyes, how applicable these generated images are for recognition tasks remains under-explored. In this work, we extensively study whether and how synthetic images generated from state-of-the-art text-to-image generation models can be used for image recognition tasks, and focus on two perspectives: synthetic data for improving classification models in data-scarce settings (i.e. zero-shot and few-shot), and synthetic data for large-scale model pre-training for transfer learning. We showcase the powerfulness and shortcomings of synthetic data from existing generative models, and propose strategies for better applying synthetic data for recognition tasks. Code: https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/SyntheticData.
abstract_zh: 最近的文本到图像生成模型在生成高保真照片级真实感图像方面显示出了有希望的结果。尽管结果令人惊讶，但这些生成的图像如何适用于识别任务仍有待探索。在这项工作中，我们广泛研究了从最先进的文本到图像生成模型生成的合成图像是否以及如何用于图像识别任务，并重点关注两个观点：用于改进数据稀缺设置（即零样本和少样本）中的分类模型的合成数据，以及用于迁移学习的大规模模型预训练的合成数据。我们展示了现有生成模型的合成数据的强大功能和缺点，并提出了更好地将合成数据应用于识别任务的策略。代码：https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/SyntheticData。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于生成模型的合成数据在图像识别任务中的适用性，重点探讨其在数据稀缺场景和大规模预训练中的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成模型能生成高质量图像，但其在图像识别任务中的实用性尚未明确，需验证合成数据能否有效提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过实验评估先进文本到图像生成模型的合成数据在零样本/少样本分类及迁移学习预训练中的表现，并提出优化应用策略。
AI.result: 合成数据在数据稀缺场景下表现优异，但在大规模预训练中存在局限性，需结合策略提升其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据具有潜力但需谨慎应用，未来需进一步探索其与真实数据的结合方式以优化识别任务性能。

authors_text: Xuetong Xue,Jiaying Shi,Xinxue He,Shenghui Xu,Zhaoming Pan
title: Cross-Scale Context Extracted Hashing for Fine-Grained Image Binary Encoding
title_zh: 用于细粒度图像二进制编码的跨尺度上下文提取哈希
comment: Accepted by 14th Asian Conference on Machine Learning (ACML2022)
comments: Accepted by 14th Asian Conference on Machine Learning (ACML2022)
abstract: Deep hashing has been widely applied to large-scale image retrieval tasks owing to efficient computation and low storage cost by encoding high-dimensional image data into binary codes. Since binary codes do not contain as much information as float features, the essence of binary encoding is preserving the main context to guarantee retrieval quality. However, the existing hashing methods have great limitations on suppressing redundant background information and accurately encoding from Euclidean space to Hamming space by a simple sign function. In order to solve these problems, a Cross-Scale Context Extracted Hashing Network (CSCE-Net) is proposed in this paper. Firstly, we design a two-branch framework to capture fine-grained local information while maintaining high-level global semantic information. Besides, Attention guided Information Extraction module (AIE) is introduced between two branches, which suppresses areas of low context information cooperated with global sliding windows. Unlike previous methods, our CSCE-Net learns a content-related Dynamic Sign Function (DSF) to replace the original simple sign function. Therefore, the proposed CSCE-Net is context-sensitive and able to perform well on accurate image binary encoding. We further demonstrate that our CSCE-Net is superior to the existing hashing methods, which improves retrieval performance on standard benchmarks.
summary: Deep hashing has been widely applied to large-scale image retrieval tasks owing to efficient computation and low storage cost by encoding high-dimensional image data into binary codes. Since binary codes do not contain as much information as float features, the essence of binary encoding is preserving the main context to guarantee retrieval quality. However, the existing hashing methods have great limitations on suppressing redundant background information and accurately encoding from Euclidean space to Hamming space by a simple sign function. In order to solve these problems, a Cross-Scale Context Extracted Hashing Network (CSCE-Net) is proposed in this paper. Firstly, we design a two-branch framework to capture fine-grained local information while maintaining high-level global semantic information. Besides, Attention guided Information Extraction module (AIE) is introduced between two branches, which suppresses areas of low context information cooperated with global sliding windows. Unlike previous methods, our CSCE-Net learns a content-related Dynamic Sign Function (DSF) to replace the original simple sign function. Therefore, the proposed CSCE-Net is context-sensitive and able to perform well on accurate image binary encoding. We further demonstrate that our CSCE-Net is superior to the existing hashing methods, which improves retrieval performance on standard benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 深度哈希通过将高维图像数据编码为二进制代码，由于计算效率高且存储成本低，已被广泛应用于大规模图像检索任务。由于二进制代码所包含的信息不如浮点特征那么多，因此二进制编码的本质是保留主要上下文以保证检索质量。然而，现有的哈希方法在抑制冗余背景信息以及通过简单的符号函数从欧氏空间到汉明空间进行精确编码方面存在很大的局限性。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了跨尺度上下文提取哈希网络（CSCE-Net）。首先，我们设计了一个两分支框架来捕获细粒度的局部信息，同时维护高级全局语义信息。此外，在两个分支之间引入了注意力引导信息提取模块（AIE），与全局滑动窗口配合抑制低上下文信息区域。与以前的方法不同，我们的 CSCE-Net 学习内容相关的动态符号函数（DSF）来代替原来的简单符号函数。因此，所提出的 CSCE-Net 是上下文相关的，并且能够在准确的图像二进制编码上表现良好。我们进一步证明我们的 CSCE-Net 优于现有的哈希方法，这提高了标准基准的检索性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨尺度上下文提取哈希网络（CSCE-Net），用于改进细粒度图像二值编码，提升大规模图像检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有哈希方法难以有效抑制冗余背景信息，且使用简单符号函数导致欧氏空间到汉明空间的映射不够精确，影响检索质量。
AI.method: 设计双分支框架捕捉局部细节与全局语义，引入注意力引导信息提取模块（AIE）抑制低上下文区域，并采用动态符号函数（DSF）替代传统符号函数。
AI.result: CSCE-Net在标准基准数据集上优于现有哈希方法，显著提升了图像检索的准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨尺度上下文建模与动态符号函数优化，CSCE-Net有效解决了二值编码中的信息丢失问题，验证了方法在图像检索任务中的优越性。

search_text: Cross-Scale Context Extracted Hashing for Fine-Grained Image Binary Encoding 用于细粒度图像二进制编码的跨尺度上下文提取哈希 Deep hashing has been widely applied to large-scale image retrieval tasks owing to efficient computation and low storage cost by encoding high-dimensional image data into binary codes. Since binary codes do not contain as much information as float features, the essence of binary encoding is preserving the main context to guarantee retrieval quality. However, the existing hashing methods have great limitations on suppressing redundant background information and accurately encoding from Euclidean space to Hamming space by a simple sign function. In order to solve these problems, a Cross-Scale Context Extracted Hashing Network (CSCE-Net) is proposed in this paper. Firstly, we design a two-branch framework to capture fine-grained local information while maintaining high-level global semantic information. Besides, Attention guided Information Extraction module (AIE) is introduced between two branches, which suppresses areas of low context information cooperated with global sliding windows. Unlike previous methods, our CSCE-Net learns a content-related Dynamic Sign Function (DSF) to replace the original simple sign function. Therefore, the proposed CSCE-Net is context-sensitive and able to perform well on accurate image binary encoding. We further demonstrate that our CSCE-Net is superior to the existing hashing methods, which improves retrieval performance on standard benchmarks. 深度哈希通过将高维图像数据编码为二进制代码，由于计算效率高且存储成本低，已被广泛应用于大规模图像检索任务。由于二进制代码所包含的信息不如浮点特征那么多，因此二进制编码的本质是保留主要上下文以保证检索质量。然而，现有的哈希方法在抑制冗余背景信息以及通过简单的符号函数从欧氏空间到汉明空间进行精确编码方面存在很大的局限性。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了跨尺度上下文提取哈希网络（CSCE-Net）。首先，我们设计了一个两分支框架来捕获细粒度的局部信息，同时维护高级全局语义信息。此外，在两个分支之间引入了注意力引导信息提取模块（AIE），与全局滑动窗口配合抑制低上下文信息区域。与以前的方法不同，我们的 CSCE-Net 学习内容相关的动态符号函数（DSF）来代替原来的简单符号函数。因此，所提出的 CSCE-Net 是上下文相关的，并且能够在准确的图像二进制编码上表现良好。我们进一步证明我们的 CSCE-Net 优于现有的哈希方法，这提高了标准基准的检索性能。 本文提出一种跨尺度上下文提取哈希网络（CSCE-Net），用于改进细粒度图像二值编码，提升大规模图像检索性能。 Xuetong Xue,Jiaying Shi,Xinxue He,Shenghui Xu,Zhaoming Pan cs.CV

authors_text: Chaoqi Chen,Luyao Tang,Feng Liu,Gangming Zhao,Yue Huang,Yizhou Yu
title: Mix and Reason: Reasoning over Semantic Topology with Data Mixing for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 混合与推理：通过数据混合进行语义拓扑推理以实现领域泛化
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) enables generalizing a learning machine from multiple seen source domains to an unseen target one. The general objective of DG methods is to learn semantic representations that are independent of domain labels, which is theoretically sound but empirically challenged due to the complex mixture of common and domain-specific factors. Although disentangling the representations into two disjoint parts has been gaining momentum in DG, the strong presumption over the data limits its efficacy in many real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose Mix and Reason (\mire), a new DG framework that learns semantic representations via enforcing the structural invariance of semantic topology. \mire\ consists of two key components, namely, Category-aware Data Mixing (CDM) and Adaptive Semantic Topology Refinement (ASTR). CDM mixes two images from different domains in virtue of activation maps generated by two complementary classification losses, making the classifier focus on the representations of semantic objects. ASTR introduces relation graphs to represent semantic topology, which is progressively refined via the interactions between local feature aggregation and global cross-domain relational reasoning. Experiments on multiple DG benchmarks validate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed \mire.
summary: Domain generalization (DG) enables generalizing a learning machine from multiple seen source domains to an unseen target one. The general objective of DG methods is to learn semantic representations that are independent of domain labels, which is theoretically sound but empirically challenged due to the complex mixture of common and domain-specific factors. Although disentangling the representations into two disjoint parts has been gaining momentum in DG, the strong presumption over the data limits its efficacy in many real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose Mix and Reason (\mire), a new DG framework that learns semantic representations via enforcing the structural invariance of semantic topology. \mire\ consists of two key components, namely, Category-aware Data Mixing (CDM) and Adaptive Semantic Topology Refinement (ASTR). CDM mixes two images from different domains in virtue of activation maps generated by two complementary classification losses, making the classifier focus on the representations of semantic objects. ASTR introduces relation graphs to represent semantic topology, which is progressively refined via the interactions between local feature aggregation and global cross-domain relational reasoning. Experiments on multiple DG benchmarks validate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed \mire.
abstract_zh: 域泛化 (DG) 能够将学习机从多个可见的源域泛化到一个不可见的目标域。 DG 方法的总体目标是学习独立于领域标签的语义表示，这在理论上是合理的，但由于常见因素和特定领域因素的复杂混合而在经验上受到挑战。尽管将表示分解为两个不相交的部分在 DG 中已经获得了越来越多的动力，但对数据的强烈假设限制了其在许多现实场景中的有效性。在本文中，我们提出了 Mix and Reason (\mire)，这是一种新的 DG 框架，它通过强制语义拓扑的结构不变性来学习语义表示。 \mire\ 由两个关键组件组成，即类别感知数据混合（CDM）和自适应语义拓扑细化（ASTR）。 CDM 凭借两个互补分类损失生成的激活图混合来自不同领域的两个图像，使分类器专注于语义对象的表示。 ASTR引入关系图来表示语义拓扑，通过局部特征聚合和全局跨域关系推理之间的交互逐步细化语义拓扑。对多个 DG 基准的实验验证了所提出的 \mire 的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的领域泛化框架Mix and Reason（\\mire），通过语义拓扑结构不变性学习领域不变的语义表示，解决跨领域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法依赖强数据假设，难以处理现实场景中复杂的领域特定因素与通用因素混合问题，导致泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 框架包含两个核心组件：1）基于分类损失激活图的类别感知数据混合（CDM），增强语义对象表示；2）通过局部特征聚合与全局跨域关系推理逐步优化的自适应语义拓扑精炼（ASTR）。
AI.result: 在多个领域泛化基准测试中验证了\\mire方法的有效性和鲁棒性，优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过强制语义拓扑结构不变性，\\mire框架在无需领域标签的前提下提升了模型对未见目标领域的适应能力。

authors_text: Swaroop Mishra,Anjana Arunkumar,Chris Bryan,Chitta Baral
title: A Survey of Parameters Associated with the Quality of Benchmarks in NLP
title_zh: 与 NLP 基准质量相关的参数调查
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2005.00816
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2005.00816
abstract: Several benchmarks have been built with heavy investment in resources to track our progress in NLP. Thousands of papers published in response to those benchmarks have competed to top leaderboards, with models often surpassing human performance. However, recent studies have shown that models triumph over several popular benchmarks just by overfitting on spurious biases, without truly learning the desired task. Despite this finding, benchmarking, while trying to tackle bias, still relies on workarounds, which do not fully utilize the resources invested in benchmark creation, due to the discarding of low quality data, and cover limited sets of bias. A potential solution to these issues -- a metric quantifying quality -- remains underexplored. Inspired by successful quality indices in several domains such as power, food, and water, we take the first step towards a metric by identifying certain language properties that can represent various possible interactions leading to biases in a benchmark. We look for bias related parameters which can potentially help pave our way towards the metric. We survey existing works and identify parameters capturing various properties of bias, their origins, types and impact on performance, generalization, and robustness. Our analysis spans over datasets and a hierarchy of tasks ranging from NLI to Summarization, ensuring that our parameters are generic and are not overfitted towards a specific task or dataset. We also develop certain parameters in this process.
summary: Several benchmarks have been built with heavy investment in resources to track our progress in NLP. Thousands of papers published in response to those benchmarks have competed to top leaderboards, with models often surpassing human performance. However, recent studies have shown that models triumph over several popular benchmarks just by overfitting on spurious biases, without truly learning the desired task. Despite this finding, benchmarking, while trying to tackle bias, still relies on workarounds, which do not fully utilize the resources invested in benchmark creation, due to the discarding of low quality data, and cover limited sets of bias. A potential solution to these issues -- a metric quantifying quality -- remains underexplored. Inspired by successful quality indices in several domains such as power, food, and water, we take the first step towards a metric by identifying certain language properties that can represent various possible interactions leading to biases in a benchmark. We look for bias related parameters which can potentially help pave our way towards the metric. We survey existing works and identify parameters capturing various properties of bias, their origins, types and impact on performance, generalization, and robustness. Our analysis spans over datasets and a hierarchy of tasks ranging from NLI to Summarization, ensuring that our parameters are generic and are not overfitted towards a specific task or dataset. We also develop certain parameters in this process.
abstract_zh: 我们投入了大量资源建立了几个基准来跟踪我们在 NLP 方面的进展。为响应这些基准而发表的数千篇论文已经竞争到顶级排行榜，其中的模型常常超越人类的表现。然而，最近的研究表明，模型仅仅通过过度拟合虚假偏差而战胜了几个流行的基准，而没有真正学习所需的任务。尽管有这一发现，基准测试在试图解决偏差的同时，仍然依赖于变通办法，由于丢弃了低质量数据，这些变通办法没有充分利用在基准创建中投入的资源，并且覆盖了有限的偏差集。这些问题的潜在解决方案——量化质量的指标——仍未得到充分探索。受到电力、食品和水等多个领域成功质量指数的启发，我们通过识别某些语言属性迈出了衡量指标的第一步，这些属性可以代表导致基准偏差的各种可能的相互作用。我们寻找与偏差相关的参数，这些参数可能有助于为我们的指标铺平道路。我们调查了现有的工作，并确定了捕获偏差的各种属性、其起源、类型以及对性能、泛化和鲁棒性的影响的参数。我们的分析涵盖数据集和从 NLI 到摘要的任务层次结构，确保我们的参数是通用的，并且不会过度拟合特定任务或数据集。我们还在这个过程中开发了某些参数。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过分析语言属性和偏见相关参数，为自然语言处理（NLP）基准的质量评估提供通用指标框架。
AI.motivation: 当前NLP基准易受数据中的虚假偏见影响，模型通过过拟合而非真正学习任务即可取得高分，现有方法未能有效利用资源且覆盖偏见类型有限。
AI.method: 通过文献综述识别与偏见相关的参数，分析其来源、类型及对性能、泛化性和鲁棒性的影响，并在多个任务（如自然语言推理、摘要）和数据集中验证参数的通用性。
AI.result: 确定了影响基准质量的关键参数，包括偏见来源与类型，并开发了部分新参数，证明其跨任务和数据集的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的参数体系为构建更全面的基准质量评估指标奠定基础，有助于提升模型的泛化能力并减少对虚假偏见的依赖。
